NIT Durgapur admission 2026 is open. Candidates can visit the official website to apply.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer:
IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. 
So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. 
Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: 
Course Round 1 Last Round 
B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering 8428 9558
B.Tech. in Information Technology 4817 5924
B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics) 5162 6587

college_info.intro: NIT Durgapur offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The institute offers BTech and MBA programmes to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. National Institute of Technology Durgapur courses are offered in full-time mode and in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under these programmes are Computer Science & Engineering, Biotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, HRM, Marketing, Finance, Systems & Operations Management, etc. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at National Institute of Technology Durgapur West Bengal in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
NIT Durgapur has released its placement report for 2025. The overall highest and average package received during NIT Durgapur placement 2025 was INR 80 LPA and INR 12.61 LPA, respectively. The 2025 placement season achieved a 82% placement rate and a total of 589 offers were made. The season witnessed more than 210 recruiters that took part during the NIT Durgapur placement drive 2025.

Candidates can check the key highlights of NIT Durgapur placement 2024 and 2025 in the table below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: National Institute of Technology Durgapur offers several courses to students at UG, PG, dual degree, and PhD levels. The institute offers courses to students in streams like Engineering, Science, Management, etc. NIT Durgapur offers courses such as BTech, MTech, MSc, MSW, MBA, etc. across multiple specialisations. A dual degree (BSc and MSc) is also offered in a single specialisation by the Chemistry department.

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Durgapur offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at NIT Durgapur ranges around INR 5 lakh.

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Durgapur offers admission to M.Tech on the basis of CCMT scores. The cutoff ranks for the General AI category candidates varied between 350 and 562. Therefore, for the candidates belonging to the General AI category, it is very difficult to get admission to the college for MTech. For candidates belonging to the OBC AI category, the cutoff ranks varied between 309 and 533. Thus, for OBC AI category candidates, getting admission to the college with 300 ranks is difficult. For other categories, such as SC, ST and PWD category candidates, admission at 300 is easier due to a lenient cutoff than for other categories.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Highlights of the National Institute of Technology Durgapur.

review_content.Placements: Our placement is quite successful. Nearly 75 percent of students got placed through the campus drive. The highest placement offered is 51 LPA, while the average stood at 8 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Microsoft, Adobe, Sony, ABB, ONGC, Emerson, and Swiggy have come to campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The academic infrastructure is strong with reliable labs and library access. Hostel life is manageable. Though food quality could be improved, the sports culture is vibrant, and a medical facility is provided. Basic support of the National Institute of Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: This college is very satisfying and has good placements for all branches.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is 82 percent in the mechanical branch, with the highest package of 82 LPA, average package of 13 LPA, and the lowest package of 3-4 LPA. 200+ companies, including Amazon, Microsoft, Adobe, Sony, Swiggy, Emerson, are secured by a large share of students with companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, it is not available in classrooms. There are AC classrooms. There is no problem with Airtel net, it is available in labs, classrooms, and hostel. 3 members per room. A large central library with thousands of volumes is available as a resource.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and placement opportunities with support.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2022 batch of Electronics and Communication Engineering. Around 40% of the students were placed, with the highest package being 12LPA, and the lowest of 3.5 3.5LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Mathworks, Accenture, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The ECE department has a well-equipped campus and a central library with a wide range of technical resources. The hostel provides 24/7 water and electricity, though the mess food is average. Medical assistance is available on campus, and student assistance is available on campus. Students have access to various sports and recreation facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied with college faculty members and there are good placements.

review_content.Placements: As I am studying in 2nd year I haven't talked with our super seniors completely. But I asked once they told me placements in our college in the last year were terrible compared to other years. The highest package is 32 LPA. The lowest package is 7 LPA, and average is 10 LPA. Top recruiters of our college are TCS and Wipro.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have no Wi-Fi in addition we have jammers to block the network. Labs are well-designed and maintained properly. Classrooms are really good with projectors including clear board, nice ventilation, and very comfortable. Library is also very good having many books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: As in every college, there is something that you will not like, but you have to take.

review_content.Placements: In my branch this year in 2025, 93.4 % of students got placed in various job roles, with the highest as 25 LPA, average, and median is approximately 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies in the core are JSW, Vedanta, Tata Steel, etc. A few students from my department got internships as well. Top roles offered in the core field and in the noc core as SDE, etc. As most of the students got placed in my branch, it is a good thing when we talk about CSE ECE, they have really good packages this year. 8 students got 80 LPA job offers from Apple India, mainly from the CSE branch.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My college life and my 4 years.

review_content.Placements: In my college, around 885 of students were placed during the placement season, the highest package is 51 LPA till now, and the lowest package is around 10 LPA, the average package is 11 LPA, and the median is 9 LPA. Top companies are Amazon, Flipkart, Microsoft, etc. Many students also got internship offers. Roles like data analyst, software engineer, software developer, and core companies also give good roles and offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure for my course is good. My course is Electrical Engineering, and the department is good. The lab infrastructure is also very good, and the hostel is very good. The mess food is good but very much. In my college, we have a sports complex which is good.

faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur MBA application process is conducted online. Check below the steps to complete the online application process:1: Pay the application fees online through NET Banking or offline viaNEFT to the Canara Bank Account, NIT Durgapur.2: Collect the generated Transaction ID/Unique Transaction Reference number.3: Register and apply online on the institute's official website4: Save the PDF and send it to the specified email-id.
faqs.question: Q: Can I apply for MBA at NIT Durgapur?

faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur admissions are conducted on the basis of entrance exams. The institute accepts several national level entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, GATE, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, etc. National Institute of Technology Durgapur admission process starts with an online application. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

course_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BTech at NIT Durgapur?
course_faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur offers a BTech programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and is approved by the AICTE. The total tuition fee of BTech at NIT Durgapur ranges around INR 5 lakh.

course_faqs.question: Is B.Tech at NIT Durgapur a good choice?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, NIT Durgapur is good for offering BTech course to students. MBA and BTech are the flagship courses of NIT Durgapur. NIT Durgapur offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme in several subject specialisations such as HRM, Marketing, Finance, Systems & Operations Management, among others. Also, BTech students are placed in top companies such as Microsoft, Infosys, Wells Fargo, and others.

course_faqs.question: What is the tuition fees of BTech at NIT Durgapur?
course_faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur BTech fees is INR 5 lakh. NIT Durgapur fee structure includes many components. The total fees may differ at the time of payment due to the variables of the fee structure. Students must pay fees to confirm seat in BTech programme.

course_faqs.question: Is it worth doing MTech from NIT Durgapur?
course_faqs.answer: MTech is one of the popular courses of NIT Durgapur. NIRF has ranked NIT Durgapur at 44 in 2024 rankings under 'Engineering' Category. It is one of the recognised NITs of India offering two-year M.Tech programme. Candidates have an option of 18 specialisations in M.Tech at NIT Durgapur. Once completed, M.Tech students can participate in the placement drive of the institute. TCS, JP Morgan, Oracle, and many other renowned companies participated in NIT Durgapur placements 2023.

course_faqs.question: What is the hostel charge for NIT Durgapur MTech?
course_faqs.answer: Students wishing to apply for hostel have to pay an additional amount. NIT Durgapur does have mess service for which students need to pay a separate charge. The hostel fee for M.Tech students is INR 36,600. Students also have to pay a caution money for hostel service. Apart from the hostel charges, the tuition fee for M.Tech is INR 1.40 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA available at NIT Durgapur?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is available at NIT Durgapur. The institute offers a full-time Master of Business Administration or MBA programme through its Department of Management Studies. It is a PG degree programme that lasts two years. With an intake capacity of 44 students, the institute's MBA programme allows candidates to choose dual specialisation. Admission to the programme is based on the applicant's performance in CAT/MAT/XAT/CMAT. For more details, interested candidates can visit the institute's official

course_faqs.question: Are there any scholarships offered to MBA students at NIT Durgapur?
course_faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur provides scholarships to MBA students. These scholarships include OP Jindal Engineering & Management Scholarship, Hakeem Abdul Hameed Scholarship, etc. The institute also faciliates the provision of various State Government scholarships to eligible students. The details regarding these scholarships is available on the institute's official website. A tuition fee of 100% is provided to SC/ST candidates pursuing an MBA at NIT Durgapur.

But I asked once they told me placements in our college in the last year were terrible compared to other years. The highest package is 32 LPA. The lowest package is 7 LPA, and average is 10 LPA. Top recruiters of our college are TCS and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: We have no Wi-Fi in addition we have jammers to block the network. Labs are well-designed and maintained properly. Classrooms are really good with projectors including clear board, nice ventilation, and very comfortable. Library is also very good having many books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: As in every college, there is something that you will not like, but you have to take.

content.Placements: In my branch this year in 2025, 93.4 % of students got placed in various job roles, with the highest as 25 LPA, average, and median is approximately 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies in the core are JSW, Vedanta, Tata Steel, etc. A few students from my department got internships as well. Top roles offered in the core field and in the noc core as SDE, etc. As most of the students got placed in my branch, it is a good thing when we talk about CSE ECE, they have really good packages this year. 8 students got 80 LPA job offers from Apple India, mainly from the CSE branch.

admission_overview.title: NIT Durgapur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIT Durgapur admissions are entrance-based for UG and PG courses. The institute offers admission through national-level entrance exams and counselling. BTech is the flagship programme of NIT Durgapur, admission to which is based on JEE Main rank followed by JoSAA and CSAB Counselling. MTech admission requires GATE score. National Institute of Technology course admissions are also based on respective counselling bodies. The institute offers BTech, MTech, MSc, MBA, Integrated MSc, etc. at UG and PG levels in Engineering and Science streams. Students wishing to apply for admission at NIT Durgapur must follow all the steps from registration to counselling.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for admission in NIT Durgapur?

paragraphs: NIT Durgapur admissionsbegin with opening of applications. Since admission to most of the programmes is entrance-based, candidates are required to apply through the entrance exam. Below is the step-wiseNIT Durgapur admission process:
NIT Durgapur Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at NIT Durgapur are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment. However, candidates seeking admission to MBA and PhD courses need to apply on the official website of the institute.
Selection Rounds

For its flagship BTech programme, NIT Durgapur admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. Similarly, for MSc admission, IIT JAM and CCMN Counselling are required. However, NIT Durgapur MBA admissions are done through CAT score, where the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the PI round.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. Whereas, for MBA admission, the institute releases direct merit lists after declaring the final results of all rounds. The selected candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

NIT Durgapur feesinclude multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel charges, etc. The caution deposit is a one-time payment paid at the time of admission. The following table mentions theNIT Durgapur feefor the offered courses:
Note:This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Note:Thisinformation is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

courses_data.description: NIT Durgapur offers two-year MTech programme divided into four semesters at the PG level. The institute offers MTech in eighteen specialisations under Sponsored and Self-Sponsored Category, namelyComputer Science,Structural,Biotechnology, etc. NIT Durgapur admissions to the MTech course is through theGATEentrance exam which is conducted inJanuary/ Februaryevery year. The final admission for MTech will be mainly based on academic credentials, written tests and/ or interviews.

faqs.question: Is it worth doing MTech from NIT Durgapur?
faqs.answer: MTech is one of the popular courses of NIT Durgapur. NIRF has ranked NIT Durgapur at44in 2024 rankings under 'Engineering' Category. It is one of the recognised NITs of India offering two-year M.Tech programme. Candidates have an option of18 specialisationsin M.Tech at NIT Durgapur. Once completed, M.Tech students can participate in the placement drive of the institute. TCS, JP Morgan, Oracle, and many otherrenowned companiesparticipated inNIT Durgapur placements 2023.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for NIT Durgapur M.Tech admission?
faqs.answer: For NIT Durgapur M.Tech admission, candidates must apply for the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering. GATE is an online national-level examination conducted for Master of Engineering (ME), Masters in Technology (MTech) and direct PhD admissions to IITs, NITs, IIITs and other institutes/universities across India. The exam is scheduled between February 4 and 12.

After qualifyingGATE, candidates are required to come for CCMT Counselling.GATE cutoffs are released online, aspirants with score equal or above cutoff, become eligible for CCMT Counselling. faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur applications are available online. Candidates are required to register for GATE first to take admission in M.Tech programme. Below are the steps to follow to apply for M.Tech at NIT Durgapur:Step 1:Register for GATE by visiting the official website.Step 2:Fill out the application form.Step 3:Upload the required documents.Step 4:Pay the GATE application fee.Step 5:Submit the application form.

faqs.question: How hard it is to get into NIT Durgapur?
faqs.answer: NIT Durgapur admissions are based on national-level entrance exam score for most of the courses. The challenging part is qualifying the entrance exam. Candidates need JEE Main rank for BTech, GATE for M.Tech and IIT JAM for MSc admission. CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT scores are accepted for MBA admission. Aspirants must prepare well for the entrance exam to get admission in NIT Durgapur courses. BTech is one of the popular programme of NIT Durgapur. Looking at the past year cutoffs, a rank under 9,000 can get the candidates the specialisation of their choice.

placement_data.title: NIT Durgapur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NIT Durgapur placement cell coordinates with companies to manage placements, internships, and communication between recruiters and students efficiently. The highest package grabbed by NIT Durgapur students in 2025 was INR 80 LPA . NIT Durgapur average package received in 2025 was INR 12.61 LPA . The placement rate recorded during NIT Durgapur placements 2025 was 82%. In total, 589 job offers have been made. The institution welcomed more than 210 recruiters during the 2025 campus placement drive

description: NIT Durgapur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Durgapur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Durgapur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Durgapur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Durgapur CSE cutoff 2025 was 12268 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 18024 and 34291, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cuto

For the General AI category students, the NIT Durgapur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 12268 and 65181 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 12268 and 14996, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech, B.Sc. and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Durgapur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Durgapur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Durgapur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science with last round cutoff scores of 562 and 561, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 562. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 309 and 533 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Durgapur - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Durgapur CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Durgapur MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 293 and 1522. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 293 was M.Sc. in Applied Geology and Geoinformatics in the General AI category. This indicat

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 1522 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Applied Geology and Geoinformatics and , with last round closing ranks of and

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Durgapur admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

NIT Durgapur also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Durgapur can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Durgapur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Microelectronics and VLSI and AI and Data Analytics in Process Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

The institute has been ranked #49 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Engineering. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the NIT Durgapur rankings.

nirf.description:
NIT Durgapur has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for NIT Durgapur indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, NIT Durgapur fell 8 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, NIT Durgapur fell 5 ranks to #49 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

library.description: The library of NIT D is housed in a separate building having three floors with a collection of 1.2 lac volumes which includes text books, reference books & bound volumes of journals, standards etc. It has subscribed to about 180 current print journals and 800+ online journal. Library operations have been automated with the help of an integrated library software package, LIBSYS-4. The book database is accessible through OPAC. It has a good collection of Electronic resources in its Digital Library. It has some audio-visual equipment like Colour TVs, VCPs, video-camera, direct projectors, and Multimedia Projectors etc.It also facilitates wi-fi Internet and  well-equipped  with xerox facility.

reviews.review_heading: Highlights of the National Institute of Technology Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The academic infrastructure is strong with reliable labs and library access. Hostel life is manageable. Though food quality could be improved, the sports culture is vibrant, and a medical facility is provided. Basic support of the National Institute of Technology.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very satisfying and has good placements for all branches.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, it is not available in classrooms. There are AC classrooms. There is no problem with Airtel net, it is available in labs, classrooms, and hostel. 3 members per room. A large central library with thousands of volumes is available as a resource.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placement opportunities with support.
reviews.review_text: The ECE department has a well-equipped campus and a central library with a wide range of technical resources. The hostel provides 24/7 water and electricity, though the mess food is average. Medical assistance is available on campus, and student assistance is available on campus. Students have access to various sports and recreation facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with college faculty members and there are good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have no Wi-Fi in addition we have jammers to block the network. Labs are well-designed and maintained properly. Classrooms are really good with projectors including clear board, nice ventilation, and very comfortable. Library is also very good having many books.

reviews.review_heading: As in every college, there is something that you will not like, but you have to take.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained here at NIT Durgapur, I must say, all facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library, and more than what we expect. In my hostel, we got three-seater rooms, but they are spacious and you will definitely love your big room. Washrooms are also well maintained, they keep them clean on a regular basis. Water cooler on each floor, you will have both options for normal water and cold water. Mess food is good, seriously, I personally feel it is good, you can eat it...

reviews.review_heading: My college life and my 4 years.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure for my course is good. My course is Electrical Engineering, and the department is good. The lab infrastructure is also very good, and the hostel is very good. The mess food is good but very much. In my college, we have a sports complex which is good.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Durgapur College review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our department are good. We have Wi-Fi and the lab equipment is in great shape. Our classrooms are clean, spacious, and equipped with projectors. The library is huge with over 200,000 books. The medical and sports facilities are top-notch. The hostels are a bit old and not great for second-year students but they are okay for most others. The food in the mess which I will honestly rate a 2 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, vibrant campus life with strong extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: NIT Durgapur offers modern infrastructure with smart classrooms. Wi-Fi-enabled labs, a central computer center, and a library with print and digital resources. The campus is 187 acres with advanced research facilities like Utkarsh Bhawan. Hostels provide basic furniture, LAN/Wi-Fi, and common areas. Newer hostels are better maintained, while older ones need renovation. Mess food is average, but canteens provide variety. Medical facilities include a 24/7 health unit with doctors, an ambulance, an...

reviews.review_heading: NIT Durgapur has a really good infrastructure when compared to others, and a decent one.
reviews.review_text: Hostel Wi-Fi is decent enough, and so is the hostel. You have to clean and wash your clothes all by yourself, because they charge a lot of money, like literally a lot of money, if you want to give clothes for cleaning. Medical facilities are good, and so are the sports and games. Mess food is too average and not many options are available, actually.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good and vibrant college life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel at NIT Durgapur is well equipped with all facilities. Mess food is good and hygienic. Laundry service is available on campus. The institute offers excellent sports facilities. Catering to a variety of games and encouraging an active lifestyle. Which is certainly good, but I think you will face some problems in adjusting.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and worth to join.
reviews.review_text: We have no Wi-Fi, in addition, we have jammers to block the network. The labs are well-designed and maintained properly. The classrooms are really good with projectors included, a clean board, and nice air flow through windows, it is very comfortable. The library is also good with books. They got more books than any college after Githam.

reviews.review_heading: The tale of a student - Good infrastructure, average faculties, good placements, good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, I can say. Hostels, academic buildings, and labs are all fully air-conditioned and maintained, except for some of the labs, like the thermodynamics lab. Other core branch labs may not be that well-maintained, but the academic building is. Some classes in the main building don't have proper facilities. CS and hostels from the 3rd year are not so well maintained, but in the 1st and 2nd year, those are the best.

reviews.review_heading: The clear and complete review about 0 to 100 through this review.
reviews.review_text: Library contains maximum all type of books including course and exam syllabus related. Computer labs are newly constructed so they are in good condition. Wi-Fi is a non-wireless connection, and the speed is very good. Canteens are available around the college and inside the college too. The food is good but doesn't contain any spice or salt.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Durgapur honest review.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are moderate. Hostel food is average for the money taken. But Wi-Fi connection is excellent. Classrooms are provided with air conditioning. Course is good. But the time we get for the semesters is very less to study. Overall, the experience is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, place for knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities for M. Tech students are honestly pretty good. We have 24/7 Wi-Fi in the hostel. One thing I really like is that M. Tech students get single rooms. Having your own space makes a big difference, it's peaceful, you can study whenever you want, and you don't have to worry about disturbing anyone. The rooms are clean, reasonably spacious, and regularly maintained.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NIT Durgapur - National Institute of Technology

likes.text: Firms such as Wipro, TCS, IBM, Amazon, Axis Bank, Microsoft, Capgemini, Bajaj Auto, Larsen & Toubro, Cognizant, and other companies visited our college to hire students.
One of the best thing here is the students of other departments apart from computer science can take part in IT sectors company for placement.

likes.text: Our college has a centrally air-conditioned library, good labs, classrooms with modern technology, digital classrooms and high-speed internet facility.
Hostel buildings and rooms are well maintained and medical facilities are also good but the food in the mess is sometimes good and sometimes bad.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teachers of our department have good knowledge of the subjects and they are highly qualified and helpful.
The course curriculum is designed in such a way so that it caters the needs of today's professional environment and help the students to explore the depths of learning.

likes.text: I opted for this course, because I love engineering life and NIT Durgapur is an opportunity.
Many fests like technical fest, cultural fest, student fest, fresher party, teachers day, department fresher party, scientific seminar, etc., are organised at our college.

college_info.college_name: BIT Mesra: Courses, Admission 2026, Ranking, Cut off, Fees, Placements

highlights.summary:
Admission to various BIT Mesra campuses is now open for 2025. Interested candidates must secure the respective course brochure released on the official website of the Institute and apply for the admission process through the same.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Ranchi
- 22nd under the Architecture and Planning category - 51st under the Engineering category - 92nd under the University category

college_info.intro:
Among the different Birla Institute of Technology BIT Mesra courses a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the institute which are highly sought-after among students. This being the Birla Institute of Technology Mesra MBA and BTech.
BITS Mesra BTech graduates are placed in top companies such as Google, Microsoft, Adobe, etc. The students are taught advanced technology and fundamentals in the fields of Electronics and Communication and others with companies looking to hire Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Mesra Jharkhand, graduates for a range of Technical roles including Software Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts, Data Engineers, etc.
While Birla Institute of Technology Mesra MBA students are taught knowledge of the fundamentals of Management theory and its related application in problem-solving skills. The MBA BIT Mesra graduates are placed in more leadership oriented roles that the curriculum prepares them for.
Overall, BIT University Ranchi is one of the highest-ranked private universities in India. Below mentioned is more information around the Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Ranchi Jharkhand popular programme:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    The technology institute provides placement support to its students. Many top companies visit its campus for placements. As of now, a course-wise placement report is not available. As per a consolidated report, during the BIT Mesra placements 2023, a total of 982 job offers were made and 192 companies participated in the placements drive. Moreover, the highest and average package offered was INR 51 LPA and INR 11.57 LPA, respectively. Read about MCA Career Scope.
faqs.question: How are placements for MCA at BIT Mesra?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report, over 250 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered 1,080 jobs to the students of the 2025 batch.  The number of offers made  and companies during BIT Mesra placement 2025 are presented below:Particulars Placement Statistics (2025)Total offers1,080Total recruiters250+Companies visited185Note: Placement data of the years may vary slightly as the placement graphs available in the official website do not have data labels.
faqs.question: How many offers are made during BIT Mesra placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The list of top recruiters of BIT Mesra in recent past is presented in the below-mentioned table:BIT Mesra Top Recruiters ITC Tribeni Tissues DivisionNTPCLarsen & Toubro LtdTata Consulting Engineers Ltd.Crompton Greaves Ltd.Vedanta GroupExide IndustriesIOCLJaypee Rewa Cement LtdBPCL
faqs.question: Which top recruiters visit BIT Mesra during placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, there are internship programs at BIT Mesra. The key highlights of BIT Mesra internships 2025 are presented below:Particulars 6 months Duration (2025)12 months Duration (2025)Highest stipendINR 98,000 per monthINR 1.5 lakh per monthMean stipendINR 34,000 per monthINR 70,000 per monthMedian stipendINR 30,000 per monthINR 60,000 per month
faqs.question: Are there internship programs and connections with industry at BIT Mesra?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The Birla Institute of Technology Mesra is known for its courses extended across streams such as Architecture, Engineering, Management & Business Studies, etc. with its UG level courses including BTech, BArch, BPharm, etc. While for PG courses the Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Jharkhand is known for its MTech, MSc, MBA, and other programmes.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure includes multiple components like tuition fees, hostel fees, admission fees, security deposit, etc. Some of the fee components are also refundable. Further, some of the BIT Mesra MBA fee components along with the amount are mentioned in the following table:Fee ComponentsAmount (for 2 years)Tuition FeesINR 6 LakhHostel FeesINR 66,000 - INR 84,000One-time PaymentINR 27,500 - INR 30,000NOTE: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the cost for studying MBA at BIT Mesra?

faqs.answer: A:    BIT Mesra has a seat intake of 77 for the BSc in Mathematics and Computing programme. The seat allotment in this course is done based on JEE scores. In addition, 50% of the seats are reserved for candidates belonging to the state of Jharkhand and 50% for other state candidates. The mentioned seat intake is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How many seats does BIT Mesra have for integrated BSc in Mathematics and Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    The technology institute admits candidates to BTech courses based on merit in the JEE Main exam. There is no other provision for admission. Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores must also participate in the JoSAA counselling round for seat allotment. In case the seats are left vacant after JoSAA counselling, then those are filled through CSAB counselling. This is the only criteria for admission. Candidates can contact the BIT Mesra admission office to check for direct admissions.
faqs.question: Can I apply for BTech at BIT Mesra without JEE Main score?

faqs.answer: A:    There are multiple components included in the total BIT Mesra MSc fee such as tuition fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. Some amount of the fee may have to be paid for seat confirmation. The table given below mentions the fee for both MSc and integrated MSc courses:CourseTotal Tuition Fee*MScINR 2.48 Lacs - INR 3.32 lakhIntegrated MScINR 6.32 lakh*The fee is as per external sources. Hence, the actual amount may vary.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing campus, good placements, good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in Civil this year. The highest package was around 16 LPA, the median package was around 8 LPA, and the lowest package was around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies include IOCL, Deloitte, Accenture, Hindalco, TATA, etc. Top roles include structural engineer, project manager, and urban planner.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled (around 150 Mbps if you get a strong signal). The hostel Wi-Fi works well most of the time, but sometimes it goes down. The food varies hostel-wise. It is better than other colleges (you won't find insects and all in your food daily).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, hostel facility avg, placements are avg, and lush green campus.

review_content.Placements: The highest package last year, 2024, was 1.45 crores, and the average package was almost 11.5 LPA. Almost every company has different roles offered here at the college. The placements record of this year has not come out as per true strength, but it is expected that the placements are more or less the same as the previous year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels are good, but the water in the bathrooms is hard. The hair feels oily after a bath, and despite having a water purifying setup at Mesra, the drinking water is not up to that standard. The Wi-Fi here is not reliable. Sometimes it gets cut due to unnecessary reasons, and gaming on hostel Wi-Fi is restricted. You can't play any game here unless you find a solution. The food quality is decent.

college_info.college_name: BIT Mesra UG, PG, Doctorate Courses 2025

faqs.answer: The technology institute admits candidates to BTech courses based on merit in the JEE Main exam. There is no other provision for admission. Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores must also participate in the JoSAA counselling round for seat allotment. In case the seats are left vacant after JoSAA counselling, then those are filled through CSAB counselling. This is the only criteria for admission. Candidates can contact the BIT Mesra admission office to check for direct admissions.
faqs.question: Q: Can I apply for BTech at BIT Mesra without JEE Main score?

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

course_faqs.question: Is MCA available at BIT Mesra?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BIT Mesra offer a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) course in a full-time mode. The two-year course is divided into semester patterns (four semesters). It is offered by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering of BIT. Admission to the PG-level course is based on the BIT MCA 2023 exam conducted by the institute. Additionally, it is also necessary that the course aspirants meet the minimum eligibility criteria.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA from BIT Mesra worth it?
course_faqs.answer: BIT Mesra is ranked #90 in the NIRF 2024 rankings under the "Management" category. BIT Mesra MBA course-wise placements data is not available as of now. However, an overall report shows 192 companies visited its campus for the placements drive. The highest and average package offered stood at INR 51 LPA and INR 11.57 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters for the institute in the recent past have been companies like Vedanta Group, Crompton Greaves Ltd., NTPC, Exide Industries, etc.

course_faqs.question: Does BIT Mesra offer scholarship for MBA?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, the institute offers financial support to deserving candidates of INR 6,500 per month. It is available for only the candidates who are not availing of any other fellowships. The scholarship is further offered for the third and fourth semesters (only during the physical stay at the campus), completing the first two semesters without any backlog and securing CGPA greater than or equal to 8 in each semester. overview_faqs.question: Is BIT Mesra good for BTech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Birla Institute of Technology is good for BTech. As per the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2023, BIT Mesra was ranked 53rd position in Engineering. The highest and average package offered during the BIT Mesra placements 2023 as per a consolidated report was INR 51 LPA and INR 11.57 LPA, respectively. Talking about BIT Mesra placements 2022, the highest package offered was INR 58.33 LPA. BIT Mesra's average package stood at INR 13.01 LPA. Moreover, a rise of 96% was also recorded in the number of companies that visited in the 2022 placements drive in comparison with 2021. To read about Career after BTech, Click Here.

review_summary.college_name: BIT Mesra Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is well maintained, and the placements are good, with the average being 11–12 LPA

content.Placements: In my course at BIT Mesra, about 65–70 percent students get placed consistently, but from the past few years it has dropped slightly. The highest package is 19 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA, and an average of 7.5–8 LPA is common. There are many top companies like Google, Microsoft, and a lot of core companies which visit the campus consistently. 60 percent of students get internships in core companies and tech companies. Roles include site engineer, design engineer, quantity surveyor, trainee engineer, and roles in structural, geotechnical, transportation, and environmental engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Civil maatt lo CSE, mech, ECE, EEE are good options.

content.Placements: The students were placed, but the LPA was not worth it. We have a 4 LPA average in our branch, but according to the price, it is not worth it at all. On top of that, you have to pay such a hefty amount. Go for this branch only if you are interested in government exams or if you want a good NIRF ranking college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The campus is big and full of greenery, and it has good vibes in terms of nature. The buildings are also good, but the hostels and their Wi-Fi are not good, as Wi-Fi is down most of the time, due to which I recommend that you take a backup plan for Wi-Fi for yourself.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amazing campus, good placements, good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in Civil this year. The highest package was around 16 LPA, the median package was around 8 LPA, and the lowest package was around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies include IOCL, Deloitte, Accenture, Hindalco, TATA, etc. Top roles include structural engineer, project manager, and urban planner.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled (around 150 Mbps if you get a strong signal). The hostel Wi-Fi works well most of the time, but sometimes it goes down. The food varies hostel-wise. It is better than other colleges (you won't find insects and all in your food daily).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college, hostel facility avg, placements are avg, and lush green campus.

content.Placements: The highest package last year, 2024, was 1.45 crores, and the average package was almost 11.5 LPA. Almost every company has different roles offered here at the college. The placements record of this year has not come out as per true strength, but it is expected that the placements are more or less the same as the previous year.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are good, but the water in the bathrooms is hard. The hair feels oily after a bath, and despite having a water purifying setup at Mesra, the drinking water is not up to that standard. The Wi-Fi here is not reliable. Sometimes it gets cut due to unnecessary reasons, and gaming on hostel Wi-Fi is restricted. You can't play any game here unless you find a solution. The food quality is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Used to be good, but now it's doomed.

content.Placements: Nearly 60-80 percent of my courses were placed last year. The highest is 50 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is around 15 LPA. Oracle, Infosys, Texas Instruments, Intel, Microsoft, Google, Goldman Sachs, Atlassian, etc. The roles offered are SDE, hardware engineer, network engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is good, but is restricted to a limited number of sites. Labs aren't maintained regularly, and the classrooms are enough to accommodate, but not all the teachers are well-equipped to tech. The library is good, but the environment there isn't good. The hostel is just bad. The food is bad. The rooms that are meant to be for one person are currently given to two students.

The college accepts scores in JEE Main, JEE Advanced, GATE, CAT, NEET-UG, etc. BIT Mesra offers a list of courses at the UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university offers education in different stream, such as Management, Engineering, etc. Moreover, under many courses, there are multiple specialisations for students to choose from. Candidates seeking admission to any of the courses must fulfil the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria. Some of the popular courses of the institute are BTech, MBA, MCA, MSc, etc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

paragraphs: BIT Mesra course admissionsare done based on the scores of the aspirants in accepted entrance exams. The admission procedure is a multi-level process, which includes application form filling, selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. Below are the steps:
BITS Mesra Application Process 2026

The application process for all courses at BITS Mesra is conducted out in online mode. Candidates can apply through the institute's official website for the desired course. Further, aspirants shall ensure that they submit their application within the deadline.
BITS Mesra Selection Process 2026
Depending upon the applied course, candidates are required to appear for the respective entrance exam, Writing Ability Test, and personal interview round.
Release of Merit List
The results of the selection rounds are published in the form of a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted candidates further have to appear for WAT-PI rounds.
Document Verification & Admission Fee Payment

Selected candidates have to pay the prescribed admission fee to confirm their admission. Further, aspirants also have to submit all the important documents for verification before the commencement of classes.

faqs.question: How to take admission in BIT Mesra for BTech?

courses_data.name: BIT Mesra MCA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: BIT Mesra admit candidates to its MCA programme on the basis of merit in the BIT MCA exam. The duration of this PG course is two years and it is divided into semester patterns. Candidates seeking admission to this course must hold a valid BCA/ BSc degree in Computer Science/Application/IT with at least 55% aggregate (50% for SC/ST/PwD). The tuition fees form MCA is INR 5.3 lakh.

faqs.question: How many seats are there in MCA at BIT Mesra?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake is 60 for the MCA course in BIT Mesra. This seat count is as per external sources. Hence, is subject to changes. Moreover, BIT Mesra also follows the seat reservation policy suggested by the government. Thus, some of the seats in the course can be reserved for a few categories such as SC/ST, etc. Aspirants are advised to visit the institute website (bitmesra.ac.in) for more details regarding the seat intake and allotment procedure. Read aboutMCA Career Scope.

faqs.question: How costly is BIT Mesra for MCA?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MCA isINR 5.3 lakh. The total Birla Institute of Technology Mesra MCA fees is cumulative of various components such as tuition fee, hostel fees, electricity and transport, admission fee, caution money (Refundable), etc. Some of the fee components along with the amount are mentioned in the table given below:NOTE:The mentioned fee is as per the data curated from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for admission to BIT Mesra MCA course?
faqs.answer: Admission toBIT Mesra MCA courseis entrance-based. Admission to the PG-level programme is based on candidates score in BIT MCA exam conducted by the institute. The candidates are shortlisted based exam score. In addition, it is also necessary that the course aspirants meet the course-specific minimum eligibility criteria. The institute has the right to cancel the admission of the candidate who are found to be ineligible for the course.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at BIT Mesra?
faqs.answer: BIT Mesra admissionsare based on entrance exams. The steps pf admission rocess of BIT Mesra are given below:The application process for all courses at BITS Mesra is conducted out in online mode. Candidates can apply through the institute's official website for the desired course.Depending upon the applied course, candidates are required to appear for the respective entrance exam, Writing Ability Test, and personal interview round.The results of the selection rounds are published in the form of a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted candidates further have to appear for WAT-PI rounds.Selected candidates have to pay the prescribed admission fee to confirm their admission.

placement_report.college_name: BIT Mesra Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: BIT Mesra Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: BIT Mesra concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during BIT Mesra placements in 2025 stood at INR 145 LPA and INR 11.77 LPA , respectively. Furthermore, 250 recruiters participated in the 2025 placements and offered 1,080 jobs to the 2025 batch students . The recruiters were from the Consulting, Financial and Technology domain. The name of few top recruiters are Amdocs, KPMG, Cipla, L&T, EXL Services, Microsoft, Nestle, etc.
The highest package offered to MBA batch 2025 was INR 20 LPA. Marketing and HR was the top recruiting domain with 65% offers made.
Download: BIT Mesra Placement Report 2025

faqs.question: How much is the course fee for BIT MESRA MBA?
faqs.answer: BIT MESRA MBA course is a full-time course for the duration 2 years . Admission to this PG-level course is based on entrance and candidates are shortlisted based on accepted entrance exam scores and are further invited for GD and PI . The candidates need to pay the fee for the respective BIT Mesra courses for the seat confirmation. There are multiple components included in the fee structure, such as hostel fees, tuition fees, caution deposits, etc. BIT MESRA offers MBA with a fee structure consisting of tuition fees as INR 6 Lakh , hostel fee as INR 84 K and one-time payment of INR 27.70 K . The Institute conducts an annual intake of 220 students .

faqs.question: How much is the course fee for BIT MESRA MBA?
faqs.answer: BIT MESRA MBA course is a full-time course for the duration 2 years . Admission to this PG-level course is based on entrance and candidates are shortlisted based on accepted entrance exam scores and are further invited for GD and PI . The candidates need to pay the fee for the respective BIT Mesra courses for the seat confirmation. There are multiple components included in the fee structure, such as hostel fees, tuition fees, caution deposits, etc. BIT MESRA offers MBA with a fee structure consisting of tuition fees as INR 6 Lakh , hostel fee as INR 84 K and one-time payment of INR 27.70 K . The Institute conducts an annual intake of 220 students .

In the last round, the BIT Mesra CSE cutoff 2025 was 23596 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 37550 and 67961, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff ran

For the General AI category students, the BIT Mesra B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 23596 and 174123 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 23596 and 27324, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech, B.Sc. and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, BIT Mesra outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the BIT Mesra's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, BIT Mesra's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, BIT Mesra fell 10 ranks to #92 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The 'Engineering' category rankings of the institute have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, BIT Mesra fell 3 ranks to #51 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, BIT Mesra fell 7 ranks to #97 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel.description: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra is completely residential with eleven hostels for boys and three separate ones for girls. All student lodging houses are spacious and beautifully laid out amidst a lot greenery. Each male-student is provided with well-furnished single-accommodation while girls share their accommodation in spacious and adequately furnished rooms. Individual rooms are constructed in a row with a wide veranda for common use running along the length of passage. Common facilities at the hostel include dining halls and common rooms with provision for several indoor games. The reading room in each hostel subscribes to a large number of magazines, periodicals and newspapers. The entertainment hall in each hostel has a color television set. Each hostel has an independent mess, completely run and managed by the students themselves. The hostels are a hub of leisure activities. Students are encouraged to pursue a wide range of extra curricular activities and hobbies in their free time and events both entertaining and competitive are arranged quite frequently. Inter-hostel tournaments of indoor and outdoor games, quizzes, competitions and adventure trips are very popular at BIT Mesra. The 'Hostel Night' organized by resident students is a memorable yearly event where students interact with the faculty members amidst cultural programmes and a lot of fun in a shared mood of festivity.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is well maintained, and the placements are good, with the average being 11–12 LPA
reviews.review_text: Many equipment in the labs are damaged but still being used. The Wi-Fi connection is very good, giving a high-speed network of up to 100 Mbps. The library is quite disappointing as books are in bad condition and there are not enough facilities, and there is no AC in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Civil maatt lo CSE, mech, ECE, EEE are good options.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The campus is big and full of greenery, and it has good vibes in terms of nature. The buildings are also good, but the hostels and their Wi-Fi are not good, as Wi-Fi is down most of the time, due to which I recommend that you take a backup plan for Wi-Fi for yourself.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing campus, good placements, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled (around 150 Mbps if you get a strong signal). The hostel Wi-Fi works well most of the time, but sometimes it goes down. The food varies hostel-wise. It is better than other colleges (you won't find insects and all in your food daily).

reviews.review_heading: Good college, hostel facility avg, placements are avg, and lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good, but the water in the bathrooms is hard. The hair feels oily after a bath, and despite having a water purifying setup at Mesra, the drinking water is not up to that standard. The Wi-Fi here is not reliable. Sometimes it gets cut due to unnecessary reasons, and gaming on hostel Wi-Fi is restricted. You can't play any game here unless you find a solution. The food quality is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Used to be good, but now it's doomed.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is good, but is restricted to a limited number of sites. Labs aren't maintained regularly, and the classrooms are enough to accommodate, but not all the teachers are well-equipped to tech. The library is good, but the environment there isn't good. The hostel is just bad. The food is bad. The rooms that are meant to be for one person are currently given to two students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but only recommend for branches like CSE and AIML.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but there are some restrictions, like the game website is blocked, and the mess food is average, like in a week they give 4-5 good meals. The hostel room is quite small, not for 2 people. The classroom is good with proper projectors. Free medical facilities are also available sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good Wi-Fi connection inside the campus, like in the hostel, classrooms, and labs. The classrooms are very clean, with AC, projectors, and well-ventilated. The labs are also good. We have a lab for every course. The hostels are neat and clean. Every day, the hostels are cleaned and the washrooms also, but the hostel rooms are to be cleaned by the students after that particular room.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with above average placement for both circuit and non-circuit branches.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi inside the campus is good, high-speed, but it fluctuates a lot, sometimes it gives 150 mbps and other times it goes down to kbps, so it's unpredictable. Labs have all the required equipment available, some equipment does need changes, and it is either broken or old, but overall, it's good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in CSE are good, but for ECE, they are the worst. Good coding culture in college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are very small. In the first year, hostel rooms are still big, but from the second year, their size is very small. In a room, 2 students are present, which is something that I don't like about this college. There are also some three-sharing rooms in the hostel, and they are pretty good, but only a few students get them. Wi-Fi is average, like those students whose rooms are in the corners of the hostel didn't get much access to Wi-Fi. Classrooms are 10/10, like they are very good. La...

reviews.review_heading: A very good college but you have to spend 10 lakhs in 2 years.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The library is good, it is having large number of books. Labs are spacious and have all the apparatus used in industry. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Boys hostel is 4 to 5 km away from the college. Mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and value for money.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are as follows: 5G Wi-Fi available 24/7, classroom projectors with centralized air conditioning, a very large library with all types of books available, hostel mess food above average, and night canteen available in each hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend Birla Institute of Technology Mesra.
reviews.review_text: The food menu is decided by the student body living in that. Home-like food in some hostels, like H5, is great. Any problem, we have Dean sir, for student affairs. If anyone is behaving rudely, you can talk to sir, and you do not need any other proof.

reviews.review_heading: Placement varies every year. Infrastructure and environment are good. Faculty depends on the course.
reviews.review_text: Management is questionable but the infrastructure is quite good. Hostel rooms are kind of small for two students but you will get used to them in no time. The Wi-Fi is available all around the campus so its a plus point. Sports facilities are decent. Dispensary provide free medicine.

reviews.review_heading: I am neither dissatisfied nor satisfied, but happy with what I got.
reviews.review_text: The campus is big, but it has great potential to be one of the greatest campuses in India. Many places on the campus are only trees, and all that's good because the AQI is good on the campus. Still, there are places where much infrastructure can be built.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for circuit courses in B.Tech and for mechanical engineering only.
reviews.review_text: The library, playgrounds, and classrooms are good with AC and smartboards. Hostels aren't that good, with quite small rooms, but we would adjust. Food in the mess is okay, and Wi-Fi is decent. Labs are all well-equipped, and we won't face any problem regarding that. Apart from that, the campus is very beautiful and pollution-free with a lot of trees.

data.description: Birla Institute of Technology - Mesra has experienced faculty members with years of experience. BIT Mesra faculty are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. Below-mentioned are Birla Institute of Technology - Mesra faculty details:

likes.text: Companies like Infosys, Cognizant, TCS, Microsoft, Amdocs, Infineon, IFB, Intel, Goldman Sachs, Verizon, etc., visited our campus for placements.
The placement is very well in this year as most of the student is getting placed in reputed organisation like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Bandhan Bank, Affine analytics etc.

likes.text: The college has its own sports complex with grounds and courts for almost every sport like cricket, basketball, football, volleyball, badminton, discus throw, shot-put, etc.
The college facilities like the library, hospital (dispensary), security, labs & classrooms are all well-furnished and satisfying.
The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is good compared to that of other colleges.

likes.text: Some faculty members are exceptionally good and helpful with your doubts, while a few faculty members just concentrate on finishing the syllabus.
We have well trained and knowledgeable faculty on hand to guide every student in his/ her endeavours.
The curriculum is apt and well-organised to help you build up your skill and advance up your knowledge to robust you at the time of placements and internships.

college_info.intro:
BTech in Applied Petroleum Engineering with specialisations in Energy Systems and Storage, Intelligent Petroleum Systems & Gas Engineering Informatics is a flagship course offered at UPES Kandoli campus. It is a comprehensive four-year course that equips students with a solid understanding of the oil and gas industry.
For this programme, UPES University Dehradun has international academic collaborations with prestigious universities such as the University of New South Wales and University of Aberdeen.
Did you know? UPES Dehradun claims to have a 100% placement record with top employers such as Schlumberger, Exxon Mobil, Shell, Haliburton, Cairn Energy and Reliance Industries Limited.
Check out the video below to know more about UPES programmes:

faqs.question: What is the average placement of CSE in UPES?

faqs.answer: A:    M.Tech jobs at UPES School of Advanced Engineering have an extremely impressive placement rate of upto 96.55% for 2021-22. The highest CTC offered was 33 LPA and the average salary was 7.02 LPA. Some of the top recruiters include Airbus, Boeing, Deloitte USI, Ernst & Young, KPMG, PwC, LTI-Larsen & Toubro InfoTech Ltd, Wipro Limited, etc. They are not only providing good placements for M.Tech students but also proved it's records for good placements in all the courses in UPES
faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Placements at UPES Dehradun are good. The highest and top 10% average package offered during School of Computer Science placement 2025 was 52 LPA and 42 LPA. The highest package in School of Business was 29 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the placement record of UPES Dehradun?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: In addition to its flagship BTech programme, UPES Dehradun also offers BSc, BBA, BPharm, BDes and BCom, and more at the undergraduate level. At the Postgraduate level, MBA, MCA, MSc, MTech, MA, and MDes programmes are offered. UPES University Dehradun courses are offered in full-time and online mode under streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, and more. Below are some of the courses offered by UPES Kandoli and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    UPES offers an MBA programme at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at University of Petroleum in Dehradun ranges between INR 16.7 Lacs and INR 19.5 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of MBA at UPES?

faqs.answer: A:    UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.
faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation. You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college can improve on the placement records.

review_content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

review_content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

faqs.answer: UPES offers a two-year full-time MBA course covering multiple specialisation. In 2025, the MBA highest package recorded was INR 29 LPA. Top 10% MBA students received average package of INR 15.8 LPA. The tuition fees of this course is between INR 16.7 L and 19.5 L, so the ROI looks promsing. Considering the fees and the placements, it is worth persuing an MBA degree from UPES.
faqs.question: Q: Is UPES a good college for MBA?

faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, UPES Dehradun offers four to five-year BE/B.Tech, three to four-year BBA B.Sc. B.Com B.A. And various other courses to students. Yes, UPES Dehradun is good for B.Tech Computer Science. The university is ranked 54 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2023. Engineering students are offered good placement opportunities by market leaders. Also, the university provides scholarships to Engineering and various other course students.

faqs.answer: UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.
