course_faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
course_faqs.answer: Students must pay the fees within the stipulated time frame to secure their admission into the course. The fee can be paid online or offline through various modes of payment such as credit/debit card, net banking, or demand draft. The fees can cost about three to 6 lakhs. It also depends on the stream of majors chosen by the candidate. There are also additional fees. On the other hand, the college also provides various scholarships for the students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA in UPES University Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: Total tuition fee for BBA ranges between INR 1.5 Lacs and INR 14 Lacs as per unofficial source. The fee excludes other fee components like caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Aspirants are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. Selection to BBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like UPESMET UG, UGAT or CUET UG followed by a personal interview round. For admission to Global BBA, candidates need to qualify PI round and submit Statement of Purpose. If a student is unable to pay fee within given time, his or her admission will be cancelled. Students also need to pay registration fee through online mode to apply for admission. The application fee for UPESMET UG is INR 1,350.

overview_faqs.question: How do I check the refund policy of UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun offers has a fee refund policy. Students can go to its portal to check the same. To access the portal, candidates are required to visit the official website of university and click on fee refund policy. Here, candidates are required to enter the application number to get refund policy.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules at UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: In UPES Dehradun, fees once paid will be fully refunded, with a deduction of INR 1,000 for processing charges if a withdrawal request is made before the session starts. In case a withdrawal application is made after the commencement of classes, fees will be refunded after a deduction along with a deduction of INR 1000 towards processing charges. The fee shall be refunded within 90 days of the start of the academic session if the refund application is submitted before the start of the session.

overview_faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, UPES Dehradun offers four to five-year BE/B.Tech, three to four-year BBA B.Sc. B.Com B.A. And various other courses to students. Yes, UPES Dehradun is good for B.Tech Computer Science. The university is ranked 54 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2023. Engineering students are offered good placement opportunities by market leaders. Also, the university provides scholarships to Engineering and various other course students.

review_summary.college_name: UPES Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Intelligent Petroleum Systems) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.

content.Placements: About 95 percent of students are placed in the year 2025, the highest package is about 35 LPA, the average is about 11 LPA, and the top recruiters for our branch are Cairn Oil & Gas, Vedanta Ltd, ONGC, Adani Gas, HP, Oil India Limited, GAIL, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and support.

content.Placements: 99% are placed. 6 LPA is the lowest package, and 33 LPA is the highest, but placement records are good, and everyone is getting placements somewhere else, and students are also supportive. Zepto, blinkit, EY, KPMG ITC, Indigo, Aadani Airpot, ONGC and all are recruiting. 100% got internships. Manager and Consulting roles are offered. placements are also good.
content.Infrastructure: Everything has Wi-Fi, a good connection, good college life and a view. Hostel life is amazing and has to be seen, and the night view and jamming sessions are the point of attraction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college can improve on the placement records.

content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Energy Systems and Storage) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: So basically, if you are willing to have good placements and be successful.

content.Placements: So basically, in my course, the strength of the students is not that much, which means the competition criteria is not very high, resulting in good placements. I'm currently in batch 1, and the total batches in my passing stream are 3. The eligibility criteria to sit for placements is 8+ CGPA, which every student should have for their own benefit. The highest package in my college is recorded as 50 LPA, which is recently offered in 2024, whereas the average top package is 17 LPA, which I think is good for a beginner.
content.Infrastructure: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

admission_overview.title: UPES Dehradun Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: UPES Dehradun admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. The university provides more than twenty programmes at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. These are offered in fields, such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, Design, Law, Computer Applications, Commerce, and Arts. The modes of study can be full-time or online, depending on the course. UPES Dehradun conducts its entrance exams, such as UPESMET UG, UPESEAT, etc., for admission to some specific courses including BTech, MBA, BBA, etc. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, CUET UG & PG, etc as an alternative. The admission mode differs by course with details in the eligibility table given below. Interested students can read this article to get all the details on UPES admissions.

paragraphs: UPES Dehradunadmission processincludes from application process, selection rounds and final admission confirmation. Students should go through all these steps to get seat at university. Admission is done online.UPES admission processis mentioned below:
UPES Dehradun Application Process 2026
Students can register and apply at the university's website. To complete the process, students need to submit the form, pay an application fees of INR 1750 and uplaod the necessary documents.
Application Screening & Shortlisting 2026
Admission Confirmation 2026

After the interview rounds, the institution will notify the selected candidates of their admission status, typically through email or other appropriate means. To secure their admission, selected candidates must complete the required admission formalities and submit the necessary documents within the specified time, confirming their seat in the programme and pay for a certain amount of UPES Dehradun fees for the respective courses.
For details about UPES Admission Process check the below video:
lists: Following the submission of applications, candidates undergo a screening process. The screening involves assessing eligibility and selection criteria. Applicants are shortlisted based on their academic performance and other relevant qualifications, as specified in the eligibility.

UPES Dehradun conducts its entrance exams likeUPESPAT, UPESMET UG, UPESEAT,UPESMETfor BPharma, BBA, BTech, and MBA respectively. The university also acceptsJEE Main, CAT, NEET, SAT India, CUET, etc.as per the course requirements.
The final stage of selection involves a personal interview to assess the candidate's suitability, aspirations, and alignment with the desired course.

faqs.question: How to get seat in UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students can check below the steps to get a seat at UPES Dehradun:Log on to the official website.Complete your application form online.The selection criteria is entrance/merit-based.Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is conducted by UPES?
faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun conducts its own entrance exams, such as UPESMET, UPESMET UG, UPESPAT, etc. for providing admission to specific courses. See the table below to know more about the university-level exams conducted for popular UPES courses:Course NameIn-house ExamsMBAUPESMETBTech/ BTech (Hons)UPESEATBBAUPESMET UGBPharmaUPESPAT

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: To get admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES candidates might have to complete multi-step process. Check below the admission steps for UPES:Application:The mode of application is online. The application fee for BTech, BPharma, MSc, and BSc is  INR 1,350 each.Selection rounds:The university conducts its own entrance exams for providing admission to specific courses. Apart from these, UPES Dehradun also accepts national-level entrance exams like CUET UG, NEET, JEE Main, etc.Admission confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation.You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

placement_data.title: UPES Dehradun Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: UPES Dehradun placement 2025 are ongoing. The UPES placement rate recorded in 2025 so far is 92%. The overall highest package offered in 2025 till date was INR 52 LPA . It was offered to BTech students from the School of Computer Science . The highest salary recorded in School of Advance Engineering and School of Business was 27.6 LPA and 29 LPA. Highest package of 11.7 LPA and 22.5 LPA was offered to students of School of Design and School of Law . Highest salary in the School of Health Sciences & Technology and School of Liberal Studies and Media was 6 LPA and 5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the placement statistics of UPES Dehradun and what are its best fields?
faqs.answer: 2444 students were placed and 800 companies visited during UPES placement 2025. The highest package recorded was 52 LPA. Earlier in 2024, the highest package was 49 LPA. The placement rate in 2025 was above 90%.

faqs.question: How many students were placed during UPES Dehradun placements in the past few years?
faqs.answer: A total of 2444 students were placed in 2025. Earlier, 2482 students were placed durin the placement drive 2024. The placement rate recorded in 2025 and 2024 was 92% and 92.41%.

faqs.question: What are the school-wise highest package offered at UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The school-wise highest package offered during UPES Dehradun placements 2025 is yet to be released. Meanwhile, students can have a look at the 2024 placement statistics presented below: School Highest Package (2024) School of Advanced Engineering INR 27.6 LPA (overall) INR 27.6 LPA (BTech) School of Computer Science INR 52 LPA (BTech CSE) School of Business INR 29 LPA (MBA) INR 12.3 LPA (BBA) School of Design INR 11.7 LPA School of Law INR 22.5 LPA School of Health Sciences &Technology INR 6 LPA School of Liberal Studies INR 5 LPA

faqs.question: How are the placements at UPES School of Law?
faqs.answer: UPES School of Law offers decent placements annually to its BA LLB, LLB and LLM students. The highest salary secured by the students of the batch 2025 was INR 22.5 LPA. The average salary secured by the top 10% of the Law batch 2025 was INR 8.9 LPA. The name of the top recruiters include Eaton, Factum Legal, Pramata, HCL, Sterlite Power, etc.

faqs.question: How good is UPES Dehradun for MBA placements?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of UPES Dehradun. When it comes to placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest package offered during UPES MBA placements 2025 stood at INR 29 LPA. The top 10% UPES MBA average package offered during UPES placements 2025 stood was 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for MBA at UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Some of the eminent companies that were part of the recent UPES Dehradun placements are mentioned in the table below: UPES Dehradun Top Recruiters Schlumberger Amazon Adobe Microsoft ONGC Deloitte KPMG EY PwC

faqs.question: What is the application fee for UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students seeking for UPES Dehradun engineering admissions have to register for UPESEAT. The application fee for the same is INR 1750. Students can pay the fee online through net banking/ UPI/ Credit Card/ Debit Card. Note: The fee is taken from offiical sources and can change.

faqs.question: What is the average placement of CSE in UPES?
faqs.answer: The top 10% BTech students from School of Computer Science received average package of 42 LPA in 2025. Earlier, the top 10% UPES Dehradun average package offered to the BTech CSE batch 2024 of the School of Computer Science stood at INR 17.69 LPA. The key highlights of the School of Computer Science placements for the Class of 2024 are presented below: School Average Package (2024) Highest Package (2024) School of Computer Science INR 8.41 LPA (overall) INR 8.59 LPA (BTech CSE) INR 17.46 LPA (top 10% overall) INR 17.69 LPA (top 10% BTech CSE) INR 50.09 LPA (overall) INR 50.09 LPA (BTech CSE)
tables: INR 8.41 LPA (overall) INR 8.59 LPA (BTech CSE) INR 17.46 LPA (top 10% overall) INR 17.69 LPA (top 10% BTech CSE)

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during the recent UPES Dehradun placements?
faqs.answer: The 2025 overall average salary details have not been disclosed. UPES Dehradun average package in 2024 was INR 7.02 LPA. The top 10% UPES Dehradun average package offered to the BTech CSE batch 2024 of the School of Computer Science stood at INR 17.69 LPA. The average package varies school-wise. UPES School of Advanced Engineering overall average package was INR 7.02 LPA . While in the School of Business, the overall and MBA average package was INR 6.47 LPA and INR 7.69 LPA, respectively

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
faqs.answer: M.Tech jobs at UPES School of Advanced Engineering have an extremely impressive placement rate of upto 96.55% for 2021-22. The highest CTC offered was 33 LPA and the average salary was 7.02 LPA. Some of the top recruiters include Airbus, Boeing, Deloitte USI, Ernst & Young, KPMG, PwC, LTI-Larsen & Toubro InfoTech Ltd, Wipro Limited, etc. They are not only providing good placements for M.Tech students but also proved it's records for good placements in all the courses in UPES

faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.

description: UPES Dehradun cutoff 2025 for admission to the MBA programme is determined by candidates' performance in the national-level management entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, and GMAT. In the meantime, students can refer to the sections below to view the UPES Dehradun cutoff 2024 for different exams, courses, and categories.

Students can refer to the table below to know the UPES Dehradun MBA cutoff based on the NMAT score and MAT percentile. Students can refer to the tables below for the cutoff date for the year 2024, and previous two years, i.e., 2023 and 2022 for various MBA specialisations.

As per UPES Dehradun cut off 2024 for MBA, the minimum NMAT cutoff score is 140. Also, taking into consideration XAT cutoff for MBA in Operations Management, candidates must have an overall percentile of 50 for General All India category students. In 2024, the cutoff for all MBA specialisations for the MAT exam is 70 for the General AI quota. On analysing the two years, we can say that there has been no change in the cutoff trends.

Students who want admission to UPES, Dehradun for its MBA course, should keep track of the important dates related to national-level entrance exams, like NMAT, XAT, etc. To help with the same, the table below contains the important dates for admission at UPES, Dehradun.

highlights.description:
UPES is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #64 in the Overall category, #45 under University, #43 under Engineering, #36 under Management, and #18 under Law. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #801-850 to UPES. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in UPES rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, UPES has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, UPES fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 1 rank to #45 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UPES fell 1 rank to #43 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 5 ranks to #36 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
The ranking from Outlook reveals that UPES holds a higher position than many other institutes, showing that the institute is performing well across various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. It has been observed that in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, UPES fell 8 ranks to #34 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook ranking. UPES ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Candidates can refer to the table below for a detailed overview of the UPES ranks by Outlook 2023:
Read less

qs_world.description:
UPES has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UPES fell 100 ranks to #901 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UPES fell 15 ranks to #163 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, UPES fell 3 ranks to #24 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

hostel.description: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies has separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have wi fi facility for learning.Common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and 24*7 power back up and solar power water heaters facility is available.The hostels have mess facility.Air conditioned hostels are also available. UPES has also tied up with private hostels for girls students in the city to offer appropriate accommodation outside the campus. All accommodation is on a triple sharing basis.
facilities: Library: UPES library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings, and more than 150 national and international journals. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialised portals on oil and gas and power-related information

Hotels: UPES has a separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at the Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have a Wi-Fi facility for learning. A common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and a 24*7 power backup and solar power water heaters facility is available

Cafeteria: The university has a multi-storied food court within the campus, has a number of food courts and cafeterias with a modern ambiance to provide nutritious and balanced meals, snacks, and beverages to students of both campuses
Sports Complex: UPES has a multipurpose playground for playing hockey, cricket, football, and other sports with world-class sports facilities and equipment

library.description: UPES’s library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings and more than 150 National and International journals in the fields of petroleum exploration, power, infrastructure, chemical, computer, electrical, electronic and mechanical engineering, information technology and management, etc. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialized portals on oil and gas and power related information. UPES has also acquired institutional memberships of the British Council Library, the American Centre Library, the AIMA Library, the Central Secretariat library and DELNET, IIP, WIHG Dehradun. As a part of collaboration IFP,France has gifted a large no. of books and Shell, a global oil major has also gifted a large number of technical books to the library.

faqs.answer: SIMATS Chennai admission process is based on both entrance test and merit list set by the university. To apply for UG courses, candidates must have atleast passed Class 12 or equivalent exam from a recognised board with 50% aggregate. For admission to UG courses, candidates must appear NEET-UG exam conducted by NTA. Admission to MBBS, BTech, MBA, M.Tech courses is done on the basis of NEET-UG, TNEA, TANCET, GATE exams respectively.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in Saveetha Medical College?

faqs.answer: The cut-off list date varies depending on the type of entrance exam and the programme. The cut-off will be released after the results of the entrance exams. For example. for B.Tech it is TNEA, For MBA it is TANCET, For M.Sc it is NEET-SS or NEET MDS.The cut-off will be released course-wise after the release of the entrance exam results.
faqs.question: Q: When will Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences cutoff list release?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can join SIMATS without TANCET, but you will need CAT/MAT/CMAT or any other valid score to join MBA. You cannot join MBA without entrance exams. You must register for the TANCET exam and submit an application to colleges in Tamil Nadu that recognize TANCET scores for MBA admission if you want to pursue an MBA. Alternatively, you might apply to CAT/MAT programs and pursue MBA admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences a good college for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The main focus of SIMATS is its engineering, dental, and medical programs. The MBA programme is not as well-known or reputable as its other programs, despite that fact. Following are the points you can keep in mind before admission to MBA at SIMATS. AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) has granted SIMATS accreditation, and the university Saveetha is associated with it. Nevertheless, it lacks international accreditations that MBA candidates frequently pursue, like as AACSB or EQUIS. Rankings: According to well-known journals like Business Today, The Week, and Economic Times, SIMATS does not rank among the best MBA programs in India.SIMATS might offer a respectable MBA education, but if you're searching for a top MBA programme with good placement rates, strong industry contacts, and a global reputation, it might not be the ideal option.

overview_faqs.question: Does Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Several salient features of Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences' return policy are: The majority of the institute's programs, including MBBS, BDS, B.Tech, and others, have clear return policies. After deducting administrative fees, funds are reimbursed to students who opt to withdraw their acceptance prior to the final day of admission. Usually, 1-2 weeks after classes begin, the deadline for admissions is reached. The following guidelines will apply to refunds in the event that a student departs after the final admissions date: Refundable 75% of fees if departure occurs within 30 days before the deadline (registration expenses excluded). Refundable 50% of fees if departure occurs within 30 to 90 days. If you depart after the final admittance date, you won't get a refund. A refund application must be completed.

review_summary.college_name: SIMTS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mirror of my college life, thought.

content.Placements: Compared to CSE, ECE students are getting more placements. Lowest package is about 3 LPA. Top recruit companies are Amazon, CTS, TCS. Roles offered are like developed, etc., coming to the internship, we want to search for the internship, but college will assist.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was too good. Classes were also nice. Wi-Fi is also available. Library is too good. Basically, I am not a hostel student. I don't know about the hostel, but the college classroom and library were nice. Blindly, we can give 5-star ratings for that.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Saveetha Institute has good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: My college has good placements. More than 95% of students get placed per year. Top companies like Amazon, Hyundai, TCS, etc., hire more students from our college every year. This year a girl from the CSE-AI department has been placed with the highest package of 44 LPA in Amazon. The average package ranges from 5-6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college is its infrastructure. I guarantee that my college has one of the best infrastructure and it may take us at least 3 months to discover all of them one by one between my college hostel and amenities are good. There is no need to worry about food as there are more than 60 canteens in my college. We will have the best campus life here in Saveetha. There are medical facilities (we never need to worry as the campus has the best hospital within SMC). It also has sports or other activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with studies. It provides really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of the students are placed already in my passing year that is this year. The highest package offered is like 30 LPA, and the lowest is gonna be 3 LPA to 4 LPA, maybe there will be a difference of 6 LPA. There are companies like HCL and TCS.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college especially with some faculty members.

content.Placements: I am Bhargav from Saveetha College of Physiotherapy at this course, there are only less seats (100), and to join this college for the above course, one has to attend the entrance exam and the score has to be above 60. There is no package for physiotherapy, it is based upon the way and talent and most of the students will work in a hospital. It is an internship 95% of students will get internships. In this college, 6-month internships are there.
content.Infrastructure: Basically, infrastructure is awesome and there are more facilities available in the classrooms. Also, free Wi-Fi library is always open till 7.00 PM, and hostels are two types AC/non-AC. There is only canteen for hostellers they will not provide food, we have to buy from the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Pharm - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is awesome and done your admission for 2025 shine your life and knowledge in academics.

content.Placements: My batch contains a total of 100 students. The top recruiting companies for my course, based on students' skills, are Pfizer, Apex, Cipla, and Sun Pharma. I am a final-year student, and we are getting internships at Sai Miran, Apex, etc. Some of roles offered include drug inspector, government pharmacist, medical representative, analyst, chemist, and positions in research and development.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very well and looks so impressive. It has contains appropriate labs for students for practical sessions and classrooms for theory classes. Wi-Fi facility and a library with a wide range of standard books are also available. Our college hostel offers many facilities, like good food served three times per day in a full hygienic way. There is a separate canteen for each department, and medical facilities are available for students. Many sports and game competitions are also available for all hostel and day scholar students.

admission_overview.college_name: SIMTS Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: SIMATS Chennai admission process 2025are decided on both merit and entrance basis. SIMATS accepts theNEET examfor admission tomedical science courses. All admissions granted by SIMATS Chennai are provisional in nature. The confirmation of admissions for SIMATS, Chennai is done by theAnna University/ Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai to which, the institute is affiliated.

Also known asSaveetha University,SIMATS, Chennai offers various courses at UG, PG, and PhD levels across the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Law, Nursing, Medical, and Management. The scores obtained in the NEET-UG, GATE, TANCET and TNEA entrance exams are used to decide the Saveetha Universityadmissions to theMBBS, BTech, MBA, and MTech courses respectively.

SIMATS Chennai delivers education through 16 schools specialised in different fields. Some of these are Dental College,Saveetha Engineering College, Medical College, and School of Law. It offers more than 40 programmes in various streams. It is popular for offeringmedical and science coursesto students. The university also offers 3 UG courses inHospitality Management. Check out theSIMATSChennai admission 2025details below:

SIMATS Chennai fees include multiple componentstuition fee,admission feeetc. The MBBS tuition fee is INR 25.25 lakh per year.

Coming to affordability, It is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met. Seat intake for SIMATS Chennai varies depending on the type of course. The institute confirms the seat for admission on the basis of various factors including anumber of candidatesappearing for admission, seats allocated for each course andcutoff. TheBArchprogramme has alimited intake, while theB.E./ BTechprogramme has alarger capacitythat is 1,200+ students. The seat intake for various SIMATS, Chennai courses has been tabulated below:
Seats Intake

Candidates can apply for SIMATS Chennai course admissions in online mode by visiting the official website of the institute. The selection process can be both merit and entrance based, depending on the chosen course. The steps mentioned below show the entire process of SIMATS Chennai admissions:
1: Application:Candidates need to apply on the official website of SIMATS University (saveetha.com).

2: Selection:To apply for UG courses, candidates must have at least passed Class 12 or equivalent exam from a recognised board with 50% aggregate. Candidates will have to apply for theNEET-UGexam conducted by NTA to gain admission to undergraduate courses at Saveetha University. SIMATS also conducts its own entrance exam for a few courses admission to a few courses.
3: Counselling:After the entrance exam results are declared, the SIMATS Chennai conducts counseling rounds during which, candidates are alloted the seats on merit-basis.
4: Fee Payment:Saveetha University admissions are confirmed after the admission fees has been paid by the candidates.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Saveetha Medical College?
faqs.answer: SIMATS Chennai admission process is based on both entrance test and merit list set by the university. To apply for UG courses, candidates must have atleast passed Class 12 or equivalent exam from a recognised board with 50% aggregate. For admission to UG courses, candidates must appearNEET-UGexam conducted by NTA.Admission to MBBS, BTech, MBA, M.Tech courses is done on the basis of NEET-UG, TNEA, TANCET, GATE exams respectively.

faqs.question: Can I join Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences without TANCET for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join SIMATS without TANCET, but you will need CAT/MAT/CMAT or any other valid score to join MBA. You cannot join MBA without entrance exams.You must register for the TANCET exam and submit an application to colleges in Tamil Nadu that recognize TANCET scores for MBA admission if you want to pursue an MBA.Alternatively, you might apply to CAT/MAT programs and pursue MBA admission.

placement_report.college_name: SIMTS Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SIMTS Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The details for the 2023 drive are not released as of now. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 108 MBA, 121 LLB/BA LLB/BBA LLB, 30 LLM, 1,080 BTech, 28 MTech, 69 BDS, 40 MDS and 56 MD students were placed during Saveetha University placements 2022. The median package offered to MBA, LLB/BA LLB/BBA LLB and LLM students stood at INR 6.45 LPA, INR 5.8 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively. For BTech and MTech courses, the median package offered was INR 3.8 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA. Further, for BDS, MDS and MD students, the median package offered during Saveetha University placements 2022 was INR 3.8 LPA, INR 6 LPA and INR 15.6 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How is Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences for MBA in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: The information on Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences' official website and other sources indicate that the school does not offer an MBA program. The institute's main areas of concentration are courses in allied health sciences, engineering, medicine, and dentistry. Major courses provided by Saveetha Institute include the following: BDS MDS MBBS B.Tech in Biotechnology B.Sc. Nursing BPT (Physiotherapy) B.Tech Computer Science Saveetha Institute does not provide an MBA program, hence there are no recruitment or MBA placement statistics available. Neither an MBA degree nor placements reserved for MBA students are provided by the institute.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences placements 2023?
faqs.answer: About 150 organizations, including major recruiters like Infosys, Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, L&T Infotech, HPCL, PayPal, and others, took part in the 2023 B.Tech placements. Regarding MBBS placements: In 2023, almost 60 prestigious medical facilities and corporations hired recent MBBS graduates. Among the top employers were Vasan Healthcare, Apollo Hospitals, Kauvery Hospital, Fortis Healthcare, Manipal Hospitals, and more. For BDS placements: In 2023, Saveetha's BDS graduates were hired by over 40 dental clinics, chains, and hospitals. Apollo White Dental, Clove Dental, Axiss Dental, Sabka Dentist, Tooth Hub Dental Care, etc. were among the principal recruiters. For Paramedical and Nursing: More than 25 large hospitals employed applicants with backgrounds in physiotherapy, nursing.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBBS students at Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences?
faqs.answer: After earning their MBBS, doctors have two options: they can begin practicing medicine or continue their study by pursuing a superspecialization (DM/MCh) or a postgraduate degree (MD/MS). Medical professionals' pay varies significantly based on a number of variables, including their area of expertise, experience, practice type (private or public), and employer. An MBBS graduate in India may begin earning between Rs. 40,000 and Rs. 60,000 per month to work in a government hospital; earnings may be higher in private facilities. The median salary package offered for MBBS was INR 9.3 LPA and the highest salary package was INR 10 LPA.

The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. nirf.description:
SIMTS has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, SIMTS fell 1 rank to #23 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SIMTS fell 2 ranks to #13 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SIMTS climbed 8 ranks to #45 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SIMTS climbed 11 ranks to #63 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities were offered by the college management. The quality of food will be very good, the classroom infrastructure is also good. Medical facilities were also good. Labs, classrooms infrastructure were also good. The facilities is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms have all the facilities with smart amenities. The infrastructure of the college is excellent. There were Library, Laboratories, Seminar halls, etc. and all of them were well maintained. The college campus has Wi-Fi facilities. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to gain and expand your knowledge and future but dissatisfied to the core in other areas.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar but my friends who reside in hostels weren't satisfied either. They showed me a picture of dead bugs and worms in their food. That alone is a major concern. No action was taken by the management related to the quality of the food provided. That explains a lot. The rooms are okay but not worth it. INR 80–90k in hostel fees is too much for a mediocre room and disease-carrying food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences, Poonamallee.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were decent. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Computers were also available in this college. Laboratories were excellent. There was a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities were great. The security facility was good in our hostel. The food quality was decent. Sports were conducted in this college. Medical facilities were also provided for emergency purposes. Hospital was also available on our campus.

review_content.Placements: There is a placement cell which invites a lot of companies and firms for job opportunities. There are also opportunities for those who are willing to be an entrepreneur because students and the college also organize many times of hands-on workshops, research projects, and internships, as well as eminent scientists and professors talk to encourage students. reviews_list.review_title: Fees are lower compared to other NITs.

review_content.Placements: Placement of our college is really amazing as compared to all the NITs in India. As this year is 2025, the highest placement stood at 96 LPA from the mechanical engineering department, which is really a great thing. Also, the average placement of our college is 13 LPA, which is really good.
review_content.Infrastructure: I really loved the playgrounds, as these are huge, and also the inter-branch competition, which is held every year, is very exciting. The hostel facilities are quite good. The mess food is average but adjustable. There is 24/7 internet, no issue with that. The bathroom is well furnished, and housekeeping is really good. They come every morning and clean the staff. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The library is good, and it is open for 24 hours. There are many grounds for different sports.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for MBA at NIT Silchar? Is it same for SC category candidates?
overview_faqs.answer: Students willing to take admission at NIT Silchar for an MBA are required to submit their application form along with the required documents and the applicable application fee. The NIT Silchar MBA application fee for General/OBC candidates is INR 1500. The application fee for SC/ST/EWS candidates is INR 1,000. Additionally, applicants will have to pay the application fee for CAT/MAT/CMAT. The mentioned application fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at NIT Silchar?
overview_faqs.answer: The BTech course fees at NIT Silchar consists of tuition fee, security deposit, etc. Some of these are one-time chargeable fees, while others have to be paid annually/semesterly.All in all the NIT Silchar BTech tuition fee is around INR 5 lakh and is to be paid in annual installments of around INR 1.25 Lakhs - INR 1.5 Lakhs. This fee amount is taken from the university page/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How do the fees and scholarship opportunities at NIT Kurukshetra and NIT Silchar differ from each other?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition for the BTech course at both institutes is the same, i.e., INR 5 lakh. However, there is a slight difference in the total tuition fee for MBA and M.Tech courses. NIT Silchar charges a higher fee for these courses when compared with NIT Kurukshetra. Candidates can refer to the table below for a detailed insight:CourseNIT KurukshetraNIT SilcharMBAINR 1.40 lakhINR 1.60 lakhMTechINR 1.40 lakhINR 1.40 Lacs - INR 2.30 lakhNIT Kurukshetra offers various scholarships to its students. review_summary.college_name: NIT Silchar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Beautiful college with good faculty, nice people of Assam, zero ragging, and good sports facilities.

content.Placements: I don't have an idea about how many students get placed, but it is more than 85 percent in electrical engineering, as they go to the core sector and the non-core sector. I do not have an idea about the highest and the lowest packages. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Infosys, and Cognizant. I do not have an idea about internships. My course students become electrical engineers, and if they go to non-core sectors, then they can become software engineers.
content.Infrastructure: Usually, our phone's internet will not work as well as it does in a Tier 1 city. It provides LAN, which has high-speed, so we can enjoy the internet. Classrooms are okay. It has Asia's largest library. Labs are good. Food is good, as we get both vegetarian and non-vegetarian canteens, so we can enjoy. Medical facilities are available in a hospital. There is a SAC building with a badminton court, so we can learn. To play table tennis, we can go to the sports complex. There are very good sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It offers good education and facilities. Placements are better for non-core roles.

content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placements in the civil course. The highest package offered last year was 19.90 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our course are L&T Construction, Tata Projects, NCC Limited, etc. 70-80 percent of students got internship opportunities. Top roles offered in our course are site engineer, design engineer, quality control engineer, planning engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi on the whole campus. There is a civil lab in the department building and many classrooms. There is a central library which is open from 10 AM to 8 PM. The quality of facilities in our hostel is average, as there are few indoor games and an old building. The quality of the mess is not good in our hostel. The canteen facilities are good. Medical facilities in college are good as they provide the necessary medicine when needed. There are two grounds and many courts that cover almost all sports, and sports facilities are good with respect to other aspects.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: There is a placement cell which invites a lot of companies and firms for job opportunities. There are also opportunities for those who are willing to be an entrepreneur because students and the college also organize many times of hands-on workshops, research projects, and internships, as well as eminent scientists and professors talk to encourage students. So many companies come to recruit people. Internship fairs are organized by the placement cell of our college, and they recruit students from all courses. Packages vary from company to company, maximum being 12 LPA, and minimum 4 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Fees are lower compared to other NITs.

content.Placements: Placement of our college is really amazing as compared to all the NITs in India. As this year is 2025, the highest placement stood at 96 LPA from the mechanical engineering department, which is really a great thing. Also, the average placement of our college is 13 LPA, which is really good.
content.Infrastructure: I really loved the playgrounds, as these are huge, and also the inter-branch competition, which is held every year, is very exciting. The hostel facilities are quite good. The mess food is average but adjustable. There is 24/7 internet, no issue with that. The bathroom is well furnished, and housekeeping is really good. They come every morning and clean the staff. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The library is good, and it is open for 24 hours. There are many grounds for different sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college and the surroundings are also very good.

content.Placements: In the B.Tech Mechanical Engineering course, around 75–80 percent of students get placed in the latest placement drive. The highest package offered is around 18 LPA. The lowest is 4 LPA. The average package is nearly 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Tata Motors, Mahindra, L&T, JSW, Cummins, Vedanta, Infosys, Wipro, and TCS. Nearly 60 percent of students receive internships, with companies like Tata Steel, JSW, IOCL, HPCL, and L&T offering good opportunities. Top roles offered are Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET), Design Engineer, and Production Engineer.

admission_overview.college_name: NIT Silchar Admission 2026: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_overview.title: NIT Silchar Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIT Silchar admissions are entrance-based for all courses offered by the institute. The college offers BTech at UG level and MTech, MSc and MBA at PG level. The college also offers PhD at Doctorate level. The courses are offered in full-time mode at the college campus. The mode of application at NIT Silchar is online. To get admission at NIT Sichar, students must meet the eligibility. The eligibility is to have a valid score in the last qualifying exam. For admission to Engineering courses, students need to qualify JEE Main and GATE entrance exams. For Management and Science stream courses, the institute accepts valid scores of CAT/ CMAT/ MAT and IIT JAM, respectively.

faqs.answer: Yes, entrance tests are mandatory for admission in NIT Silchar courses. National Institute of Technology admissions are entrance-based. The scores of entrance (CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GATE/ IIT JAM/ JEE Mains) are considered for final seat allotment in preferred courses.
faqs.question: Is entrance test required for admission in NIT Silchar?

faqs.answer: NIT Silchar admissions are entrance-based. The entrance test considered for admission in NIT Silchar courses are given below:IIT JAM - for MSc courseCAT/ MAT/ CMAT - for MBA/ Executive MBAJEE Mains - for BTech praogrammeGATE - for M.Tech course
faqs.question: What are the entrance tests for admission in NIT Silchar?

paragraphs: To get admission in NIT Silchar, students must complete the admission process. The process starts from application process to paying the course fees to confirm the seat. Students must follow the steps mentioned below to complete the NIT Silchar admission process:
Registration for Admissions

The NIT Silchar application process begins with the registration of the candidate for the relevant entrance examination. To register for the accepted entrance exams for NIT Silchar admissions, candidates must visit the official portal for such exams and follow the instructions of the announcement circular. For PhD admissions, candidates are required to register on the official website of NIT Silchar.
Selection Rounds

NIT Silchar selects candidates during admissions based on the relevant entrance exam scores. The relevant entrance exam is different for each course. For its flagshipBTech course, NIT Silchar admits students with a validJEE Mainscore. Candidates are allotted seats throughJoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is throughGATE, followed byCCMT Counselling. Similarly for MSc admission,IIT JAMandCCMNCounselling are required. However,NIT Silchar MBA admissionsare done through theCATscore, where the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the PI round.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

NIT Silchar cutofffor BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. Whereas, forMBA admission, the institute releases direct merit lists after declaring the final results of all rounds. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats at NIT Silchar.

NIT Silchar feesfor all undergraduate, postgraduate & PhD courses include various components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fee payments. TheNIT Silchar feediffers depending on the course and specialisation selected by the candidates. Students are required to pay the course fee to confirm their seats at the institute. The course fees in the respective courses have been tabulated below:
NOTE:The given fee information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Check the detailedNIT Silchar Fee Structure

At NIT Silchar, students are allotted seats following the counselling process. Students need to register themselves for JoSAA, CCMT, DASA, etc. The institute offers its courses to a limited number of students. Find belowNIT Silchar seat intakefor some of its popular courses:
Note:The details mentioned above are taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.

Seat reservation in NIT Silchar follows a structured quota system. To get the reserved sets, students must meet the eligibility. Every course at NIT Silchar has a reservation criteria. Check below to know the seat reservation criteria for NIT Siclchar course:
lists: 15 per cent of seats are reserved for SC and 7.5 per cent are reserved for ST candidates.
24 seats (over and above sanctioned intake) are reserved for foreign and other category students.
Four seats are reserved for handicapped candidates against Assam open quota within the overall allotment of Assam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to M.Tech at NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to be graduated with minimum 60% aggregate with BE/BTech from a recognised University to apply for MTech at NIT Silchar. The university from which the candidate obtained their UG degree must be recognised by the government or an appropriate regulatory body.

faqs.question: Can I get into NIT Silchar with 85%?
faqs.answer: NIT Silchar selects candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants also need to score a minimum of 75% aggregate in Class 12 for UG courses. A minimum of 60% aggregate is required in graduation for PG courses. Candidates should also have a valid score in JEE Main, IIT JAM, GATE, etc. Hence, aspirants with 85% can get admission provided they also meet the selection requirements.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: NIT Silchar cutoff 2025was released for all rounds and categories under the All India and Home State quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff ranks varied between11112and59346. Hence, General AI category students must obtain a rank of 59346 or less to get admission to the college.Please note that the cutoffs for other categories, quotas, etc., will vary.

The basic eligibility criteria for the course require the candidates to pass graduation with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised board. Interested students can visit the official website of NIT Silchar and apply for the MBA programme.

faqs.question: How to get admission in an MBA programme at NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: Those looking to getMBA admission at NIT Silcharneed to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria of passing Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised board. Eligible students need to appear for entrance tests such as CAT, CMAT, etc. Those who have scored a valid score in the entrance-test can visit the official website of NIT Silchar to apply for the programme by filling out the application form and paying the application fee. The institute will shortlist the candidates, who in t

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by NIT Silchar for an MBA programme?
faqs.answer: NIT Silchar accepts various national-level entrance exams for admission to the MBA programme. The institute accepts valid score obtained by the students in exams such as CAT, CMAT, and MAT. Students who have cleared the cut-off released by the institute for the course can visit the official website of National Institute of Technology (NIT) Silchar to apply for the course online. Know more about preparation tips forCAT.

faqs.question: Does NIT Silchar provide MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, the National Institute of Technology (NIT), Silchar offers a Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme. The MBA programme at NIT Silchar is a two-year full-time course and the total tuition fee for the programme is INR 1.60 lakh. To be considered for admission to the MBA programme at NIT Silchar the candidates have to qualify forMAT,CATorCMAT.

faqs.question: What are the important dates for MBA admission at NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for MBA admission at NIT Silchar typicall falls in March. In 2024, the last date to apply for admission was March 31,  2024. The online application started in December 2023. The last date to submit the registration fee for selected candidates was May 5,  2024. Applicants must also keep in mind the deadlines for CAT/MAT/CMAT application.

faqs.question: How to get a seat at NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: As NIT Silchar admission is entrance-based. Admission to its flagship programme i.e. BTech is based on JEE Main scores of the candidates. Further, aspirants are allotted seats via JoSAA Counselling. For admission to MTech and MBA programmes, candidates must have a valid score in GATE and MAT/ GMAT/ CAT/ CMAT, respectively. The selection for MSc programme is based on IIT JAM scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to get admission at NIT Silchar?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar admits candidates to its programmes through a national-level entrance examination, JEE MAIN. Apply online through the official website. Once the online application process is completed, pay the application fee and submit the respective applications. Candidates are shortlisted based on JEE MAIN scores for the next round of admission, the JoSAA counselling round. Hereafter, admission offer is extended to the selected candidates and they must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA at NIT Silchar if I am currently in the final year of my Bachelor's degree?
faqs.answer: According to the NIT Silchar' MBA information brochure, students appearing for their final semester examination can apply for MBA admission. However, they will have to submit an undertaking as per Annexure V. Such candidates, if selected, will be admitted provisionally, provided they meet the preset eligibility criteria. Before the commencement of the programme, selected candidates must produce a provisional certificate of completion of the qualifying degree, on or before September 15.

placement_data.title: NIT Silchar Placements Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the placement brochure 2025-26 released, the highest package offered during NIT Silchar placements 2025 was INR 60 LPA . The placement distribution in the salary bracket of 5 LPA to 10 LPA was 55.7% whereas 9.8% students received salary package above INR 20 LPA . More than 700 offers were made in 2025.

The average package recorded during NIT Silchar Engineering ( BTech / MTech ) and MBA placements 2025 was INR 12.25 LPA and 7.5 LPA . Increase of over 13% was witnessed in the overall highest package recorded in 2025 as compared with 2024.The top recruiters included Deloitte, Google and Microsoft .

description: NIT Silchar cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Silchar JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Silchar JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Silchar JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Silchar CSE cutoff 2025 was 16053 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 22716 and 43686, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff

For the General AI category students, the NIT Silchar B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 16053 and 59346 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 16053 and 22716, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Silchar. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Silchar to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Silchar. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech in Data Science & Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 526 and 499, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 526. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 311 and 486 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Silchar - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Silchar CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Silchar MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 1455 and 1709. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 1455 was M.Sc. in Mathematics in the General AI category. This indicates that this specialisa

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 1709 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Mathematics and M.Sc. in Physics, with last round closing ranks of and , respectively, in the

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Silchar admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

NIT Silchar also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Silchar can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Silchar CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Data Science & Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Microelectronics and VLSI Design had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

NIT Silchar has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. NIT Silchar has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, NIT Silchar fell 11 ranks to #552 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, NIT Silchar climbed 14 ranks to #146 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

hostel.description: The Institute has Eight Boys hostels, Three Girls hostels, 300-bedded PG Boys' Hostel and 106 Flats with 100-bedded Married Ph.D. Hostel. All the hostels have their individual Mess Management Committee to look after the food requirement for their boarders.

library.description: The central library of NIT, Silchar is a hybrid library with the state-of-the-art technological applications. The collection in the library includes 96683 books, 114 Print Journals, 5468 Bound Volumes, 4297 CD-ROMs, 17 Databases, 909 Videos, 8627 ISI Code (Printed), 9235 Book Bank (General), 8180 Book Bank (SC/ST), 152 IRC Codes, 92 Thesis, 425 Dissertation. The library has a separate collection of books pertaining to North-East India and has established a separate collection of books pertaining to Career and Counselling. It also has the facility of Web OPAC (Search Library Catalogue) and has digital Library. NIT Silchar library has signed MoU with the University of Illinois at Urbana Champaign, USA.
