reviews.review_heading: Beautiful college with good faculty, nice people of Assam, zero ragging, and good sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: Usually, our phone's internet will not work as well as it does in a Tier 1 city. It provides LAN, which has high-speed, so we can enjoy the internet. Classrooms are okay. It has Asia's largest library. Labs are good. Food is good, as we get both vegetarian and non-vegetarian canteens, so we can enjoy. Medical facilities are available in a hospital. There is a SAC building with a badminton court, so we can learn. To play table tennis, we can go to the sports complex. There are very good sports fa...

reviews.review_heading: It offers good education and facilities. Placements are better for non-core roles.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi on the whole campus. There is a civil lab in the department building and many classrooms. There is a central library which is open from 10 AM to 8 PM. The quality of facilities in our hostel is average, as there are few indoor games and an old building. The quality of the mess is not good in our hostel. The canteen facilities are good. Medical facilities in college are good as they provide the necessary medicine when needed. There are two grounds and many courts that cover almost ...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is different for different hostels. There are 9 hostels for boys in this college and 3 hostels for girls. Mess and canteens are present in every college and have a quite amount of seats, so every student can sit here at one time and eat. Bathrooms are present in sufficient amount. You don't need to take tension for infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Fees are lower compared to other NITs.
reviews.review_text: I really loved the playgrounds, as these are huge, and also the inter-branch competition, which is held every year, is very exciting. The hostel facilities are quite good. The mess food is average but adjustable. There is 24/7 internet, no issue with that. The bathroom is well furnished, and housekeeping is really good. They come every morning and clean the staff. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The library is good, and it is open for 24 hours. There are many grounds for different...

reviews.review_heading: The college and the surroundings are also very good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful, surrounded by greenery and lakes. This gives a calm and refreshing vibe even during stressful exam weeks. The infrastructure is pretty good. It includes well maintained hostels, labs, and sports facilities. The Wi-Fi sometimes tests your patience, but that is part of the fun here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placement record in the last 3 years.
reviews.review_text: NIT Silchar was built on a total of 625 acres. A nature-rich campus with more than 20 lakes and 2-3 gardens. Classrooms are digitalised. The infrastructure for the CSE course is good, labs are well managed, and a LAN (Ethernet) is provided to every hostel room. Hostel maintenance is above average, and there are 9 boys' hostels and 4 girls' hostels. Food quality is good, and our college has a good sports management team. We have a dispensary clinic in the college itself.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with staff members.
reviews.review_text: The university covers an area of 15 acres. The building is well-designed and maintained. The classrooms are designed with 4.0 teaching technology and also provide Wi-Fi facilities in every class and hall. The hostel also provides good facilities like fresh food, gym, Wi-Fi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college as a NIT and good placement +.
reviews.review_text: NIT Silchar EE department has decent labs and LAN access, but classrooms lack modern facilities, and teaching quality varies. However, hostel life is vibrant and enjoyable with good mess food, clean rooms, friendly environment, and making campus life memorable.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: College faculty is very good and interested in learning. The chemistry lab is also in campus, which is very clean, and there are many chemical products that help in learning more about it. Exams are also held on campus and are subjected to classes. There are 9 hostels for boys in this college and 3 hostels for girls. The hostel infrastructure is good. Mess facilities, TV room, sports room, and good spacious rooms are there. And it is also very cheap. There are single rooms, double rooms, and tri...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Course is pretty good and has a lot of focus on practical learning. Every semester, there are 2-3 laboratories of 2 credits each. The institute has taken many research initiatives and has a separate research and innovation cell for these activities. I have opted for and been allotted a hostel since the first year. I got a hostel room which was initially for PG students, so the rooms are great. I got a double room in the 1st year. The rooms and facilities are excellent. Mess food is compensable. ...

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: I have opted for a hostel which is compulsory in our college. I share my hostel room with a fellow colleague of mine. Rooms are quiet with a 24-hour electricity supply. There is a bed, a table, a chair, a wardrobe, and a balcony in the room. The lighting condition is also quite good. The hostel rent is Rs. 15,000 per semester.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Silchar is good in placements and campus life. City life is poor, that's all.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the hostel and the infrastructure of the Electronics and Instrumentation branch are very good, even EI is known as the coolest branch of NIT Silchar. The food quality of the hostel is above average.  Canteen is good but a little bit cheaper, and vegetarians may face problems.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The quality is not top-notch but the basic facilities like clean drinking water clean washrooms and a bathroom are available, the food qualities are not too bad it can fill your stomach for the 3 times of the day and the snacks are available the canteen foods are good. For the medical facilities. We have a dispensary where basic medicine is available and for the sports. We have football and cricket grounds for the outdoor games and for the indoor games, we have a sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placement ratio in 2025.
reviews.review_text: All classes are digital classrooms. Labs are decent. My department is very good, with enough instruments available for experiments. The Wi-Fi provided by the library is good. However, we have LAN in the hostel, and we don't have a Wi-Fi connection. The mess food is average. There is a medical dispensary right next to the girls' hostel. The sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: This is my short review of my campus, NIT Silchar.
reviews.review_text: They provide excellent Wi-Fi, lab, and classroom facilities along with good freedom, but hostels are a bit average. Hostels are built like those from the 80s and 90s, which makes your room feel old. Until the fourth year, you don’t get any privacy in your room as only triple-sharing rooms are allotted.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NIT Silchar - National Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like BPCL, L&T Construction, Havells, Affine Analytics, Mu Sigma, TCS, Accenture, Deloitte, Infosys, USEReady, Dell, Sterlite Technologies, etc., visit our campus for placements.
The placements are good, and many tech giants have picked up students this year not only from CSE but also from ECE, EIE, and other branches.

NIT Patna offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The institute offers BTech and MTech as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. NIT Patna courses are offered in full-time mode in several specialisations. The institute offers these courses to students in several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Mechatronics and Automation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, Control System Engineering, and more.
National Institute of Technology Patna courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at National Institute of Technology Patna Bihar in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIT Patna offers various courses to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The institute offers courses mainly in the Engineering, Science, and Architecture streams. At the UG level, NIT Patna offers BTech, BSc, and BArch programmes to students. They are offered for a duration ranging between 3 and 4 years and across several specialisations.

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Patna courses are offered to students at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, mainly in the Engineering stream. Some of the popular courses offered by the institute are BTech, MTech, and PhD. These courses are offered in several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc.
faqs.question: What are the courses offered at NIT Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Patna offers a BTech course to students at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 4 years. The total tuition fee of BTech at NIT Patna ranges around INR 5 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BTech at NIT Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    Getting into the flagship programme of NIT Patna i.e. BTech requires passing JEE Main. The cutoffs are usually competitive due to large number of applicants and less no. seat availability. It may be challenging for General category candidates to get into popular branches such as CSE with a 95 percentile. However, aspirants belonging to reserved category or female candidates can get admission with a 95 percentile.
faqs.question: Can I get NIT Patna with 95 percentile?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from 2nd April 2026 to 9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed in this course, but in different categories. The highest package is noted to be around 42 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, and SAP visit our campus to hire students. At the end of this course, 80 percent of the students receive internship offers, which may provide a stipend or may not.
review_content.Infrastructure: I live in the hostel named Brahmapur Hostel of the National Institute of Technology, Patna. This is one of the largest boys’ hostels in NIT Patna, and yesterday there was a special dinner. There are three boys’ hostels and one girls’ hostel. The total capacity is around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities. The Wi-Fi is very slow due to the large number of users. The library is well-equipped, but the classrooms are a bit old. The mess food is unacceptable.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed in this course, but in different categories. The highest package is noted to be around 42 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, and SAP visit our campus to hire students. At the end of this course, 80 percent of the students receive internship offers, which may provide a stipend or may not.
review_content.Infrastructure: Recently, we have shifted to the new NIT Patna. It is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT. The old NIT is around 50 acres, while the new one is around 120 acres. They provide Wi-Fi 24/7, and all labs and the library run with air conditioning. Food quality is good, but somewhat difficult for South students, though we can manage.

As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at NIT Patna?

overview_faqs.question: What are the hostel charges of NIT Patna for M.Tech candidates?
overview_faqs.answer: NIT Patna M.Tech hostel fee is INR 1.42 lakh. This may include the mess charges as well. Moreover, the hostel fee may vary based on the accommodation type. NIT Patna can also revise the hostel charges in an academic session. The given fee information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body. overview_faqs.question: Is NIT Patna campus safe?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, NIT Patna campus is safe for girls and boys. The college campus is located in Bihar. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are installed in the campus to keep a check on students safety.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining NIT Patna for BArch course?
overview_faqs.answer: National Institute of Technology, Patna is a good college for candidates wanting to pursue BArch course. In the NIRF 2023 rankings, NIT Patna has been ranked at 19th spot among the top Architecture institutes in the country. Moreover, the institute also provide placements support to the students.

review_summary.college_name: NIT Patna Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Microelectronics and VLSI System Design) - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: My review of NIT Patna (Integrated M.Tech ECE).

content.Placements: For my branch, the recent placements were good. Around 70 to 80 percent of the students got placed. The highest salary was around 45 LPA, and the average was 14 LPA. Placements are improving year by year. Phonepe, Tata, and many other companies recruit. There are placement coordinators for assistance.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has good infrastructure and spacious classrooms. We have well-equipped labs, and the library is good. Wi-Fi exists on the campus, but the bandwidth could be improved. But the new campus is at suburbs, and connectivity is a hard task. But the new campus has good infrastructure and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My college is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed in this course in different categories. The highest package is around 42 LPA and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, and SAP visit our campus to hire students. By the end of this course, 80 percent of students receive internship offers, which may provide a stipend or may not.
content.Infrastructure: We have recently shifted to the new NIT Patna. It is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT. The old NIT was around 50 acres, while the new one is around 120 acres. They provide Wi-Fi 24/7, and all labs and the library run with air conditioning. Food quality is good, but somewhat difficult for South students, but we manage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed in this course, but in different categories. The highest package is noted to be around 42 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, and SAP visit our campus to hire students. At the end of this course, 80 percent of the students receive internship offers, which may provide a stipend or may not.
content.Infrastructure: I live in the hostel named Brahmapur Hostel of the National Institute of Technology, Patna. This is one of the largest boys’ hostels in NIT Patna, and yesterday there was a special dinner. There are three boys’ hostels and one girls’ hostel. The total capacity is around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities. The Wi-Fi is very slow due to the large number of users. The library is well-equipped, but the classrooms are a bit old. The mess food is unacceptable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed in this course, but in different categories. The highest package is noted to be around 42 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, and SAP visit our campus to hire students. At the end of this course, 80 percent of the students receive internship offers, which may provide a stipend or may not.
content.Infrastructure: Recently, we have shifted to the new NIT Patna. It is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT. The old NIT is around 50 acres, while the new one is around 120 acres. They provide Wi-Fi 24/7, and all labs and the library run with air conditioning. Food quality is good, but somewhat difficult for South students, though we can manage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: From the end of the 3rd year, students start doing internships in different companies, and from the start of the 4th year, they start getting placed in different firms or companies. The average package offered depends on the student's capability and how hardworking they are. The average package offered to the EE students ranges from 12-13 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Rooms in the hostel are good and easy to live in. The compound of the hostel is very good. Cleanliness is there. The meal provided is of very good quality and also tasty. Different types of dishes are provided on different days. The registration process starts before the start of every semester for the hostel, and almost all students get a room. If anyone does not get a room or wants to live off campus, they can take PG or a room near campus. There is too much availability near NIT Patna.

admission_overview.title: NIT Patna Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIT Patna admission to most of the courses is entrance-based. The final seat allotment for for course admission is through counselling such as CCMT, JoSAA, etc. for some of the courses. Students seeking admission must visit the institute's official website to apply online. National Institute of Technology Patna offers over 15 courses at UG and PG levels. These courses are offered in different fields. These include Engineering, Science, and Architecture. The programmes are offered in a full-time mode. Interested students can see the accepted exams for NIT Patna admissions for some popular programmes:

eligibility_selection.title: NIT Patna Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: NIT Patna course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students have to clear both the basic eligibility and the selection rounds to get a seat. The offers a list of UG, PG, PhD, and integrated courses. Students seeking admission to these courses need valid scores on national-level entrance tests. The flagship course of NIT Patna is BTech which admits students based on JEE Main scores. BArch is another unique course of NIT Patna as it is offered by only six NITs out of a total of 31 NITs in India. Given below is the minimum eligibility and selection criteria for NIT Patna courses:

The common eligibility is as below:NIT Patna UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjects from a recognised boardNIT Patna PG eligibility - UG degree in a relevant fieldNIT Patna PhD eligibility - PG degree in relevant field from a recognised university
faqs.question: Who is eligible for NIT Patna admission?

faqs.answer: NIT Patna shortlists students mainly on an entrance basis. Students have to appear for entrance tests followed by other selection rounds. For BTech and MSc these are counselling. The selection process for popular programmes is as below:NIT Patna BTech selection process - JEE Main + JoSAANIT Patna M.Tech selection process - GATE + CCMTNIT Patna MCA selefction process - NIMCET + CCMT NIT Patna BArch selection process - JEE Main Paper II
faqs.question: How are students shortlisted for NIT Patna admission?

faqs.answer: The National Institute of Technology Patna offers a four-year full-time BTech course, covering several specialisations. To apply for the NIT Patna BTech course, candidates must have valid JEE Main scores. Apart from the entrance test score, students also need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria set by the exam conducting body - NTA. NIT Patna BTech eligibility is a Class 12 pass with a minimum aggregate of 75%. Aspirants must also hold the relevant documents as a proof of eligibility.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech course admission at NIT Patna?

faqs.answer: NIT Patna has limited seats. The intake is different for each programme. Students have to complete the admission process to get a seat. The intake is as below:Course NameSeat IntakeBTech944MTech468BSc12BArch40MPlan10PhD149
faqs.question: How many seats are offered at NIT Patna?

paragraphs: TheNIT Patna admission processis different from course to course. The process includes registration, selection rounds, cutoff, merit list release and counselling. Check the stages of admission to the institute provided below:
NIT Patna Application 2026

For admission, students must complete the application process of the course-specific entrance test. Aspirants have to visit the respective exam conducting body's official website to apply. However, forNIT Patna PhD admission, candidates shall visit the institute's official website (nitp.ac.in) to apply.
Selection Rounds

Candidates become eligible for participation in the selection rounds if they meet theNIT Patna cutofffor the respective course. For its flagship BTech course, theadmission processis based on merit in JEE Main score followed by JoSAA Counselling. In addition, admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. Admission through centralised counselling is carried out for MPlan and MArch through CCMT counselling. Furthermore, the admission procedure varies from one course to another.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling

A course-wise merit list is released to indicate the minimum marks required for admission. The shortlisted candidates then have to take part in the respective counselling process such as JoSAA for BTech, CCMT for MTech, and CCMN for MSc. Candidates who get selected become eligible for admission.
Admission Confirmation
After the conclusion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates can pay theNIT Patna admission feeto confirm their seats.

TheNIT Patna fee structurediffers for each programme. The total fees includes different components. These are hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, etc. Some of these are to be paid every semester, while some are one-time chargeable. Students have to pay some amount of the total fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation. Check the table below to know of theNIT Patna fees:
Total Tuition Fee
INR 1.4 lakh
INR 6.3 lakh
INR 1.4 lakh
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.
DownloadNIT Patna Fee Structure

The seat allotment process at the institute is carried out through the respective counselling bodies such as JoSAA/CSAB, and more. Candidates are admitted as per the respective seat intake only. Theseat reservationis available for SC/ ST/ PH candidates. Thus,15% of seatsare reserved for SC candidates,7.5%for ST candidates, and3%are for PH candidates. Tabulated below is the course-wise seat intake:
Course Name
Seat Intake
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.

The preparation for JEE Main begins two years in advance. It is a national-level exam, which can be passed with a good base of concepts and preparation. Candidates can ace the JEE Main exam for BTech admission at NIT Patna with a good preparation strategy. Some preparation tips are mentioned below:
Check out the following video to get an overview of how good is NIT Patna:

headings.text: How can I prepare for admission?

lists: Choose the reference books wisely
Cross-checksection-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE Main
Revise as much as possible
Solve as many Mock Tests as possible. Shiksha.com is providing aFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions). Visit the link to download it now!
Solve previous year’sJEE question papers; there are high chances of getting questions from there

To get admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command of the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. Shiksha is offering free NCERT questions and solutions to aid JEE candidates in excelling in these classes. To access the NCERT solutions, click on the below links:

NCERT Class 11 Maths Solutions

faqs.question: Is there direct admission in NIT Patna?
faqs.answer: Candidates who want NIT Patna admissions have to clear entrance exam and also need to fulfill the eligibility criteria. There is no provision for direct admission. So candidates need valid scores of national-level entrance tests. There are in all 10 departments that offer 40+ courses. The flagship course of NIT Patna is BTech which admits students on the basis ofJEE Main scores. Hence, candidates cannot get direct admission at NIT Patna. Candidates need to visit the official website of the national-level entrance exams and apply online. Selected candidates can proceed further for counselling, and PI.

faqs.question: What is the percentile required for admission in NIT Patna?
faqs.answer: For each of theNIT Patna course admissions, aspirants have to meet the set eligibility requirements. The eligibility criteria define the minimum qualification required for selection along with the aggregate. In the below table, the course-wise required percentile is mentioned:CourseEligibility CriteriaBTechClass 12 with a minimum 75% aggregateBArchMinimum 60% aggregate in Class 12 with Maths & Physics as compulsory subjectsMTechBE/BTech in relevant subject with a minimum 60% aggregateIntegrated MSc (BSc + MSc)Class 12 with a minimum 75% aggregatePhDGraduation with a minimum aggregate of 60%

faqs.question: What is the fees for NIT Patna?
faqs.answer: NIT Patna feesis different for each programme. Students have to pay the amount through the accepted payment gateway. The fees is as below for some top programmes:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 5 lakhMTechINR 1.4 lakhBScINR 6.3 lakhBArchINR 5 lakhMPlanINR 1.4 lakh

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of NIT Patna for 2025 admission?
faqs.answer: NIT Patna JEE Main cutoff 2025has been released for all rounds. The cutoff was released for admission to BArch, BTech and Integrated BTech courses on the basis of the JEE Main entrance exam. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India and Home State quota.For the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks varied between878and65552. The most competitive course was theBachelor of Architecture (BArch)according to the first and last round closing ranks. Students can checkthis pagefor cutoff-related information for other categories.

placement_data.title: NIT Patna Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest package recorded during NIT Patna placements 2025 was INR 41.37 LPA . The lowest package stood at 5 LPA . A total of 524 offers were made in 2025. UG and PG average package in 2025 was INR 9.9 LPA and 7.8 LPA . More than 100 companies visited the campus.

There was nearly 8% decrease in the overall highest package as compared with 2024. The lowest package recorded has increased from 4 LPA in 2024 to 5 LPA in 2025. The total offers decreased by nearly 15% in 2025.

faqs.question: Are placements at NIT Patna good?

The key placement highlights of 2025 and 2024 are mentioned below: Particulars Placement Statistics 2024 Placement Statistics 2025 Highest package INR 44.92 LPA INR 41.37 LPA Lowest package INR 3 LPA INR 5 LPA Total offers 615 524

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at NIT Patna?
faqs.answer: According to media reports, out of 703 registered students 560 were placed. The highest package offered was INR 45 LPA. Further, the lowest package stood at INR 6 LPA. The highest count of placements was observed in the Mechanical Engineering branch. Over 103 companies visited the institute campus. The list of recruiters for NIT Patna placements 2024 included Microsoft, Morgan Stanley, PwC, etc. The branch-wise placement rate recorded during NIT Patna placements 2024 and 2023 are presented below: Branch Placement Percentage (2023) Placement Percentage (2024) CSE 89.62% 89.6% ECE 72.73% 72.7% EE 85% 76.6% ME 100% 100% CE 55% 55.3% Arch 52.17% 52.1% IMSc Physics 50% 50% IMSc Chemistry 50% 80% IMSc Mathematics 26% 26%

description: NIT Patna cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Patna JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Patna JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Patna JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Patna CSE cutoff 2025 was 19078 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 24388 and 46025, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff ran

For the General AI category students, the NIT Patna B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 19078 and 65552 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 19078 and 21188, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Patna. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Patna to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Patna. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech in Data Science & Engineering and M.Tech. in Cyber Security with last round cutoff scores of 485 and 448, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 351 and 485. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 314 and 450 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.
According to the NIT Patna MCA cutoff 2025, the General AI last round cutoff was 509. For the same category in 2024, the cutoff in the last round was 557.

Students should note that a higher numerical rank indicates lower competition and vice versa. Accordingly, the competition for the MCA course was highly competitive in 2025, with a last round cutoff being 509. Candidates can check the table below to know the detailed category and round-wise cutoff data for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

NIT Patna also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. As per NIT Patna cutoff 2022, the last round closing rank for BTech CSE stood at 848 for the General category All India candidates. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Patna can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Patna CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Data Science & Engineering and Cyber Security, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as VLSI and Microelectronics and Environmental Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around NIT Patna rankings.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, NIT Patna outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the NIT Patna's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, NIT Patna's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, NIT Patna climbed 2 ranks to #53 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The 'Architecture and Planning' category rankings of the institute have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, NIT Patna climbed 14 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

reviews.review_heading: My review of NIT Patna (Integrated M.Tech ECE).
reviews.review_text: The campus has good infrastructure and spacious classrooms. We have well-equipped labs, and the library is good. Wi-Fi exists on the campus, but the bandwidth could be improved. But the new campus is at suburbs, and connectivity is a hard task. But the new campus has good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have recently shifted to the new NIT Patna. It is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT. The old NIT was around 50 acres, while the new one is around 120 acres. They provide Wi-Fi 24/7, and all labs and the library run with air conditioning. Food quality is good, but somewhat difficult for South students, but we manage.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: I live in the hostel named Brahmapur Hostel of the National Institute of Technology, Patna. This is one of the largest boys’ hostels in NIT Patna, and yesterday there was a special dinner. There are three boys’ hostels and one girls’ hostel. The total capacity is around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities. The Wi-Fi is very slow due to the large number of users. The library is well-equipped, but the classrooms are a bit old. The mess food is unacceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Recently, we have shifted to the new NIT Patna. It is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT. The old NIT is around 50 acres, while the new one is around 120 acres. They provide Wi-Fi 24/7, and all labs and the library run with air conditioning. Food quality is good, but somewhat difficult for South students, though we can manage.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Patna - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Rooms in the hostel are good and easy to live in. The compound of the hostel is very good. Cleanliness is there. The meal provided is of very good quality and also tasty. Different types of dishes are provided on different days. The registration process starts before the start of every semester for the hostel, and almost all students get a room. If anyone does not get a room or wants to live off campus, they can take PG or a room near campus. There is too much availability near NIT Patna.

reviews.review_heading: New college. New life. A journey to enjoy.
reviews.review_text: The medical facility at NIT Patna is well and very good; even it is available during nights and holidays. If the situation of a student worsens, then it directly shifts to the nearest medical hospital, which is PMCH in Patna. Even it has great contacts with AIIMS Patna and other medical hospitals. Wi-Fi facilities are present in the overall college, even at our hostel, classes, library, and everywhere. The library at our college contains Lacs of books of interests and domains. The fooding facili...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I live inside the Brahmapur hostel, which has 10 floors and 4 blocks. Each floor consists of 60 rooms, accommodating two students in each room. Thus, almost 600 rooms are available inside our hostel, with a capacity of about 1200 in the boys hostel. In each semester, the mess staff get changed, and they are in contact with our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing institute of India.
reviews.review_text: There are three boys hostels and one girls hostel. The net capacity is around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities and the Wi-Fi is very slow due to the large number of users. The library is well equipped but the classrooms are a bit old. Mess food is unacceptable and there is a single big ground for sports like football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing institute in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: There are three boys’ hostels and one girls’ hostel, with a total capacity of around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities. The Wi-Fi is very slow due to high usage. The library is well-equipped, but the classrooms are somewhat old. Mess food is unsatisfactory, and there is a single large ground for sports like football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus life at NIT Patna is really good.
reviews.review_text: Live in the hostel named Brahmapur Hostel of the National Institute of Technology, Patna. This is one of the largest hostels for boys in NIT Patna. The mess structure of NIT Patna is delicious, and yesterday it had a special dinner. There are three boys hostels and one girls hostel. The net capacity is around 1,400 students. Some hostels have poor basic facilities. The Wi-Fi is very slow due to the large number of users. The library is well equipped, but the classrooms are a bit old. Mess food i...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of the best college in bihar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for my course are good. Classrooms are big and spacious and have all the necessities like good Wi-Fi, smartboards, projectors, etc. Labs consist of many pieces of equipment, and the library contains a wide range of books, from literature to humanities. Since the college has both management and arts students, the library also offers books on subjects like history, politics, economics, etc. There are also many newsletters, magazines, and journals in the ...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with infrastructure and facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Recently we are shifted to new NIT Patna, it is very beautiful and bigger than the old NIT, old NIT was around 50 acres where the new one is around 120 acres, they provide Wi-Fi facility 24/7 and all labs and library are running with air conditioning, food quality was good but somewhat difficult for south students, but we can manage.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in academics, but it lacks facilities, such as a dedicated football ground.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are poor and old. The Wi-Fi is good but limited for social media and other apps. Washrooms and hostels are decent. Mess food is good. Medical facilities are poor, and students have to buy medicines from outside. The sports ground and gym are small. The canteen is good. The library is good, but still requires manual work. Labs, especially the CS lab, are excellent.

paragraphs: Graphic Era University admissionsare open for all courses. Candidates can appear for GECET or provide a score in accepted entrance exam for admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1: Graphic EraApplication Process 2026

The Graphic Era University admission process starts with filling the application process in online or offline mode for the respective courses. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to any of the UG & PG courses can apply on the university's official website. The application fees is INR 1,500 for a course.
2: Selection Rounds

The selection to most of the UG & PG courses at the Graphic Era University is merit-based. Candidates are selected based on their merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants can also get admission based on their national or university-level entrance exam scores in MBA and MDes programmes. The university also conducts an in-house entrance-cum-scholarship test -GECETfor UG and PG courses. Selected candidates also need to come for a personal interview round for admission to some courses such as MBA, MDes, etc.
3: Admission Confirmation

The selected candidates will be notified about the selection via call, email, or post. To confirm admission, candidates must pay theGraphic Era University feesand submit the relevant documents within the stipulated deadline.

The university offers BTech in Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with a minimum of 75% aggregate can apply for the BTech programme.

faqs.answer: Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be), Dehradun offers four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The university offers BTech in Computer Science, Civil, Electronics & Communication, Biotechnology, Electrical, Mechanical Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for Graphic Era Deemed to be University?
faqs.answer: The selection process for most courses such as BCA, BSc, BBA, BCom, MCA, MSc, etc. at Graphic Era Deemed to be University is dependant on merit or previous qualifying exam scores while the BE/ BTech and MBA programmes require entrance exam scores for admissions such asCAT, MAT,XAT, CMAT,JEE Main, etc.

courses_data.name: Graphic Era University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Graphic Era offers a two-year MBA course in a full-time mode. The university offers MBA in General, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Hospital Administration and Aviation Management. The university also offers MBA (IMPACT) at the PG level. Admission to MBA course at Graphic Era University is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted through entrance exam scores and performance in the PI round. Find out more about Graphic Era Dehradun MBA admission 2026 in the following section:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at Graphic Era University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to meet the eligibility for admission to MBA course at Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be). Candidates must pass graduation with a 65% aggregate in any discipline from a recognised university to apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for MBA at Graphic Era?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University requires a minimum of 60% aggregate marks in a bachelor's degree from a recognised university for admission to the Master of Business Administration (MBA) program.The overall cutoff for the CAT exam at Graphic Era University is 75 percentile.Graphic Era, CAT Cutoff 2023Courses2023 Cutoff By percentile2021 Cutoff By percentileMBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management Check Fees Compare7575MBA Marketing Check Fees Compare7575MBA Retail Management Check Fees Compare7575MBA Ho

faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA at Graphic Era University?

These are MBA (General), MBA (Artificial Intelligence & Data Science) and MBA IEV. courses_data.name: Graphic Era University BCA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: At the UG level, candidates can pursue a three-year BCA course at Graphic Era University. The university offers BCA and BCA (Hons) Artificial Intelligence & Data Science programme. Direct admission is offered to candidates based on their merit obtained in the last qualifying exam. Get more details around Graphic Era University BCA admission 2026 in the section below:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BCA at Graphic Era University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BCA, candidates are required to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. Whoever passes who pass Class 12 in any stream can apply for this course. Admission to BCA at Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be) is merit-based. Eligible candidates are selected based on their scores in the previous qualifying exam. Their merit score obtained in Class 12 are considered for final admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into Graphic Era Deemed to be University without CAT?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era Deemed to be University offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. Graphic Era University admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MAT,  NMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMAT,  CUET-PG, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: What is the mode of application at Graphic Era Deemed to be University?
faqs.answer: The mode of application at Graphic Era Deemed to be University is online with students given admission as long as they get through the selection process after they apply online through the university page for its various courses. Students must complete the eligibility requirements before they apply.

faqs.question: Is MAT required for Graphic Era?
faqs.answer: Yes, Management Aptitude Test (MAT) is required for Graphic Era. Candidates must score well in entrance tests like CAT, MAT, and XAT. Students who have cleared the qualifying test must participate in group discussions and interview sessions. Admission to the Master of Business Administration is completely entrance-based. Candidates who have an undergraduate degree in any stream with a 60 percent aggregate (55 percent aggregate for reserved categories) are eligible to apply for a Master of Busine

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Graphic Era?
faqs.answer: The entire admission process of Graphic Era University Dehradun has to be completed online. The university considers entrance exam scores for admission to courses such as MBA, BTech and MCA. The university accepts the scores of JEE Main for BTech and CAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ MAT for MBA programme.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Graphic Era University, Dehradun without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be), Dehradun accepts scores in CAT, MAT, XAT, NMAT for MBA programme. The university also accepts CEED, NIFT, etc. for MDes. Candidates can get admission in all other courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or GECET scores.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Graphic Era University, Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be), Dehradun offers admission based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university conducts Graphic Era Common Entrance Test for admission and scholarship. Aspirants are also offered admission based on their qualifying exam scores. Once selected, aspirants need to confirm their seat by paying the course fees.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Graphic Era University accept for admission to B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University accepts the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) entrance exam scores for admission to BTech. However, admission to the Bachelor of Technology course is based on the candidate's performance in the Joint Entrance Examination Main (JEE Main) examination. To be eligible for admissions, candidates must have passed their Class 12 examination in the Science stream or equivalent with at least 60 percent marks as an aggregate.

placement_report.college_name: Graphic Era University Placements 2025: Highest, Average Salary Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: Graphic Era University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: The Graphic Era University placements for 2026 are still ongoing. So far, the highest package recorded during the 2026 Graphic Era University placement season was INR 60.30 LPA. Several offers ranging between INR 30 LPA to INR 50 LPA have been recorded for BTech CSE students. Some of the major recruiters that participated in the 2026 Graphic Era University placement drive were DE Shaw, Microsoft, Google, Visa, JP Morgan and many more.
Earlier during the 2025 placements, the highest package offered was INR 61.99 LPA. More than 2300 offers were made across various courses like BCom , BTech , MBA , etc.

tables.context: How are the placements at Graphic Era University?

faqs.question: How are the placements at Graphic Era University?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University offers good annual placements for its BTech, BBA, MCA and MBA courses. The placement process for 2026 are still ongoing. However, the university has released its highest package for 2026. Have a look at the table below to know more: Particulars Placement Statistics (2026) Highest Package INR 60.30 LPA

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Graphic Era?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era University exhibits strong MBA placements, with an impressive 80-85% of students securing positions in reputable companies. The highest package reaches an attractive 16 LPA, showcasing the university's commitment to fostering lucrative career opportunities. On average, students receive competitive packages of 5 LPA, highlighting the quality of placements. Even the lowest reported package is a respectable 3 LPA. The diversity of opportunities is evident in the participation of esteemed recruiters like HDFC, Jaro Education, Square Yards, reinforcing Graphic Era's reputation as an institution that effectively bridges academic learning with practical carer prospects.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Graphic Era University to BCom students?
faqs.answer: The university has not published a concise placements report for the BCom placed students. As per media reports, a total of 3,950 students were placed in the 2023 placements. Additionally, the highest package offered during the placements drive stood at INR 84.88 LPA . Some of the top recruiters that recruit this university graduates are Adobe, Amazon, Deloitte, Microsoft, KPMG, Walmart, etc.

faqs.question: What is the fees for MCA at Graphic Era University Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee for a two-year MCA course at Graphic Era University ranges between INR 3 lakh - INR INR 3.8 lakh. Although, t his information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and but is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MCA fees. However, there are some other fee components that also need to pay for both years separately. These are Examination Fee, Library Fee, Insurance Fee (Per Year), Students Welfare Fee, Sports Fee, Online, Students Information, PDP and Transportation Fee.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Graphic Era University BSc course?
faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in the Graphic Era University BSc fees, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, etc. The fee components are refundable, one-time payable, or annually/semesterly. Tuition fees for Graphic Era University BSc and BSc (H) courses range between INR 2.82 Lacs and INR 10.6 lakh . It must be noted that the given fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is Graphic Era University. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #72 under the category Overall, #48 under University, #52 under Engineering, and #52 under Management. Graphic Era University is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Graphic Era University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025
3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025

nirf.description:
Graphic Era University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Graphic Era University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 7 ranks to #72 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Graphic Era University's rank is #52, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 7 ranks to #52 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Tabulated below are the rankings and categories from various ranking bodies:
Read less

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Graphic Era University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system.
Explore the Graphic Era University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

qs_world.description:
Graphic Era University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2026, Graphic Era University climbed 98 ranks to #523 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Graphic Era University climbed 49 ranks to #138 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.review_heading: The college has amazing management. There are placement issues for BCA.
reviews.review_text: Graphic Era Deemed to be University has great facilities of labs and the library. Computers in the lab are in very good condition. There are many labs for practice and a huge library in different blocks. Classrooms are amazing. It provides a smart board in each class. The hostel is a little costly but gives amazing infrastructure and services. The food is pretty good. It has space for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the university. It has a great environment and a great hospital.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. I love the information about the graphics its great infrastructure, health care, and living. The food is provided. It has many canteens which provide great taste. It has all the departments. There is a big ground, and it provides a lot of fun.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average as it only covers 35 acres. But it's quite large. It seems small as the college has a very large number of students, especially in B.Tech courses. The crowd is quite large. Playground is also below average as it's not that big.

reviews.review_heading: No doubt my college is much better than any other in terms of areas.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities that students got from the Graphic Era Deemed to be University are much better and match our expectations, as we expected them to be the same. The mess serves quite good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for those students who are more active in events and fests.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. The librarian and the library are also very large. Wi-Fi facilities are also available in the library. Classrooms could be more furnished, but they are good. The mess and canteen are also decent. There are medical facilities. Hostels are a little bit expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, infrastructure, etc, but not satisfied with placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Classes are amazing, and every class has a smart board installed in it. There are many labs inside the campus, which provide better exposure to the practical aspects of the course. There are also many libraries available. The hostel is good, the food is also good and hygienic, and the hostels are disciplined and have high security.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: If I tell you about facilities, it’s average in my department. I’m not telling about other departments. Quality of hostel I don’t know. Quality of food is good. There are 4-5 canteens where food is available. All things were available and good, like sports, games, and medical facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: Graphic Era University review.
reviews.review_text: Every required facility is available, good food and infrastructure of hostels. We enjoy the services provided in our hostel, and along with that, we have great transportation facilities supported by the hostel and the college. It is a great place to get exposure.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of my B.Tech ECE program.
reviews.review_text: GU central library reportedly holds over 1,74,700 technical books, many periodicals, and journals. It also has a digital library with more than 1,200 general reading rooms with 300-seat capacity, a book bank, and reference or leading facilities. The campus is described as fully Wi-Fi enabled, as wired and wireless internet access is reported to be available 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent, really good college.
reviews.review_text: Excellent, Graphic Era infrastructure, of course. The hostel was so excellent, and our course and department were so good. Labs, classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games, etc., are all very excellent. Also, the mess of every hostel is so good, and the college provides us with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Average college life at Graphic Era Deemed to be University. The crowd is lazy and distracted.
reviews.review_text: Most classrooms are outdated, like they were built 10-20 years ago. Wi-Fi is poor. First-year labs are bad. The library is cramped up in the break, and it's difficult to study as there are no power ports available. The quality of hostels is average, and so is the food. Medical facilities are average. Sports events and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive and industry-oriented B.Tech aerospace at GEU.
reviews.review_text: Over 90% of students got placed. The average package is 5.38 LPA, the median package is 7.25 LPA, and the highest is 54.80 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ISRO, Indian Air Force, Tata Advanced Systems, Airbus, DRDO, MRO, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied but could do better.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library are very good with comfortable seats and good equipment. Wi-Fi is average. For sports, the teams are good. Mess food is average, and canteens are great. Clinic is good for quick check-ups. Hostel facilities are good as they provide necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. The quality of hostel is good for the students, and the quality of food is also good. They provide different menu everyday for the students. The facilities for sports and medical in my thinking this college is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, infrastructure, but average faculty.
reviews.review_text: I don't live in the hostel but the infrastructure is good. I have heard from friends the hostels are decent with all time Wi-Fi and water coolers running 24 hours. The classrooms are more than good. The hostel is good, the mess food is decent, the canteen has variety, plus we have medical help, and sports and games facilities.

Tuition fees for Graphic Era University BSc and BSc (H) courses range between INR 2.82 Lacs and INR 10.6 lakh. It must be noted that the given fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Graphic Era MBA fee for two years range between INR 7.2 lakh - INR 10.3 lakh. This amount is inclusive of the fee for various MBA courses offered at Graphic Era University. These are MBA (General), MBA (Artificial Intelligence & Data Science) and MBA IEV. However, this information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MBA fees.
Apart from that, some other fee components also need to pay for both years separately. Find them below:

Graphic Era University (Deemed-to-be) offers various merit-based scholarships to its students of UG and PG courses. To avail of the scholarships, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria as per the requirement. A 10% scholarship is offered to Girls candidates on the net tuition fee and a 5% scholarship is available for Wards of Defence Personnel.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for students with a history of arrears in our department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good, but AC in labs and classrooms would have been nice. Classrooms and bathrooms are not great, but manageable. It is still one of the best universities in Chennai, and this is not an excuse. A bus is available for almost every route in Chennai. Lunch is the best time with a good meal, both veg and non-veg. Lively canteen. The campus is walkable, giving it a pretty much Karan Johar college life.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is good enough, and teachers are good, but security is rude and not helpful. They should understand they are here to work for us and serve us, not the other way around. Attendance is strict, and students cannot roam around freely. If you enter the campus in the morning, you have to stay until evening. Exams are easy. They are given the question bank at the start of every semester. Dean is super egoistic, but he won't come in your way if you don't cross him. Professors are chill most of the time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and management .

content.Placements: Around 65 to 70 percent of students from my batch were placed. The packages range from 3 LPA to 8 LPA and an average of 4 to 4.5 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Cognizant. Common roles offered were software engineer, system engineer, and associate developer.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities were well maintained with good mess and canteen food. Medical facilities and sports rooms were available. It makes campus life comfortable. Overall, the campus provided a safe and student friendly environment. And also, the mess food is really good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: There were more than 1600 offers to date as of 22-01-2026 for the 2026 passed-out students. The highest package is 41 LPA offered by Amazon for many students. Computer Science and Engineering has many offers. The roles offered range from the top position to the lowest.
content.Infrastructure: There are many labs and Wi-Fi facilities on campus. Every classroom is equipped with a digital smart projector. The library is vast and has a lot of useful books. There is an emergency hospital and a dental hospital for emergency facilities. NCC and NSS are encouraged and given priority.

admission_process.title: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology also consider the seat's availability while accepting admission for different courses. There are more than 3,000 seats available for the BTech programme. Find below the course-wise seat intake for SIST Chennai:
Seats Intake
Note: Candidates must note that this information is taken from the official website of the institute and may change.
Students who are interested in taking admission at Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology can check the points mentioned below:
Step 1: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Application

The admission process starts with filling Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology application form followed by the merit score of eligible candidates. Interested candidates can visit the official website of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment for the respective course.
Step 2: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Selection

For UG, the students need to qualify for class 12. For PG courses, graduation in the relevant discipline is required. The students with the minimum qualifications will be eligible to get register for the Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE).
Step 3: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Admission Confirmation

Students who will qualify for the Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE) will get shortlisted through the merit list released on the official website of the university. Candidates can check the merit lists through the candidate's registered login ID and password, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

placement_report.college_name: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package and Top Companies

placement_data.title: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest and average package offered during Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology placements 2025 were INR 41.20 LPA and INR 5.57 LPA , respectively. A total 3007 students have been placed in top companies. Further, 301 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed 91.43% students of the 2025 batch.

Earlier, a total of 406 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed 3,015 students of the batch 2023. nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Sathyabama University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 2 ranks to #53 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 1 rank to #67 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sathyabama University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel.description: There are 5 boys hostels, and 5 Girls hostels.The University Hostels have Spacious Rooms with facility of STD/ISD Telephone, Study Room, ATM, Medical Lab, Open Air Theatre, Gym, Yoga and Dance Classes, Juice Centre, Laundary, Salon, Train Reservation Facility, Computer Lab, etc.
facilities: Consists of a rich collection of more than 5,00,000 books, 250+ print journals, 16,000+ publications, e-journals, an online database, project muse, online resources, and others.

A general hospital with 100 bedded facilities and round-the-clock availability of doctors is serving not only the students but also the general public through mega dental camps and regular medical services.

The University provides campus residential accommodation facilities to their enrolled students. Both male and female candidates can be allowed to stay in the hostel based on the availability of the rooms.
Sathyabama has 12 badminton courts, 2 kabaddi courts, 2 table tennis, cricket grounds, a yoga hall, and 3 basketball courts.

library.description: Sathyabama University has a central library with a total area of 25,000 square feet.The library has a collection of 60,000 books.It has subscription of  334 national and international journals.and subcribes to MALIBNET(Madras Library Network), IIT Library and British Council library through which we can access the library in and around Chennai City.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and management .
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were well maintained with good mess and canteen food. Medical facilities and sports rooms were available. It makes campus life comfortable. Overall, the campus provided a safe and student friendly environment. And also, the mess food is really good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs and Wi-Fi facilities on campus. Every classroom is equipped with a digital smart projector. The library is vast and has a lot of useful books. There is an emergency hospital and a dental hospital for emergency facilities. NCC and NSS are encouraged and given priority.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Good, but AC in labs and classrooms would have been nice. Classrooms and bathrooms are not great, but manageable. It is still one of the best universities in Chennai, and this is not an excuse. A bus is available for almost every route in Chennai. Lunch is the best time with a good meal, both veg and non-veg. Lively canteen. The campus is walkable, giving it a pretty much Karan Johar college life.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and computer labs are very perfect. The quality in our hostel facility is so good. The quality in our mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The review indicated the importance of my college and the facilities it provides.
reviews.review_text: Campus has good infrastructure with modern classrooms, labs, and library. Hostels are well-maintained with basic facilities, decent food, and proper safety security by the college staff over there. The food is common to everyone, and it is free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good infrastructure and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. There are good professors and well-educated lab technician. The surroundings are always clean and neat. The bus facilities are not good as they arrange less buses for more students. Nearly 10,000 students are studying so the college is always busy.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are provided every year. I am fully satisfied with our college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and lab facilities that are equipped with various equipment and Wi-Fi connections all over. There is a sufficient number of laboratories for each subject with efficient materials, and a large space has been allotted for each laboratory.

reviews.review_heading: Good and best for studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college. Canteen and library are also nice. Our college ambiance is excellent. Medical facilities are also available in our college. In mess, food quality is good. Daily non-veg is provided in our mess hall. Cool water facilities are also there in our campus.

reviews.review_heading: A few friendly faculty members expect everyone to be like that.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, and the labs are well-equipped with equipment. The Wi - Fi facility is available near the library. The mess food is not so bad when compared to other colleges, and not so good that the canteen is always crowded. You can't expect it to be so good, some half of the dish and juice are overpriced and taste bad.

reviews.review_heading: Really great in placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are updated to modern technology, and the infrastructure is also very good. Sometimes the Wi-Fi connections are poor. When it comes to labs, classrooms, and the library, they are great. The food in our college is perfect and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: The college has poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: To be candid, the infrastructure operates on a strict policy of 'bare minimum. If viewed in isolation, the facilities are functional and liveable. The basics are there. However, the moment you benchmark our campus against peer institutions, the deficit becomes glaring. We are lagging significantly in modernization and maintenance, making the campus feel adequate only to those who haven't seen better alternatives.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in IT industry.
reviews.review_text: The course is of very high quality, and the sports facilities are also good. The food provided is of good quality and is free for day scholars, and a free bus facility is available. Security on campus is well maintained, and there is no dress code.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure with good ambience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college canteen, and the library is also nice. Our college ambiance is excellent. Medical facilities are also available in our college. The mess food quality is good. Daily non-vegetarian food is provided in our mess hall, and cool water facilities are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very good. The library contains many books according to your department, allowing you to learn general knowledge as well. Wi-Fi is in very good condition. The courses offered also include specializations.

reviews.review_heading: Good for education and a better future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college, and the library is full of books for study. Labs are very clean, and the ambiance of the labs is good. The classroom ambiance is also good in our college. Sports and games are also conducted. The mess and canteen are also good.
