college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at SVNIT Surat include BTech and BSc. In addition to this, the college also offers various undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes across streams of Engineering and Technology. Class 12 pass is the valid eligibility for all the UG and PG courses. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities, but average placement and facilities.

content.Placements: I would say average from the past two years. The average package in core chemical engineering is around 6-6.5 LPA, and the highest package so far in the year 2025-26 is 11 LPA. Other than core, there are chances in non-core areas like software development, data science, management, consultancy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is average only. Like in the first year, you get in time and after that, there is campus time of 10:30 PM, which I personally find very restricted, and there is also food delivery not allowed till the hostel. You have to go to the main gate to collect your food delivery.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2026 and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: In 2026, very new and good companies come for placement and provide good packages. Mainly established private companies visit like Apple, Meesho, Cisco, Growetc, and also government companies like BHEL visit campus for recruitment. Approximately 60% of the batch gets placed.
content.Infrastructure: Decent to medium infrastructure with all basic requirements filled for the students. All department labs have their Wi-Fi setup, and classrooms have smart monitors for visualization. Now, hostels try to maintain good facilities. The mess is decent, where you can have your lunch, dinner, and breakfast.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfying placement with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am a student of Electronics and Communication Engineering department. In our batch, till now around 50-60 percent students got placed. The highest package is around 40 LPA, the lowest package is 5 LPA, and the average is around 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apple, Meesho, Oracle, ZS Associates, and around 20-30 percent, students got internship. Talking about hostel infrastructure, it lags in some facilities. paragraphs: SNVIT Surat admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Find below the complete process for SNVIT Surat admission 2025:
Step 1: SNVIT Surat Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at SNVIT Surat are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment. However, candidates seeking admission to PhD courses must be required to apply through the official website.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

For its flagship BTech course, SNVIT Surat admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. However, SNVIT Surat PhD admissions are done through the entrance exam and PI round.
Step 3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The respective counselling bodies release the cutoff for BTech, and MTech courses. Whereas, for PhD admission, the institute releases direct merit lists after declaring the final results of all rounds. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay theSVNIT admission feeto confirm their seats.

NIT Surat offers a limited number of seats for its offered courses. Seats are allocated as per course-wise counselling. Further, NIT Surat fees range from INR 40,00 to INR 5 lakh. The fees include multiple components such as admission fees, convocation fees, alumni fees, etc. Candidates must pay the fees to finalise their seats in the Institute. Find below the NIT Surat course fee and seats for 2025:
*This information is from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
How to prepare for SVNIT

The right approach and a preparation plan for admission to BTech at NIT Surat are all that is needed to ace JEE Advance. While students who are serious about getting into an IIT start preparing from Class 11, a prep strategy for the exam is mentioned below:
While the short-term goal must be to clear JEE Main, the ultimate objective must be to qualify JEE Advanced exam, check out thepreparation strategy for JEE Advanced.
For more information about SNVIT Surat check out the below videos:

Solve as many Mock Tests as possible.Shiksha.com is providingFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions).
Revise as much as possible

Solve previous year’sJEE question papers; there are high chances of getting questions from there

To secure admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command on the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for BTech admission at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: The candidates must have cleared Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics subjects.The minimum marks should be 75 percent (65 percent in case of SC/ST candidates).Also, a valid score in JEE Main.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at SVNIT Surat with a JEE Main rank of 8000 in CSE?
faqs.answer: Yes, one can get into SVNIT Surat for B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering with a JEE Main cutoff rank of8000. In 2025, the cutoff ranks ranged from7203to10232for students in the General AI quota. Therefore, candidates must wait until the last round to get a seat, as the cutoffs are more competitive in the initial rounds.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BTech at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: The selection in BTech programme at SVNIT Surat depends on the performance of the candidate in the JEE Main examination.Once the students have qualified, they will be required to undergo JoSAA counselling to get seats awarded.It is purely based on merit and based on reservation norms.

faqs.question: Which specialisations are available in the BTech course at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: SVNIT Surat provides BTech in six areas viz. Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil, Chemical, and Electronics and Communication Engineering.There is also an opportunity to pursue an integrated course of Dual Degree (BTech + MBA).Every specialisation is developed to offer excellent training and knowledge.Its curriculum is industry oriented and approved by AICTE.

courses_data.description: SVNIT Suratoffers a regular Master of Technology (MTech) course of a two-year duration. It is a full-time course with an industry-oriented curriculum spread over eight semesters. Admission to SVNIT Surat MTech is entrance exam-based.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for M.Tech at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: Admission to SVNIT Surat M.Tech is done through valid GATE score, and CCMT counselling.Students are to apply online and take part in the centralized process.Seat allotment is made on basis of rank, preferences, and availability of seats.Enrollment is strictly Merit-based and entrance-motivated.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: The candidates to participate on the M.Tech programme at SVNIT Surat should have a degree of BE/BTech/B.Arch.They must obtain a minimum of 60 papers or 6.5 CGPA. The reserve to 55 or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD students.All categories are required to have a valid GATE score.

faqs.question: Which branches of Engineering are available for M.Tech at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: SVNIT Surat provides M.Tech specialisation in a wide range of core branches of engineering starting with Civil, Mechanical, Electrical and Computer Science etc.Every branch is designed to have higher studies together with research possibilities.One will select the branch position in accordance to the qualifying degree and GATE paper of the candidate.The admissions will be made on availability and merit.

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for M.Tech offered at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: BE/BTech in a relevant discipline with a minimum of 60% aggregate is the basic eligibility for the two-year M.Tech course offered at SVNIT Surat.

faqs.question: Are admissions to MBA at SVNIT, Surat entrance or merit-based?
faqs.answer: SVNIT, Surat MBA admissions are purely entrance-based. Students aspiring to take admission must have taken any one of the accepted exams. The university accepts various national exams, including CAT/GMAT/GRE/XAT/CMAT/MAT. Other than this, students are evaluated based on various parameters. Listed below are all the parameters:Performance in Group DiscussionPerformance in Personal InterviewAcademic QualificationWork Experience

faqs.question: Does SVNIT Surat offer direct admissions to the MBA programme?
faqs.answer: No, as per the  official website, SVNIT Surat does not offer direct admissions to its MBA programme. Students aspiring to take admission must have taken any one of the following entrance exams:CATGMATGREXATCMATMATOther than this, the institute also considers students performance in GD, PI, their academic qualifications, and work experience.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA programme at SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: Candidates who receive the SVNIT, Surat MBA admission offers must pay the fee to confirm their admission. Thetotal tuition feefor an MBA isINR 2.1 lakh.The aforemnetioned tuition fee can be paid through  net banking, credit card, or debit card.Note:The given fee information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

courses_data.description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT), Surat offers anIntegrated MSccourse in a full-time mode.SVNIT Suratoffers the course over a duration of five years, divided into ten semesters. The mode of education for the course is full-time. SVNIT Surat offers integrated MSc in various specialisations offered under the Departments of Chemistry, Mathematics & Humanities, and Physics. Admission to SVNIT Surat integrated MSc is entrance exam-based. Read on to know more about SVNIT MSc programme.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: For the academic year 2025-26, the SVNIT Surat hostel fees ranged betweenINR 39,160andINR 55,080. faqs.question: What is the timing and duration of JEE Main exam?
faqs.answer: The duration of JEE Main exam is 3 hours or 180 minutes. Candidates who fall under PwD category are given 4 hours to complete the exam as they are provided 20 minute extra for every one hour. Students who opts to appear in Paper 2A (BArch) and Paper 2B (BPlan) both will be provided 3.5 hours.JEE Mains exam is held in morning and evening session. The timing of morning session is 9 am to 12 noon and for evening session the timing is 3 pm to 6 pm. Each day exam is held in two session.

faqs.question: Can we get admission in NIT Surat through GUJCET?
faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surata admission to ita flagship cousres bare based on the national-level entrance exams JEE Main and GATE. The institiutions only accepts the above-mentioned exams. Therefore, GUJCET is not applicable for the admission in NIT Surat. Candidates can find below lists of exams required for admission:CourseEligibility CriteriaSelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 in the Science stream with Physics, Mathematics & Chemistry/ Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational SubjectJEE Main+JoSAA CounsellingMTechBTech/ B.Arch or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPAUGC MScClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjectsJEE Main + JoSAA CounsellingPhDMaster's degreeUGC NET/ GATE*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for SVNIT Surat?
faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat admission to its cousres is entrance based followed by counselling for its flagship cousres. Candidates who qualifies the eligibility criteria as per the institutions admission guidelines are eligible for the for SVNIT Surat. Tabulted below are NIT Surat cousres along with their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibility CriteriaSelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 in the Science stream with Physics, Mathematics & Chemistry/ Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational SubjectJEE Main+JoSAA CounsellingMTechBTech/ B.Arch or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPAGATEIntegrated MScClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjectsJEE Main + JoSAA CounsellingPhDMaster's degreeUGC NET/ GATE

faqs.question: Can I get admission in SVNIT without JEE?
faqs.answer: No, you can not secure admission to SVNIT Surat Btech programme without JEE Main clearance.JEE Main counselling- SVNIT BTech College level seats are provided on the basis of rank and preference of candidates as per Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA).It is therefore a mandatory requirement to be eligible to qualify JEE Main.

placement_data.title: SVNIT Surat Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest package offered during SVNIT Surat placements 2025 was 74 LPA . The average and median package received in 2025 was 11.24 LPA and 8.65 LPA . A total of 205 companies visited the campus in 2025.

The median package recorded during BTech placements 2025 was 10 LPA and the placement rate was 82%. In MTech , 61% students were placed and the median package received was 8 LPA . In MSc , median package recorded in 2025 was 6 LPA and 50% students were placed .

faqs.question: Is NIT Surat expensive?
faqs.answer: NIT Surat can be expensive for some students as the total tuition fee for BTech course is INR 5 Lakh . The university offers scholarships to those under financial strain. The availability of the scholarships matter on academic performance of the candidate, financial need, and community service done by the student. A few scholarships are also provided on the basis of reservation for Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.

What is the JEE Main cutoff for SVNIT Surat for CSE and other branches?
Can I get admission at SVNIT Surat with a JEE Main rank of 8000 in CSE?
description: SVNIT Surat cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the SVNIT Surat JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of SVNIT Surat JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

SVNIT Surat JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the SVNIT Surat CSE cutoff 2025 was 10232 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 17293 and 32865, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff

For the General AI category students, the SVNIT Surat B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 10232 and 53700 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 10232 and 13134, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech, B.Sc. and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at SVNIT Surat. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at SVNIT Surat to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of SVNIT Surat. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Engineering and M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with last round cutoff scores of 585 and 561, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 585. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 309 and 548 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

SVNIT Surat also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to SVNIT Surat can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of SVNIT Surat CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Computer Science and Engineering (Information Security and Privacy) and VLSI and Embedded Systems had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is SVNIT Surat. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #66 rank in the Engineering category. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around SVNIT Surat rankings.

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2025

As per the overall score, SVNIT Surat has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, SVNIT Surat fell 7 ranks to #66 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

sports.description: To support the holistic development of students, SVNIT also provides infrastructure for both indoor and outdoor games. The institute has a Student Activities Centre (SAC) that manages sports, extracurricular, and co-curricular activities for students and staff. SVNIT Surat sports facilities include badminton, basketball and tennis courts, two volleyball grounds, a football ground, and a table tennis court, among others. Moreover, the institute also has a gymnasium with a variety of equipment for exercise.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, but average placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is average only. Like in the first year, you get in time and after that, there is campus time of 10:30 PM, which I personally find very restricted, and there is also food delivery not allowed till the hostel. You have to go to the main gate to collect your food delivery.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2026 and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Decent to medium infrastructure with all basic requirements filled for the students. All department labs have their Wi-Fi setup, and classrooms have smart monitors for visualization. Now, hostels try to maintain good facilities. The mess is decent, where you can have your lunch, dinner, and breakfast.

reviews.review_heading: Getting admission is completely worthwhile.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is good enough for living with proper Wi-Fi, a hygienic environment and spacious rooms. The department has a good study environment, with a central library with a fully equipped infrastructure and books. AC are available. Spacious enough for a large crowd.

reviews.review_heading: I am quite satisfied, except for the sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of our college is above average. The CSE, Electrical, and Chemical departments have very good infrastructure, while the Mechanical department buildings and classrooms are the worst. The Civil Engineering department has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not available in most departments. Classes have a separate building. There are two more buildings, Civil A wing and Civil B wing. Separate drawing halls and labs are available. Hostels have good room space and facilities. Me...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfying placement with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All general facilities are available in our campus such as Wi-Fi, library, labs, and all are well maintained and perform satisfactorily to help a student grow in their field. Talking about hostel infrastructure, it lags in some facilities. There is no common room for study and gaming instruments depend on hostel, in some hostels there is a playing area and in some hostels there is none. The mess is well maintained, but you can't expect home-like food.

reviews.review_heading: A lot of events, fests, and seminars are conducted on different topics in BHU, students can enroll.
reviews.review_text: All the departments are excellent, and many departments are undergoing major renovation. LAN is provided in all hostels and a library, overall, the infrastructure is good, and hostels are clean, but in some wings, there are issues in the bathroom areas. There are also times when the LAN does not work for 2 to 3 days, and there is also a connectivity problem in the rooms on the first floor of Gajjar Bhavan.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements, infrastructure, and the education course.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and course departments have no Wi-Fi. The quality of food in Mess is below average, and in some hostels it's the worst. Canteen food is roughly average. Medical facilities are not very good. Many sports and games faculty members are also lacking, like a football ground, a proper gym for everyone, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Surat has a decent campus. Most of the area is covered in greenery. A significant portion of the campus is also occupied by unused or abandoned buildings, beyond the currently usable infrastructure. The hostel conditions are better than those in some NITs but worse than others. Overall, not always up to good living standards. However, that’s part of the charm of college life. The internet connectivity is quite poor, but the labs and cla...

reviews.review_heading: It has a really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The library has a huge collection of good-quality textbooks. Sports facilities are good. The quality of the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good in every manner.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good and infrastructure was also good for my course. Classroom was not that much comfortable but other than that everything was good. Hostel quality was superb and their food was also good. Medical facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: SVNIT to explore better.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has good networking for the alumni association. SVNIT has 
Wi-Fi facility for the students and staffs. The institute has a central computer central center that takes care of the internet access requirement throughout the campus, including administration and academic departments, hostels, staff quarters, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Recession affects the placement of every tier of college.
reviews.review_text: For the course and department, facilities are average. There are labs and a library. There is poor connectivity in the department. In labs, systems are outdated, but we can manage it. The hostel quality depends upon which hostel is given to us.

reviews.review_heading: The college is okay. Good companies do come here and some faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the department are good like water facility, electricity, etc. The only thing that I didn't like was the LAN/ Wi-Fi facility because sometimes it didn't work in labs. Rest all things are good. Labs are clean. Hostel facilities are good and the mess food is also good if students are vegetarians.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. The education level and curriculum are not good.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are the best each year, and we will get a new hostel. However, they are old really and need some construction. Mess food is bad here because it really tastes bad. There is only one canteen till now but one cafeteria is under construction which will be completed by July.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college because it is NIT.
reviews.review_text: It's an old college, so we should not keep high hopes on infrastructure and hostel. The library is new and some of the departments are being rebuilt. There is a sports complex with a gym for all. We have a tennis court, stadium and also a cricket ground with football in a single stadium.

highlights.summary:
Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore admissions 2026 are open for the UG and PG courses, including seats under the Management, NRI, PIO, and Foreign National quotas. Candidates can apply online on the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: NBA and with an A+ Grade by NAAC
- 5th by India Today under the Engineering (Private) category - 31st by NIRF under the Architecture and Planning category - 75th under the Engineering category by NIRF

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes at MS Ramaiah Institute Bangalore are its BTech and BArch courses. The BTech courses are offered in a truly wide range of specialisations with 17 specialisations to choose from such as Computer Science & Engineering, Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.
The students of BTech and BArch are trained with the help of the latest infrastructure and modern technology in their labs and curriculum. These and various other course students are trained by experienced faculty members. The quality of the two courses have even been noted by national bodies such as NIRF 2025 which ranked the college highly under its Architecture & Planning and Engineering categories.
MS Ramaiah Institute Bangalore students can become Software Engineers, Data Analysts, or Civil Engineers, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. Overall, RIT Bangalore is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students.
Check out more details in the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MSRIT Bangalore Ramaiah Institute of Technology offers PG and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Computer Application, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers 4 year BE/BTech courses under a total of 17+ specialisations as well as 5 year BArch course to its students. While at the PG level, the college extends MBA, MCA, MTech, MArch, etc. to students.

faqs.answer: A:    The total fee of the four-year M.Tech programme offered at Ramaiah Institute of Technology is INR 2L - INR 2.2 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total fee of the M.Tech programme at Ramaiah Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    BE/BTech in the relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate is the basic eligibility for admission to the M.Tech programme offered at Ramaiah Institute of Technology. Karnataka candidates belonging to SC/ST & Category-l need a minimum of 45% aggregate to be eligible for the programme.
faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for M.Tech at Ramaiah Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Ramaiah Institute of Technology offers a full-time Bachelor of Engineering (BE) in various streams. To get seat in Ramaiah Institute of Technology BE course, students need to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step is to qualify for the state-level entrance exams, such as KCET/ COMED UGET with a valid score. The selected candidates are given seats based on the respective counselling session.
faqs.question: How to get seat in Ramaiah Institute of Technology BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    MSRIT Bangalore BE course eligibility criteria are below:Passed 10+2 or equivalent recognized board with Physics, Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Electronics / Biology as an optional subject. Obtained a minimum of 55% aggregate (40% for the reserved category).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements and a nice infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 75-80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 60 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. In my cybersecurity branch, the average package offered is 14 LPA, as it has less intake. The major companies are JP Morgan, Morgan Stanley, Hewlett Packard, and Oracle.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available here. The speed is not good across the campus, but good in labs. There are a lot of labs and libraries with a lot of systems and proper internet in that area. There are at least 60-70 systems in labs. Digital libraries are also there. Sports ground and facilities are also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, a good experience.

review_content.Placements: The placements in the college are just above average. Around 10 LPA for CSE and about 7 LPA-8 LPA for other branches packages are offered, though the placement percentage is around 95 percent for CSE and 80 percent around for other branches. Major students got internships here. Around 90 percent of students got internships in companies like Samsung, De Shaw, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a bit old compared to BMSCE and other colleges. Although the labs are fine, but the classrooms, etc., are a bit old and there are no digital classrooms. The Wi-Fi is provided to every student, but the speed is very low. The sports facilities are also a bit average. The mess and canteen are good.

review_summary.college_name: Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is peaceful.

content.Placements: Presently, I am in my second year, so I am not yet placed, but when I started my second year, our HOD informed us that almost 50 to 70 students who were entering for the year were placed, and they had good starting packages. The highest package went up to 40 LPA during that time.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not as great as that of the newly built college, as MSRIT has been around for many years, but the labs are well maintained. The classrooms are neat and clean. But as the rumour says, the campus is under construction every time, and some classrooms need maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MSRIT-College is innovative and makes you industry-ready.

content.Placements: Top roles are AI and ML engineer, and 80 percent are placed by the end of the placement season. The highest package is more than 50 LPA, and many students got an internship. Top recruitment companies include Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle and many other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and hostel facilities. Decent mess food and timely preparation if asked, and the canteen is also good, all kinds of snacks are available. Good place to hang out during break. Wi-Fi is good in the hostel and college, too and good connectivity in labs and working labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has good placements and a nice infrastructure.

content.Placements: 75-80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 60 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. In my cybersecurity branch, the average package offered is 14 LPA, as it has less intake. The major companies are JP Morgan, Morgan Stanley, Hewlett Packard, and Oracle.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available here. The speed is not good across the campus, but good in labs. There are a lot of labs and libraries with a lot of systems and proper internet in that area. There are at least 60-70 systems in labs. Digital libraries are also there. Sports ground and facilities are also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good experience.

content.Placements: The placements in the college are just above average. Around 10 LPA for CSE and about 7 LPA-8 LPA for other branches packages are offered, though the placement percentage is around 95 percent for CSE and 80 percent around for other branches. Major students got internships here. Around 90 percent of students got internships in companies like Samsung, De Shaw, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a bit old compared to BMSCE and other colleges. Although the labs are fine, but the classrooms, etc., are a bit old and there are no digital classrooms. The Wi-Fi is provided to every student, but the speed is very low. The sports facilities are also a bit average. The mess and canteen are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the teaching of the college, as it's average to good.

content.Placements: Core companies like Texas Instruments, Samsung Semiconductor, Schneider, and many more have come for placements, and they are regular as far as I know. According to placement data, 80-85 were placed in 2025, and the process is still going on. Roles like embedded systems engineer and VLSI roles are also offered by some companies. But CSE-related companies are more here, and most of the ECE students who get placements get them in IT roles. Apart from that, the clubs here are in abundance and active, too, as far as I know.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but it feels like more school than college. Labs are well-maintained. College is hygienic and clean. Modern labs are also there. Hostels are mid, it's affordable too, it mainly depends on the money you can get, an Rs. 80,000 hostel or a 1.3 lacs hostel. The facilities are different, with an overall average.

faqs.answer: Ramaiah Institute of Technology (MSRIT) has released a checklist of the documents required to secure BE admission at the institute. Candidates must submit three sets of the required documents, duly attested by a Gazetted Officer. The checklist of documents is given below:Entrance Exam (KCET/COMEDK) rank-card (original and four copies)Class 10 and Class 12 mark sheetsIntranet Online Application Form (accessible within the college)Xerox copy of Aadhaar CardTC/ College Leaving certificateMigration certificate (required for candidates who have studied in non-Karnataka states)Caste and Income certificate (for SC/ST/ Category I/ Category II/ Category III candidates)Two stamp-size photosBlood group reportStudy and Conduct certificate (seven years for Urban Quota and ten years for Rural Quota)Certificate for Special Quota/ Sponsor certificate for SPO Quota (whichever is applicable)

faqs.answer: M.S.Ramaiah Institute Of Technology accepts COMEDK entrance exam scores for admission to the BE/ BTech courses. For 2024 admission, COMEDK cutoff has been announced, wherein B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stands out as the most in-demand course with a lowest round 3 closing rank of 1585 for the General AI quota. admission_process.title: Ramaiah Institute of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Ramaiah Institute of Technology admission processfollows a number of steps such as application, selection and confirmation of admission.The programee admissions are all entrance based.Students who want to be admitted into the institute must adhere to the specifications of admission.Eligible students can follow the below steps to take up theMSRIT admission process:
Application Process

Aspirants applying foradmission to Ramaiah Institute of Technologyin any undergraduate and postgraduate courses should apply on theofficial MSRIT website. The aspirants must register for any course by logging on to the official site of the institute.
Selection Rounds
Candidates must qualify in prescribed entrance exams for all the PG and UG programs. Candidates must meet the selection criteria of a specific course.
Seat Allotment
The institute publishes the merit list for final seat allotment. After shortlisting candidates, they must pay the admission fee to secure their seats.

The Ramaiah institute of technology fee structure includes several elements including registration fees, tuition fees, etc.Part of the amount of the fee can be paid in semesters or annually.Nevertheless, there are certain elements that have to be paid at the point of admission as a single payment.The data forRamaiah Institute of Technology feeis as below:

2.6 Lakh - 13.3 Lakh

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech in Ramaiah Institute without giving COMEDK exam?
faqs.answer:
For admission into B.E and B.Arch course, the institute accepts KCET/COMEDK and NATA scores respectively. Candidates who are seeking admission in M.Tech are required to possess a valid score in GATE/PGCET exam. While, admission to MBA and MCA depends upon KMAT/PGCET score. In case of MBA, MSRIT also considers the score of MAT/CMAT for selection.

faqs.question: What is the mode of application at Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore?
faqs.answer: The mode of application/admission after entrance exams and counselling process is offline. Students can first check the institute page under the admissions tab for the 'Admission Checklist' of required documents. Students must submit these documents alongside any other forms or fees at the admissions office.

faqs.question: Which is better for B.Tech- LPU or MSRIT?
faqs.answer: Both are good. But why are you making this comparison? Follow your stream. I mean it would be better if you focus on getting the right stream for you. The stream in which you are really interested and want to pursue your career. At Chandigarh University wide range of courses are available. And every attempt is made to help students take a wise call. After guidance is what matters while choosing your career. And if really want to pursue B.Tech, Chandigarh University is a good choice.

faqs.question: What is MSRIT cutoff for MBA?
faqs.answer: Ramaiah Institute of Technology admission to MBA course is based on Karnataka PGCET. Ramaiah Institute of Technology cutoff for MBA based on Karnataka PGCET was 394 in 2021. In the past years, Ramaiah Institute of Technology has witnessed an increasing trend. Ramaiah Institute of Technology cutoff for MBA through Karanataka PGCET for the previous few years for General All India students is tabulated below:ExamPrevious Year's CutoffKarnataka PGCET (rank)394

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Ramaiah Institute of Technology MBA course?
faqs.answer: Ramaiah Institute of Technology's MBA programme requires applicants to have a bachelor's degree with a minimum cumulative GPA of 50%. In order to be eligible for the program, SC/ST and Category-1 students from Karnataka must have a 45% overall average.

faqs.question: What rank is necessary for MBA course at Ramaiah Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: There is no definitive rank for the MBA Course at Ramaiah Institute of Management as the number of appearing students in the MAT Exam ( Entrance for MBA) keep on changing in every subsequent year. By tracking the trend of cutoff percentiles for MBA at Ramaiah, a percentile score of more than 65 should be enough.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BE course at MSRIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: MSRIT Bangalore BE course eligibility criteria are below:Passed 10+2 or equivalent recognized board with Physics, Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Electronics / Biology as an optional subject.Obtained a minimum of 55% aggregate (40% for the reserved category).

hostel_campus.college_name: Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as great as that of the newly built college, as MSRIT has been around for many years, but the labs are well maintained. The classrooms are neat and clean. But as the rumour says, the campus is under construction every time, and some classrooms need maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: MSRIT-College is innovative and makes you industry-ready.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and hostel facilities. Decent mess food and timely preparation if asked, and the canteen is also good, all kinds of snacks are available. Good place to hang out during break. Wi-Fi is good in the hostel and college, too and good connectivity in labs and working labs.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements and a nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available here. The speed is not good across the campus, but good in labs. There are a lot of labs and libraries with a lot of systems and proper internet in that area. There are at least 60-70 systems in labs. Digital libraries are also there. Sports ground and facilities are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a bit old compared to BMSCE and other colleges. Although the labs are fine, but the classrooms, etc., are a bit old and there are no digital classrooms. The Wi-Fi is provided to every student, but the speed is very low. The sports facilities are also a bit average. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching of the college, as it's average to good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but it feels like more school than college. Labs are well-maintained. College is hygienic and clean. Modern labs are also there. Hostels are mid, it's affordable too, it mainly depends on the money you can get, an Rs. 80,000 hostel or a 1.3 lacs hostel. The facilities are different, with an overall average.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and faculty are good, but few extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: MSRIT offers a well maintained campus with modern classrooms, advanced labs, and strong Wi-Fi coverage. The library is spacious and resource rich. Sports facilities and common areas are clean and organized, creating a productive academic environment.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025, decent faculty for the first year, and a decent college.
reviews.review_text: The average infrastructure is not very modern, but it is okay. Wi-Fi is mediocre. Hostel quality varies based on the course fees. The luxury one, which is 1.3 LPA, is much better compared to the Rs. 80,000 per year one. Food is good. There are multiple sports clubs you can join. Labs are okay, and classrooms are like coaching ones, which is the only downside.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placement, facilities, and teaching.
reviews.review_text: As for course and classrooms, the facilities provided are excellent. They have a working Wi-Fi all over the campus, free for students, and a very wide range of study materials available in the library, along with the facility to read silently during exams. As for the hostel, the quality of mess is not that good. Also, the fixes needed with the hostel infrastructure can be ignored or done a whole while later, which makes living really difficult. Canteen outside the hostel, i.e, inside the college...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and campus life are really good.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped. The library is informative and includes a digital library. Hostel, mess, and canteen facilities are clean and good. Lab instructors and faculty members are supportive. Medical facilities are available, along with a gym, sports, and game areas.

reviews.review_heading: Review about RIT and college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a well-reputed one in all of Karnataka. It has good infrastructure with well-maintained canteens and dedicated labs for each department. The computers are also high-end, so the systems do not hang or slow down with the software we run. The library is well-equipped with all books, and each student has dedicated Wi-Fi access.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement as well as college life.
reviews.review_text: The library facilities are very good. There are a total of 3-4 libraries, with a seating capacity of 250-300 and above, not less than that. Wi-Fi is provided by the college. Labs are good, but don't think the same about the lab teachers. The hostel available on the campus is not sufficient; only 30 percent of the students will get the hostel inside the campus, but hostels are available in the locality. However, the food served is too bad. You won't be able to consume the mess food regularly.

reviews.review_heading: This college is amazing because I am getting placed in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good. I have stayed hostel for 2 years, which is good. Wi-Fi, library, and sports are available. Study hours are also available. The food is of very high quality, and I have never seen it taste and quality. Every day have study hours in the evening. Hostel food is super.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has many blocks making to recognised to identify which department is there to access.
reviews.review_text: All lab equipment is available with the latest tech. It provides 10 GB of data every day. The hostel is the worst, but we can stay outside. The college charges students if they break equipment.

reviews.review_heading: About MSRIT you need to know before joining.
reviews.review_text: The college is quiet and silent all the time. Wi-Fi is installed in every corner of the college. The library is good and completely quiet. It is highly equipped with all the books and stuff. The hostel food is good and completely veg. There is good scope for sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is worth it if you are interested.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good compared to other colleges. They have Wi-Fi, labs, and clean classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are good. The hostel is clean and decent. They have medical facilities. We have sports grounds and both indoor and outdoor games.

data.description: MSRIT has qualified and experienced faculty members. Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore faculty are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. Ramaiah Institute of Technology Bangalore faculty are dedicated professionals. MSRIT faculty treats its students with the utmost respect. The behaviour of the teachers is quite friendly which motivates students to share their doubts with the teachers.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Ramaiah Institute of Technology

likes.text: Major companies, including Google, Schneider Electric, Carillion, Emaar, Accenture, Capgemini, Toyota, Amazon, and Mu Sigma Inc, recruit most of the students.
The placement is very good at M S Ramaiah Engineering College.

The labs are pretty good so are the libraries, and the food in the canteen is good.

likes.text: Teachers are qualified, and most of them are friendly and they are knowledgeable, as well as there are enormous faculty development programs taking place in college.
The course curriculum is relevant, and it helps us know the basic aspects of industrial procedures rest else we usually learn from the student clubs.

likes.text: The best thing about our course is that it gives me the full of an engineering position also the opportunities are there in abundance.

The Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad flagship programmes are its BTech and MTech courses which have been highlighted here:

placements.overview:
As per the official website more than 122 offers were provided to students during IIT Palakkad BTech placements 2025. The highest package recorded stood at INR 52 LPA, whereas the average package was INR 13.98 LPA. For IIT Palakkad BTech placements 2025 the placement rate achieved so far was 86.46%. Earlier, a total of 205 students registered and 152 students were placed during IIT Palakkad placements 2024. 185 offers were made in 2024 as well.

The highest and average package grabbed by IIT Palakkad students stood at INR 47.12 LPA and INR 13.82 LPA, respectively. The BTech average package recorded during the placement drive 2025 was INR 13.98 LPA. The average package recorded in the BTech branch during the placement drive 2025 is listed here:

admission_overview.college_name: IIT Palakkad Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Palakkad admission 2025 is entrance-based for all the courses. The IIT Palakkad offers a list of courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels. The flagship programme ofIIT Palakkadis BTech which is offered in various specialisations. Admission to Bachelor of Technology (BTech) is granted on the basis of JEE Advanced followed by JoSAA counselling. Furthermore, MTech, MSc and other programmes are offered by the Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad through the GATE and IIT JAM scores. The seat allotment for BTech, MTech, and MSc courses is carried out through respective counselling bodies. Additionally, IIT Palakkad also offers PG Certificate courses in Cloud Computing and Cyber Security.
Before applying to a course, the aspirant must carefully check the eligibility requirements.

IIT Palakkad course admission begins with the application process of the accepted entrance exams. BTech is the flagship course of this institute. IIT Palakkad admission criteria differ from one course to another. Eligible aspirants can check out the below table for IIT Palakkad admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
IIT Palakkad Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Regular/ Full-Time
Application status
Fee range across courses
UG Courses: INR 8 lakh
PG Courses:INR 6,000 - INR 10,000

Popular programmes
BTech | MTech
IIT Palakkad Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection Criteria

For BTech admission, IIT Palakkad accepts JEE Main and JEE Advanced entrance exam scores, followed by a JoSAA counselling round. Similarly, admission to IIT Delhi MTech and MSc courses is GATE and IIT JAM based, followed by COAP and CCMN counselling, respectively. Registration is open for Master of Science (MSc) admission. Given below is the list ofIndian Institute of Technology Palakkad coursesalong with the selection and eligibility criteria:
Class 12 with a minimum of 75% aggregate in PCM
JEE Main+JEE Advanced+JoSAACounselling
Bachelor's degree in relevant discipline
GATE+COAPCounselling
Bachelor's degree in relevant discipline
IIT JAM+CCMNcounselling
Master's degree in relevant discipline
UGC NET/CSIR NETor GATE + written test + PI
Bachelor's degree in relevant discipline
UGC NET/ CSIR NET or GATE + written test + PI
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

IIT Palakkad feeconsists of multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, library deposit, training and placement fee, etc. The following sections mention theIIT Palakkad fee breakupand seat intake for the offered courses:
Tuition Fee
Seat Intake
Download Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad fee
Students can check out the following table to know aboutIIT Palakkad seat intake:
Seat Intake
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

IIT Palakkad admission procedure varies as per the courses candidates wish to pursue. However, the qualifying eligibility criteria as per the IIT Palakkad's admission guidelines are equivalent for all the courses. The IIT Palakkad admission process consists of multiple steps which are as follows:
Step 1: IIT Palakkad Application Process

IIT Palakkad conducts the application process for admission to its offered courses. However, for a few courses, candidates are required to complete the entrance exam's registration/application process.
Step 2: IIT Palakkad Selection Process

Candidates are shortlisted based on their qualifications. Next candidates are required to go through the selection process which requires candidates to to go through the course-based entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are completed, they are required to go through the course-wise counselling process for final seat allocation. For PhD and MS, IIT Palakkad conducts its own written test and personal interview for selection.
Step 3: IIT Palakkad seat allocation

Seat allocation for BTech is conducted by the JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority) counseling plays a crucial role in the final selection process, as it facilitates the allocation of seats in the BTech programme at IIT Palakkad. For MTech candidates must participate in the GATE counselling for seat allocation. And for MSc JAM counselling is accepted.
Step 4: IIT Palakkad Final Admission

Once the seats are allocated, applicants who are selected can submit the admission charges and confirm their admission to the relevant course at IIT Bombay. Candidates might have to visit the institute's admission office to verify the documents.

courses_data.name: IIT Palakkad MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MTech is a two-year course offered at the PG level in the Engineering field. IIT Palakkad offers MTech in six specialisations such asData Science,System on Chip Design,Computing & Mathematics,Manufacturing & Material Engineering,Geotechnical Engineering, andElectronics & Power Systems.To be eligible for the MTech programme the candidates need to take the GATE exam and clear the cutoff. The MTech programmes offered by IIT Palakkad need the candidates to have a minimum of 60% in their BTech/BE degree. Read on for more details on IIT Palakkad MTech cousre.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of M.Tech offered at IIT Palakkad?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of MTech at IIT Palakkad is INR 10000 for entire two years although there are other components that might be added to total tuition fee at time of admission. The total fee is calculated based on annual/ semester fee available for academic year 2023-24 hence is indicative.

faqs.question: Is getting into IIT Palakkad tough or easy?
faqs.answer: Admissions to the different BTech, M.Tech and MSc courses of Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad will depend on entrance exam scores such as JEE Mains, GATE, etc. But it is difficult to say whether getting into IIT Palakkad is tough or easy and will depend on the:Candidate's level of preparationCompetitionAvailable seatsExam DifficultyAs well as a number of other factors that will not be discussed here.

faqs.question: Are there any application fees for IIT Palakkad admissions?
faqs.answer: There are no separate application fees for Indian Institute of Technology Palakkad admissions though students must pay a registration fee of INR 300 up enrollment after admissions. Students must also pay the required entrance exam's own separate registration fees to the conducting body.

faqs.question: What rank is required for IIT Palakkad?
faqs.answer: IIT Palakkad cutoff 2023has been concluded for all the courses for the academic year 2023-24. For IIT Palakkad BTech admission 2024, the institute accepts the JEE Advanced score, followed by the JoSAA Counselling process. IIT Palakkad cut-off 2024 for JEE Main will be released after both Session 1 and Session 2 exams conclude. Candidates can refer to JEE Main 2023 cutoff in the table below:BTech SpecialisationsRound 1 ( Closing Rank)Last Round (Closing Rank)BTech in Civil Engineering1433016487BT

courses_data.name: IIT Palakkad MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIT Palakkad's MSc program for 2025 is a full-time two-year course with eligibility criteria of Bachelor's degree in Science in a relevant discipline. The institute provides a total of 63 seats to students from MSc inMathematicsPhysicsandChemistrywith 21 seats are given to each specialisation. Read on to know more about the IIT Palakkad MSc cousre.

faqs.question: Can I get IIT Palakkad with 540 rank?
faqs.answer: Yes if your rank 540 you can secure seat in most engineering programs of IIT Palakkad.Computer Science and Engineering: 6199- Data Science and Engineering: The cutoff was around 8084.- Electrical Engineering: The cutoff was about 9766.- Civil Engineering: The cutoff was as high as 16487.

faqs.question: Can I get IIT Palakkad with 540 rank?
faqs.answer: To get IIT Palakkad for MSc admission, candidate must qualify the IIT JAM and attain the required Cutoff rank. faqs.question: What all documents are required for IIT Palakkad admissions?
faqs.answer: The general documents required for IIT Palakkad admissions are as shown here:Phone number & email IDAcademic details related to Class 12thand Class 10thCleared examsScanned copies of certificates of the category of studentsScanned copies of the photograph and signature of students as per the specifications given by NTACredit card/ Debit card/ UPI details for the fee payment of the application.Entrance Exam score card (JEE Mains, GATE, etc.)While PG courses such as MTech, MSc, etc. also requires

faqs.question: What is the application process for IIT Palakkad admissions?
faqs.answer: The application process for IIT Palakkad admissions is as shown here:Register for required entrance exams through the portal such as  (jeemain.nta.nic.in).Register as an applicant, filling the form, submitting documents and paying application fees.Appear for the exam then go for counselling.Select IIT Palakkad as preferred institute.Students must also upload the required documents and pay application fees for smooth admissions.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIT Palakkad?
faqs.answer: To get admission in IIT Palakkad candidates must follow the admission process as per the institution's admission guidelines. IIT Palakkad admission is completely entrance-based for all the courses offered by the institute. IIT Dharwad offers BTech (integrated course) at the undergraduate level. MTech/ MSc at postgrauate level and PhD / MS at doctoral level. Candidates must follow the admission procedure of IIT Palakkad:Step 1: IIT Palakkad Application ProcessIIT Palakkad conducts the application process for admission to its offered courses. However, for a few course candidates are required to complete the entrance exam's registration/application process.BTech and BS aspirants must fill out the application form for JEE (Main) via the official website of the National Testing Agency (NTA) (nta.ac.in).Read moreMTech candidates must register for GATE via the official website of GATE Online Application Processing System (GOAPS) (appsgate.iitd.ac.in).Read moreMSc candidates must register for

faqs.question: Can I participate in JoSAA counselling if I don't have 75% marks in class 12?
faqs.answer: It is mandatory to have minimum 75% marks (65% for reserved category) in class 12 to take admission in IITs, NITs, IIITs and GFTIs. Students should apply for JoSAA conselling only if they fulfill all conditions of eligibility. However many institutes admit students on basis of JEE Main where there is no requirement of minimum marks in class 12.

faqs.question: How can I get M.Tech admission in IIT Palakkad?
faqs.answer: The students must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for admissions into M.Tech course. They must have a valid GATE exam score. Also, they must be Indian nationals. In courses where GATE exam is not considered, students must have one of these:1. Four- year UG degree in Engineering/Technology in Computer Science and Engineering2. A four-year UG degree in BE/Btech or MSc in Data Science, AI, Machine Learning, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Physics along with GATE qualification in DA/CS/EC/EE.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIT Palakkad in BTech if my JEE Advanced rank is between 5000 and 10000?
faqs.answer: The cut off rank in Round 6 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering is 5162 which is very close to this range. This was for general category under All India quota. Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one can not afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing from round to round, better ranks definitely increases your chances of getting admission in IIT Palakkad - Indian Institute of Technology.

placement_data.title: IIT Palakkad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placements are ongoing for the Class of 2025. IIT Palakkad has achieved 86.67% placements for its BTech batch 2025 so far. The average package secured by the students of the BTech batch 2025 stood at INR 13.98 LPA. The CSE students secured the average package INR 17.45 LPA . The students secured 20 PPOs and 38 offers with the CTC of INR 15 LPA and above. The top recruiters of IIT Palakkad in 2025 include Mahindra Finance, TCS, Infosys, Alpha Wave Semi, AMD, Analyzer CAE Solutions, etc.

Earlier, the institute has recorded 74.15% placements for the overall Class of 2024. A total of 205 students of the batch 2024 registered, of which and 152 students were placed during IIT Palakkad placements 2024. The overall highest and average package grabbed by IIT Palakkad students of the batch 2024 was INR 47.12 LPA and INR 13.82 LPA , respectively.

The highest package offered to CSE, Electrical, Mechanical and Civil students in 2024 was INR 41.61 LPA, INR 36.72 LPA and INR 20 LPA. Placement rate for these branches was 93.02%, 69.44%, 80% and 84.21%.
Download: IIT Palakkad Placement Report 2023-24

reviews.review_heading: Masters course in the department of Physics.
reviews.review_text: The specialized equipment and apparatus required for laboratories are maintained in proper conditions to provide accurate results during experimentation. For master's courses in all the departments, only 40 seats are available. Seats are provided on a first-come, first-served basis.

reviews.review_heading: Not able to tolerate the professors activities.
reviews.review_text: College officials provide seats to the students based on both direct admission and merit admission. All their activities were officially published on their official website, keeping them updated on the social platform. The Institute had consistently been a part of preparing young talent for the nation.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are too good. Campus is spread across 504 acres, which is near the Western Ghats. Wi-Fi and classrooms are best. In every class, projector is available, and well-stocked library is present on campus. Food quality is good, and separate hostels are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best institute for the B.Tech in Electrical Engineering course.
reviews.review_text: It's nice that each branch has its own building and labs. The college and hostels offer Wi-Fi. The digital screens are installed in the projector classrooms. The college contains a cricket pitch, followed by a badminton pitch and a basketball court. On campus, you can play indoor games like TT, chess, carrom, and more.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best Institute for a Ph.D. in Chemistry course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, and sports facilities are all available on campus, which is excellent. The food in the college canteen is good, and the hostels are very nice. I didn't face any infrastructure issues during my time. There is also a free clinic for students in need, and we have a very good library.

reviews.review_heading: Master's studies in my native place.
reviews.review_text: It's a campus where even the unknown strangers immediately help us when we reach out to them. It's a cool, hill hostel with fewer conditions, but it's mandatory to fill out the hostel records while living and entering the hostel zones. Transport facilities are available for good safety purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Maximum companies would be the core companies.
reviews.review_text: Possibilities for exploring industrial visits, and tours are very less but students are allowed for such activities at least once a year. Immediate suspension is raised from the side of college management if we are involved in any unnecessary activities. Food shortages often occur in the canteen zones.

reviews.review_heading: Phenomenal college with good values.
reviews.review_text: It is a little far from the college. But I chose to reside in the college hostel. Hostel food is okay, but I crave my home food. So I left the college every weekend, and it required a lot of approval. It is a phenomenal college with good moral values.

reviews.review_heading: The college with good recognition.
reviews.review_text: The percentage of recruitment from the computer science and engineering department is up to 75% randomly and it is the highest when compared with other courses. The type of training decided by ourselves to attend would decide the pay gained by us in the future. I chose the extreme level of training so I got a package of 13.5 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Overall perspectives of mine.
reviews.review_text: The comprehensive course curriculum and diverse career opportunities in electronics offer students a wide range of prospects, from embedded systems, telecommunication and VLSI design. The mean package provided to the hired students would potentially between 4.3 LPA to 6.17 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: As being a fresher of IIT, Palakkad.
reviews.review_text: Our college placement team only allows students with zero backlogs for placement recruitment. While others are required to attend drives for the companies offering the lowest salary packages. Mostly top performers in academics got placed in good companies and rest of them got placed in other companies.

reviews.review_heading: Quite disappointed with the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure and facilities available for our course are average. Classrooms and labs are outdated and getting old. The hostel rooms are small and comfortable. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic. No time to play sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with IIT Palakkad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here was excellent and all facilities were available for students including Wi-Fi, labs, a library, sports facilities and medical services. The campus life was amazing and all necessary amenities were provided to students. The food quality in the canteen was very good with a variety of options available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech in computer science and engineering.
reviews.review_text: Fully climate-controlled classes with comfortable seating for a limited number of students are there. Also, sitting is arranged with drawers and lockers for keeping our books and notes safe and to avoid overloading of the students. We should also be accessible to online learning platforms in case it is needed.

reviews.review_heading: I lived a manifested life at IIT Palakkad.
reviews.review_text: For every department, there were usually 8 to 10 classrooms with required features like smart boards, green boards, projectors, and laptops or computers. To protect students from health issues. A hygienic environment was maintained with clean restrooms and sanitized study areas.

paragraphs: The total tuition fee of MTech at IIT Palakkad is INR 10000 for entire two years although there are other components that might be added to total tuition fee at time of admission. The total fee is calculated based on annual/ semester fee available for academic year 2023-24 hence is indicative.
SC/ST students with a family income below INR 4.5 Lacs receive a full tuition and hostel fee waiver, free messing, and pocket allowance of INR 250 per month.

Yes, the institute provides scholarships such as Merit Cum Means Scholarships for Professional and Technical Courses, Scholarships for Students with Disabilities, Top Class Education Scheme for SC students, National Fellowship and Scholarships for Higher Education for ST students, Central Sector Scheme For Central Armed Police Forces and Assam Rifles, Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for RPF/RPSF and Financial Support to the students of NER for Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit scholarship).

The MCM Scholarship is given to 25% of high-achieving students with an annual family income of less than INR 4.5 L. It provides a full tuition fee waiver (INR 1 Lacs per semester) as well as a monthly pocket allowance of INR 1,000.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at IIIT Bangalore are the Integrated MTech (iMTech) and BTech programmes. For seeking admission to any of the courses offered at IIIT Bangalore, a candidate must apply for all the courses through online mode. Students can choose from the two prominent specialisations of Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE). IIITB does not conduct any separate entrance examinations for Integrated MTech and postgraduate courses. Candidates seeking admission have to take the national-level exam - JEE Main to qualify for further selection.
ternational Institute of Information Technology, Bangalore tuition fee range from INR 24,296 to 26,32,000 as per the official website.
Below mentioned are the important highlights regarding IIIT Bangalore courses and IIIT Bangalore fees, along with the eigibility criteria:

It offers multiple courses in Engineering, IT and Science such as BTech, MTech, MSc and PhD. Other than the programs at QAUG and PG levels, IIITB also offers Certificate and PG Diploma programmes in multiple specialisations. The Integrated MTech course is a particularly popular choice at IIIT Bangalore. The fee structure at IIIT Bangalore is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of IIIT Bangalore admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. review_summary.college_name: IIIT Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has strong academics, great placements, and good industry exposure at IIIT Bangalore.

content.Placements: Around 95-98% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is around 65 LPA to 70 LPA. The average package is about 24 LPA to 26 LPA, and the lowest package is around 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Top recruiters included Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, Nvidia, Flipkart, Goldman Sachs, and Samsung R&D. Around 80-90% of students got internships, mainly in companies like Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, Nvidia, and Flipkart. Top roles offered are software development engineer (SDE), full-stack/back-end developer, data scientist, machine learning engineer, research engineer, and product engineer.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A wonderful college to turn my dreams into reality.

content.Placements: About 80 to 85% of students are registered. The highest package is around 60 LPA, and the average is around 21 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and many more companies. Top roles offered are data engineer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The total campus is 9 acres of land with modern equipment and rooms made of good infrastructure. Coming to classrooms, they are comfortable for every batch of students. Library is well stocked with all kinds of books. Mess food is completely hygienic and consists of a variety of food items. Medical facilities are available 24X7. For sports, there is sufficient ground to play.

paragraphs: The application process, appearing in the entrance exam, counselling, and seat allotment, is included in theIIIT Bangalore admission process.  Aspirants should carefully check the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired programme. Below the admission procedure is explained briefly:
1: IIIT Bangalore Application Process 2025

Students have to apply on the official website of the accepted entrance exam and the institute's website. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course. The application portal is open online and eligible students can apply within the specified deadline.
2: IIIT Bangalore Selection Process

IIIT Bangalore cutoff listis released after the entrance exams for shortlisting the students. Those with valid scores need to apply for the counselling process through the official website of the concerned bodies. Students based on their scores, are allotted the branch/specialisation.
For IIIT Bangalore PhD admission, Students have to take a written test and go through an interview for selection.
3: IIIT Bangalore Final Seat Allotment

Students during their counselling process have to report to the admission cell at IIIT Bangalore for physical reporting along with all the required documents for verification purposes and tuition fee payment for final seat allotment.

The course fee varies from one course to another.IIIT Bangalore feeof each course is inclusive of multiple components such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Moreover, some of these components must be paid semester-wise, while some are chargeable one-time. faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore MTech fee ranges betweenINR 3.3 lakh and INR 26.3 lakhfor the integrated MTech programmes. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee. Apart from the mentioned tuition fee, candidates are also required to pay a one-time refundable Library Deposit fee ofINR 4,000. The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What GATE score is required for IIIT Bangalore M.Tech admission?
faqs.answer: IIIT Bangalore considers GATE score for admission to MTech programme. In 2023, admission were offered in MTech ECE to candidates with GATE score up to 430. Whereas the closing cutoff for CSE was 480. GATE cutoff score depends upon the applications received and is not fixed. Candidates with score equal or above the GATE cutoff are offered admission in the MTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of IIIT Bangalore?

courses_data.name: IIIT Bangalore MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIIT Bangalore offers a two-year MSc programme in Digital Society. Admission to the course is entrance-based. The institute accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET or TISSNET for admission to MSc programme. Aspirants who have qualified any of the accepted exam are exempted from appearing for the written test conducted by the institute. Aspirants should check the eligibility criteria before applying for the course admission. Check below for more details about the course. Download:IIIT Bangalore MSc Brochure

faqs.question: What is the application fee for IIIT Bangalore MSc admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MSc at IIIT Bangalore are required to register first on the Pravesh Portal of IIITB (pravesh.iiitb.net). To apply online, candidates need to pay a non-refundable fee ofINR 1,000as an application fee. The fee payment can be done via credit card/debit card/net banking. Application form is submitted successfully only after the successful application fee payment.

faqs.question: Is there direct admission at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore does not offer direct admission. Candidates are offered seat in the institute based on their score in the entrance-exam. IIIT Bangalore accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech programmes. The institute conducts a test for admission to MSc and PhD courses. Besides, IIIT Bangalore also accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET, TISSNET, etc. for admission to specific courses.
