faqs.question: Is there direct admission at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore does not offer direct admission. Candidates are offered seat in the institute based on their score in the entrance-exam. IIIT Bangalore accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech programmes. The institute conducts a test for admission to MSc and PhD courses. Besides, IIIT Bangalore also accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET, TISSNET, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIIT Bangalore through JEE?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. JEE Main is necessary if the aspirant is applying for BTech programme. For all other courses, candidates do not require JEE Main score. Mere qualifying JEE Main does not guarantee admission in the BTech programme of IIIT Bangalore. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility requirement specific to BTech course for admission.

faqs.question: How hard is it to get into IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Admissions at IIIT Bangalore are entrance-based. The institute selects students based on scores in national-level examinations such asJEE Main,CAT,MAT,GATE,XAT,CMAT, etc. Candidates need to qualify JEE Main exam to get admission to Engineering courses. Cracking JEE Main is surely not an easy task and requires complete dedication towards the study. But one thing that can make theJEE Main preparationeasy is to study in a planned manner with a strategy.JEE's Main question paperis divided into three sections: Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. All three sections are equally important, and therefore, aspirants should ensure that they cover the syllabus for all three sections.

faqs.question: Where will the college place its students who are doing Integrated MTech programme from IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: After doing Integrated M.Tech programme from IIIT Bangalore, students are usually placed in Core sector followed by Technology, IT and other allied sectors. The top recruiters during IIIT Bangalore placements 2025 included companies such as Amazon, Bosch, Oracle and Samsung.The overall highest package recorded during iMTech placements 2025 was INR 145 LPA.

placement_data.title: IIIT Bangalore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest package recorded during International Institute of Information Technology placement 2025 was INR 145 LPA . A total of 656 offers were made in 2025. Out of the total offers, 306 offers were full-time and 350 were internship offers .

According to the official report, 14 students were placed with package above INR 60 LPA during IIIT Bangalore placement 2025. 54 students were placed with package between 40 LPA and 60 LPA . Most number of students, i.e. 86 students were placed with salary package between 20 LPA and 30 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics, great placements, and good industry exposure at IIIT Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities for our department are very good. The campus has 24/7 high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs with updated systems, and smart classrooms with projectors. A well-stocked library is available with textbooks, research papers, and online resources. Hostel facilities are decent and comfortable, with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, laundry, and basic amenities. The mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen has limited but affordable options. Medical facilities are avai...

reviews.review_heading: A wonderful college to turn my dreams into reality.
reviews.review_text: The total campus is 9 acres of land with modern equipment and rooms made of good infrastructure. Coming to classrooms, they are comfortable for every batch of students. Library is well stocked with all kinds of books. Mess food is completely hygienic and consists of a variety of food items. Medical facilities are available 24X7. For sports, there is sufficient ground to play.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you focus on placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is provided, and all sports facilities are available. Considering the 9-acre campus, there is no swimming pool or separate football and cricket ground. The ground is small. Academic-related facilities, like labs and others, are also provided. Hostel facilities are also decent.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bangalore is a premier institute for its engineering and IT programs.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best here. We have labs for almost everything related to electronics. Library has books of every sort, from fiction to reference books. Hostel is very good. We are provided with 3 sharing rooms with ample space to keep a table, bed, and cupboard.

reviews.review_heading: Just few things about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good here. The classrooms are also very good and comfortable. The hostel rooms are of single occupation for girls and single to triple occupation for boys. The quality of the mess food is reasonable. And there is good encouragement for different kinds of sports here .

reviews.review_heading: A good college if the student focuses on knowledge and education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are better than other colleges. Each floor and each room are well-equipped with Wi-Fi. Labs are well-managed and up-to-date with technology. Classrooms are better than usual classrooms, equipped with ACs and proper digital smartboards. The library is quite impressive as it holds a large number of books to choose from. The facilities in the hostel are very good. Proper maintenance and cleaning are done on a regular basis. The food in the mess are better than othe...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with nice faculty and placements. Except for the campus, which is really small.
reviews.review_text: There is great Wi-Fi service provided by the college. Even the mess food is good. The lab is fully functional and kept up-to-date. The hostels are really kept clean and tidy. They have staff to look after cleanliness. The food is also good for nutrition and is a balanced diet. The classrooms are well maintained. The labs also allow you to learn about real-world problems.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a gym, a basketball court, a tennis court, a badminton court, a football ground, a volleyball court, etc. The hostel facilities are good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Very good exposure to explore more opportunities. Excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at almost every place in the Institute with excellent speed. Classrooms and Labs are very good with the latest technologies like projectors etc. The library is well built and has a wide collection of relevant and the latest books. The hostels, mess food, and canteen are all very good. Doctors frequently come to campus for medical facilities, every student has health insurance for emergency cases. Almost every sport facility is provided in the campus, Just the football ground c...

reviews.review_heading: I feel blessed to be part of one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well furnished, we have single rooms from 3rd year till 5th year in case of integrated M.Tech and case of M.Tech, we get a single room from the very first day. Fooding is also awesome in terms of hygiene, we have meals four times a day each day that contains milk and curd all the time. We have 24x7 Wi-Fi available with a speed of more than 200 Mbps. Our library contains a plethora of books from all fields, the library is fully air-conditioned and it is open for students till 1 AM.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the placement facilities and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent, with all the equipment available. The mess serves 4 meals a day. The food is better than what one expects from a mess. The menu is changed every 2 weeks. From this year onwards, non-veg has also been introduced to mess. Medical facilities could be better as the doctor is not available 24*7. In sports, we have volleyball, basketball, cricket, football, badminton, table tennis, foosball, etc., are available. Sports equipment is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: IIITB was the institute of my dreams.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs and classrooms on our campus. It has an electronics lab-CEEMS, HideS, robotics club, BITES etc. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have a huge library (big enough for all the students on campus) with a very good collection of books on all kinds of educational topics. Hostel facilities are quite good. Even if we get any problems with the facilities, the administration sorts them out quickly (this is one of the things I like so much about the college). Food quality is quite...

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bangalore has a great infrastructure and amazing learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college is situated in Electronic City Phase 2 and has a beautiful campus with greenery around. The classrooms are really up to the standard of any top-notch college in India and abroad. We have access to the vast library, and we get access to it even after completing the course for about 6-8 months. The hostel is decent, but as I am a resident of that location, I have not opted for it. Many of my friends stay in the hostel and are recommended for students who come from different places.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to learn and innovate with excellent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides large air-conditioned classrooms to accommodate 150 students and recorded lectures. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the library is supported by Infosys, MINRO, i.e., Machine Intelligence and Robotics Centre to support startups. There are innovation labs like Goru labs. Computer labs are equipped with ubuntu installed in machines. In the hostel, single rooms are available for masters students. They provide hot water facility in the morning and evening and 24 hours water faci...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing Life at IIITB, One of the BEST college in INDIA !
reviews.review_text: The campus has 4 main buildings which comprise of Admin block, Men's Hostel, Women's Hostel and Innovation Centre. There is 24*7 access to Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. All the labs in IIITB are designed and built as per the highest global standards. IIITB has smart classrooms with smart boards, high-speed data networks and LCD projectors. There is a huge library with an immense number of books, journals and newspapers. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls with individual shari...

college_info.intro:
The Banasthali Vidyapith lagship programmes offered at Banasthali Vidyapith include BTech, BSc and MBA. Apart from this, the university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in the disciplines of Mathematics, Science, Management, Commerce, Arts, Engineering, Aviation, Education, Design, Law and Journalism. The university offers distance learning programmes to its students. The institute has been ranked #66 by the NIRF 2025 under the category University, #71 under Engineering, and #22 under Pharmacy. It provides 61 master's programmes and 32 doctoral degrees in the fields of Humanities, Social Sciences, Sciences, Law, Education, Commerce, and Management. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This university is one of the best in Jaipur

review_content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university has good placement opportunities. Many well-known tech companies visit this university every year for placements. The highest package of this university is 47 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes. After pursuing this course, you will enhance your career in the Biology department, as you will become a nurse in a well-educated hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 200 students in my course, and as the graduation approached, I think only 1/4th would be. The highest package is 28 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. All the companies visit and hire in mass but the top one would be Deloitte. I think the top roles would be B.E/B.Tech and B.A.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is well known in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This University is mainly for girls and we highlight that this University is best in placement purpose. There are many courses offered by this University and the highest package of this University is 45 LPA and the lowest package of this University is 7 LPA. At least 65 percent is required by the students for the internship opportunities and many roles are offered by this University.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of B.A. in this University is very good. There are many facilities so I can easily pursue this course. There are many facilities provided by this University like all-time Wi-Fi facilities for the students. The University classrooms are fully air-conditioned and there are many hostels in this University because no day scholars are allowed, where students live together. There are many extra facilities available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our 850-acre residential women's campus hosts 25,000 students with elite sports and vibrant fests.

content.Placements: The majority of students were successfully placed in the B.Com. The highest package is approximately 7 LPA. Top recruiters are Deloitte, Deutsche Bank, Planetspark, PWC, Ditto Insurance, McDonald, DE Shaw, and others. Roles offered to students include Audit Assurance, Insurance Advisory, Management trainee, Executive trainee, Audit Assistant, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are far better than those of other semi-private colleges available in India. The quality of hostels is very good, the food was also better, and with a variety on each weekday. If we talk about sports facilities, they are outstanding, the trainers are very good in nature, and they provide students with quality time and guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This university is one of the best in Jaipur

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university has good placement opportunities. Many well-known tech companies visit this university every year for placements. The highest package of this university is 47 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes. After pursuing this course, you will enhance your career in the Biology department, as you will become a nurse in a well-educated hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.

content.Placements: There are almost 200 students in my course, and as the graduation approached, I think only 1/4th would be. The highest package is 28 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. All the companies visit and hire in mass but the top one would be Deloitte. I think the top roles would be B.E/B.Tech and B.A.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university offers the best placement opportunities for students. The highest package of this university is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 7 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this course is best for students. In one semester, many facilities are provided, such as all-time Wi-Fi. This university has a big library, where students can study books and novels. There are many hostels in this university for students. This provide a good environment. The food quality in this university is also very good. The university conducts many fests every year.

admission_overview.college_name: Banasthali Vidyapith Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Banasthali Vidyapith admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university has its own entrance exam called Banasthali University Aptitude Test. The in-house entrance exam is conducted for admission to its various UG and PG courses.

The admission processis entirely based on merit or BUAT as per course requirements. The university conducts an aptitude test to select candidates for most of the UG and PG courses. Find below the topBV coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) in the Science stream withPhysics, Chemistry, and Mathematics orBiologyfor (Biotechnology) as compulsory subjects from a recognised school

courses_data.name: Banasthali Vidyapith MBA Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Banasthali Vidyapith offers a full-timeMaster of Business Administration (MBA)of two-year duration. The programme offers an industry-oriented programme is divided into four semesters. Banasthali Vidyapith MBA admission is merit-cum-aptitude test-based. The university conducts the Banasthali University Aptitude Test to select candidates. Besides, candidates must complete a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a university recognised by the Association of Indian Universities to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Banasthali for MBA?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith admissions for MBA is based on entrance-exam. The university conducts an aptitude test to select candidates for MBA programme. BUAT is conducted for three hours in online mode once in a year. Aspirants who have qualified the entrance exam are called for counselling and seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Is Banasthali University good for an MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of Banasthali Vidyapith. Talking about placements, the median package offered in 2023 to PG two-year course isINR 4.01 LPA. A total of 411 students were placed in top companies. ITC, Axis bank, Philips, Decathlon and IBM visited the campus in recent past during Banasthali Vidyapith MBA placements.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA in Banasthali Vidyapith?
faqs.answer: Yes, Banasthali Vidyapith conducts an aptitude test for admission to MBA programme. It is an online test conducted for three hours. The test is divided into four sections. Find them below:Language Comprehension (English & Hindi)Mathematical SkillsData Analysis & SufficiencyIntelligence & Critical Reasoning

faqs.question: Is there direct admission in Banasthali University?
faqs.answer: Bananasthali Vidyapith course admissions to all courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers admission to various UG and PG courses. The university conductes Banasthali University Aptitude Test for admission to selective courses such as BTech, MBA, BSc Nursing, LLM, etc. There is no way to get direct admission to these courses. Admissions are solely based on entrance exam. However for courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, etc.,. There is no requirement to qualify for any entrance exam. Candidates are only required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria and fill an online application form. Based on the past academic records of the applicants, the university will select the right candidates.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Banasthali Vidyapith offers?
faqs.answer: The university offers 15+ undergraduate courses in the disciplines of Mathematics, Science, Management, Commerce, Arts, Engineering, Aviation, Education, Design, Law, and Journalism. It also offers 60+ masters and 25+ PhD courses in the disciplines of Humanities, Social Sciences, Law, Education, Commerce and Management. The popular courses of Banasthali Vidyapith are BTech and MBA. These courses are offered across various specialisations. Admission to most of the courses at Banashtali Vidyapith is entrance-based. Whereas, for other courses, candidates are selected based on their previous merit scores.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Banasthali Vidyapith admission form?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith admissions are currently open. The university usually releases the admission form in April. Since admission to some of the courses is entrance-based, the university also releases the dates for the aptitude test. The university conducts Banasthali University Aptitude Test in June for different courses.

faqs.question: How to get into BCom courses at Banasthali Vidyapith?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith BCom is a three years UG-level programme. The university admits students to its BCom course based on marks obtained by students in Class 12. Admission process of BCom at Banasthali Vidyapith can be divided into three steps. Following is a detailed explanation of these stages:Application process- Banasthali Vidyapith offers two modes for interested students to submit their applicants. First is the online mode. In this mode students are required to visit the university’s official website and fill out the applicant form.The second is the offline mode. Students who wish to submit their application offline, require to first send DD/IPO for INR 1,000 in favor of "Banasthali Vidyapith" payable at Banasthali/Jaipur in order to obtain a prospectus and application form. It is to be sent to Secretary-Banasthali Vidyapith, P.O. Banasthali Vidyapith -304022, Rajasthan, INDIA. Upon receival of the DD, the university will send the application form along with the prospectus.Shortl

placement_data.title: Banasthali Vidyapith Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement details of 2025 batch are yet to be released on the official website of Banasthali Vidyapith University. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report, 804 BTech students were placed from the total 692 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 9.5 LPA . In MTech , 12 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 7.25 LPA.

In PG 2 year program , 423 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 4.25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Banasthali Vidyapith University in the recent past include Accenture, DE Shaw, Deloitte, TCS, Infosys , etc.

nirf.description:
Banasthali Vidyapith has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 1 rank to #66 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 7 ranks to #71 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 6 ranks to #22 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

qs_world.description:
Banasthali Vidyapith has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Banasthali Vidyapith indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Banasthali Vidyapith fell 80 ranks to #741 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Banasthali Vidyapith fell 22 ranks to #224 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

highlights: Build collections and create tools to support research and learning;
Maximise access to and promote the use of internal as well as external information resources;
Ensure the preservation and long-lasting availability of library resources;
Create attractive and comfortable  physical and virtual environments for study and research;
Collaborate with Vidyapith faculty and researchers to enrich the collection services.

hostel.description: There are 29 hostels with a capacity of housing 110 to 438 students. The student admitted to the University will compulsorily have to join a hostel unless the student is a ward of a worker of the University and stays with him/her in the campus or the student belongs to a neighboring village community within a radius of 2.5 Km. There are 31 student hostels on the campus of the University. There is a different number of rooms in each hostel ranging from 80 to 120. All rooms are well furnished with basic amenities provided. Each hostel has a separate Mess, Newspaper and Telephone facility.

data: High-speed internet and power, a secure environment, a swimming pool, an athletic ground, hostels and more

library.description: the Central Library’s collection of 200000 books, reports, theses, dissertations, bound journals, manuscripts, albums, pamphlets, maps, charts, audio/video cassettes, gramophone records, CDs/DVDs, atlas, slides and many more. The library currently receives over 300 national and international journals. About 9000+ journals are accessible online under UGC-INFONET Consortia. The library offers Reference Services, Users’ Orientation Services, Circulation Services, Current Awareness Services, and Plagiarism Checking. In addition to the Central Library, there are 9 departmental libraries in the higher education system and 3 school libraries. All the libraries have been using the LIBSYS, an Integrated Library Management software package with all the modules for the library housekeeping operations.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball, Archery, Horse Riding, Hockey, Aerobics and Yoga, Handball, Track Field, Kho-Kho courts, Javlin, High Jump, Shooting Range, Marshal Arts

reviews.review_heading: This is best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of B.A. in this University is very good. There are many facilities so I can easily pursue this course. There are many facilities provided by this University like all-time Wi-Fi facilities for the students. The University classrooms are fully air-conditioned and there are many hostels in this University because no day scholars are allowed, where students live together. There are many extra facilities available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our 850-acre residential women's campus hosts 25,000 students with elite sports and vibrant fests.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are far better than those of other semi-private colleges available in India. The quality of hostels is very good, the food was also better, and with a variety on each weekday. If we talk about sports facilities, they are outstanding, the trainers are very good in nature, and they provide students with quality time and guidance.

reviews.review_heading: This university is one of the best in Jaipur
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this course is best for students. In one semester, many facilities are provided, such as all-time Wi-Fi. This university has a big library, where students can study books and novels. There are many hostels in this university for students. This provide a good environment. The food quality in this university is also very good. The university conducts many fests every year.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good at helping students to achieve their goals.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in hostel are very good in my hostel, not all hostels are good but mine is perfect for me. The food they provide is very healthy and tasty. Infrastructure and facilities in classroom and college are also good, which also helps us to study properly in a peaceful space. There are many libraries in which we can study.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and knowledgeable teacher but no placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Rooms are spacious and comfortable and that place is so peaceful in itself, which leads to mind peace. As it total girls university so the security is also apt. ACs are not allowed there, and girls have to survive in the fans which leads to an increase in their strength.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this course is best for the students. There are many facilities provided such as all time Wi-Fi facilities. There are many classrooms for the students that provide the best environment. Many hostels are available in this University where students live together.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The university is very big. There are many hostels where students live together. Many facilities are provided, including Wi-Fi. The college has a big library. Students from different courses can access according to their time allotment. The hostels are very big. The food quality in every hostel is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Seats in classrooms are very comfortable, and departments are highly maintained, especially the one of my course. The hostel is properly furnished, and wardens are kind. Food is not up to the mark, but you can find all the sports facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: The college, hostels and teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of department is good. The hostels are well maintained and clean, but not all hotels are because a few hostels are old, but I don't like one thing, they can't give AC or cooler in the room. In the room, there are only wall fans on each bed and they don't allow us to bring any coolers, they only allow a table fan. And the quality of mess food is sometimes really good and tasty, and sometimes it's just okay. The mess food isn't same in every hostel because it's de...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good, girls always feel safe, everything is good, and everyone helps each other.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is very good, and the food is very nice. The medical facilities and sports are very good. So many games are here, and we can play every game here. Extra activities include development courses and a Certificate course (language, dancing, etc. ).

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, placement and infrastructure of my college.
reviews.review_text: Class infrastructure is very good, and the library has many books that are sufficient for us. Labs are also in very good condition. My hostel is good, but there are 2 or 3 hostels here whose conditions are very bad. Due to my luck, I got a good hostel with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Needs some polishing, but still satisfied, glad to be here.
reviews.review_text: Departments and hostels provide a good Wi-Fi facility. The labs are also always available, clean, and updated. The libraries are huge. All kinds of books are available, and they have a huge collection. And not just one but multiple libraries. Hostel food is okay-ish; you can survive away from home. You'll still miss your home's food, obviously, but it's manageable. Canteen food is also great, at times expensive for some. Medical facilities are not that great. Many students have complained about ...

reviews.review_heading: I definitely do not recommend this to anyone.
reviews.review_text: There are many libraries, and each department has its own library. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostels. Classrooms and hostels do not have AC. Even coolers are not allowed in the hostels. There are no ceiling fans in hostel rooms, so students have to survive on wall fans and their personal fans.

college_info.college_name: NIT Srinagar: Cutoff, Placement, Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Ranking

highlights.summary:
NIT Srinagar has been ranked 73rd under the Engineering category by the NIRF 2025 rankings.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - 32 by India Today - 73 by NIRF under the Engineering category

college_info.intro:
The institute offer courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. These courses are made available through the different departments, such as Chemical Engineering, IT, Mathematics, etc. NIT Srinagar is known for its BTech course due to the ‘NIT’ tag and course popularity. BTech at NIT Srinagar is available in CSE, CE, IT, ECE, and more branches. For quality education, NIT Srinagar BTech curriculum is designed for building fundamental understanding and problem-solving skills in students.
The most sought after BTech specialisations at NIT Srinagar include Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics, Engineering, Information Technology, etc. BTech graduates from NIT Srinagar are placed in eminent organisations such as Oracle, Optum, EY, Infosys, etc.
Students can check the below table for NIT Srinagar popular courses, along with the eligibility criteria, and fee details:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIT Srinagar courses are offered at UG, PG and PhD levels to students. The institute offers BTech programmes in several branches such as CE, Civil, CSE, EE, ECE, IT, ME, MME. National Institute of Technology Srinagar, also offers MBA, MSc, and MTech programmes at the PG level. The MTech programmes are offered across Structural Engineering, Microelectronics, Geotechnical Engineering, Mechanical System Design, Water Resource Engineering branches and others.

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Srinagar M.Tech fee is cumulative of multiple components, including tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, and more. These components are either one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. NIT Srinagar M.Tech tuition fee ranges between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 2.6 lakh. The hostel fee is INR 1.14 lakh and one-time is of INR 16,500. Candidates must note that the given fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: A:    Students have to pay the NIT Srinagar admission fees to get a seat at the institute. The amount is different for each programme. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am in my first year of college. It is very good and one of the most beautiful campuses in India.

review_content.Placements: NIT Srinagar has good placement records from the past 5 years. It has almost 100 percent placement records in almost every branch, with an average of 9 LPA. MNCs from across India come here to place students in their companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has very good infrastructure. Every hostel has a nice garden in front of it. There is a badminton court in my hostel where we enjoy playing every day. We have a big ground and good sports equipment, so we enjoy ourselves a lot while playing. We also have a nice view of the mountains.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: An almost good institute with average placements and a beautiful campus.

review_content.Placements: NIT Srinagar's placement ratio is decent, means average placements. In Civil Engineering, there are the best placements. Computer Science and Electronics and Communication have the best placements, while other courses have average placements. I'm a Mechanical Engineering student, so in my course, approximately 80-85 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 35 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and some courses are NBA-accredited. There are all facilities for our course. It includes good Wi-Fi, classrooms with both smartboards and whiteboards, and good-quality labs. The food is good, and they prepare all Indian foods, both South and North. Sports facilities are also good, with a cricket ground, badminton courts, basketball courts, volleyball courts, etc. There are many canteens, but one problem is that there is no night canteen.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of NIT Srinagar must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at NIT Srinagar is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of NIT Srinagar admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 45,000 - 5,00,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at NIT Srinagar.

NIT Srinagar BTech tuition fee is INR 5 lakh. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicat

course_faqs.question: Is the BTech fees different between branches of NIT Srinagar?
course_faqs.answer: No, the BTech fees at NIT Srinagar remains the same across all specialisations. The NIT Srinagar BTech fees structure also remains the same between the same specialisations. All NIT Srinagar fees is either charged on per semester basis or are one-time payments.

course_faqs.question: Can I get a refund of the NIT Srinagar BTech fees?
course_faqs.answer: NIT Srinagar BTech fees is not refundable under any circumstances. This applies to all fee components except the caution deposit which is refunded upon the completion of the BTech fees without any interest.Candidates can only get refunds if they choose to cancel their admissions during the JoSAA counseling rounds.

overview_faqs.question: What is NIT Srinagar famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: NIT Srinagar is popularly known for its Engineering courses in various specialisations such as Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and others. NIT Srinagar appoints experienced and well-trained faculty members with years of experience. The institute has training and placement cells which help the students get good jobs in top MNC companies.

review_summary.college_name: NIT Srinagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Come to NIT Srinagar if this is your last and best option.

content.Placements: Unfortunately, in my course, placements are very low. The maximum package for this year is 8 LPA, 8–10 students got placed for the same amount, so it can be considered as an average package as well. Most of the students got internships in good companies like DRDO, HPCL, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is fine. Classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is also available. Labs need some maintenance. The library is well maintained but very small and congested. Mess food is just edible, canteen food is far better. For common health issues, medical facilities can help you, but for bigger issues, the college will prefer you go to a government hospital. Most of the sports courts are here. If you are a sportsperson, you will be happy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Improving gradually in 2025.

content.Placements: This year, the placements have been decent. As per the data provided by the placement cell of NIT Srinagar, 67% of students of Computer Science and Engineering are placed this year, up to now, with a median package of approximately 9 LPA, and the average package is around 8.5 LPA. The highest package is 24 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Physics Wallah, Oracle, Microsoft, and Make My Trip. This year, from my course, we have plenty of internship programs offered by Microsoft, but only 40% students opted for internships.
content.Infrastructure: As per the needs of the modern world, I don't think that we have the required facilities and infrastructure available in NIT Srinagar, classrooms are not well maintained, and many tools for doing experiments are outdated, yet we have Wi-Fi facilities and all kinds of labs. Hostels are built according to old standards, but the new mega hostel will be ready this year. Food is good with all sorts of requirements for a balanced diet. There are 2-3 canteens for each station, fast food, daily use items and stalls, they have all the required items you desire. A big playground is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am in my first year of college. It is very good and one of the most beautiful campuses in India.

content.Placements: NIT Srinagar has good placement records from the past 5 years. It has almost 100 percent placement records in almost every branch, with an average of 9 LPA. MNCs from across India come here to place students in their companies.
content.Infrastructure: It has very good infrastructure. Every hostel has a nice garden in front of it. There is a badminton court in my hostel where we enjoy playing every day. We have a big ground and good sports equipment, so we enjoy ourselves a lot while playing. We also have a nice view of the mountains.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: An almost good institute with average placements and a beautiful campus.

content.Placements: NIT Srinagar's placement ratio is decent, means average placements. In Civil Engineering, there are the best placements. Computer Science and Electronics and Communication have the best placements, while other courses have average placements. I'm a Mechanical Engineering student, so in my course, approximately 80-85 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 35 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and some courses are NBA-accredited. There are all facilities for our course. It includes good Wi-Fi, classrooms with both smartboards and whiteboards, and good-quality labs. The food is good, and they prepare all Indian foods, both South and North. Sports facilities are also good, with a cricket ground, badminton courts, basketball courts, volleyball courts, etc. There are many canteens, but one problem is that there is no night canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good for students in higher branches like CSE and ECE, with a nice campus and location.

content.Placements: Placements are good in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and other major branches. The highest package is around 35 LPA, and the average is around 13 LPA for CSE and other major branches. In lower branches, the average is around 8-9 LPA. Many companies, such as BPCL, ONGC, and HPCL, recruit from core branches. Approximately 80-85% of students are placed in major branches.
content.Infrastructure: Mechanical and ECE departments are accredited. Wi-Fi is slow in hostels but good in academic areas. Mess food is manageable but not very good. A new hostel is being built for more convenience. Geysers, 24/7 water, and electricity are available. Cupboards are provided in the rooms, and single rooms are available for 4th-year students. Labs are good, with equipment and support staff.

admission_overview.title: NIT Srinagar Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIT Srinagar admissions are entrance-based for all the courses. The institute offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes. Its flagship course is BTech for which admission is done based on JEE Main scores. NIT Srinagar also offers MSc, MTech, and MBA programmes. Students shortlisted through JEE Main and GATE exams need to appear for JoSAA and CCMT Counselling for admissions to BTech and MTech respectively. The admission criteria vary from one course to another. The application process can be completed online. In the following sections, details about NIT Srinagar admissions to the offered courses are provided briefly.

paragraphs: TheNIT Srinagar admission processis different for each programme. The complete process involves registration, selection rounds, cutoff release, merit list, and counselling for seat allotment. Details about each of the admission stages are as given below:
NIT Srinagar Application Process 2026

For admission to NIT Srinagar, students are required to complete the application process of the course-specific entrance test. Aspirants have to visit the respective exam conducting body's official website to apply. However, forNIT Srinagar PhD admission, candidates shall visit the institute's official website (nitsri.ac.in) to apply.
Selection Rounds

Candidates become eligible for participation in the selection rounds if they meet theNIT Srinagar cutofffor the respective course.NIT Srinagar admissionis based on merit in JEE Main score followed by JoSAA Counselling. In addition, admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling

A course-wise merit list is released to indicate the minimum marks required for admission. Aspirants must score equal or above NIT Srinagar cutoff for admission. The shortlisted candidates then have to take part in the respective counselling process such as JoSAA for BTech, CCMT for MTech, and CCMN for MSc. Candidates who get selected become eligible for admission.
Admission Confirmation
After the conclusion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates can pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

TheNIT Srinagar fee structureinclude numerous components. Some of these are - tuition fees, security deposit, alumni fee, hostel fee, and more. Students have to pay some amount of the total fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation. The rest can be paid semester-wise/ yearly as specified. The amount can be paid through the accepted payment gateways. Check below theNIT Srinagar feesand median package for courses:
Course Name
Total Tuition Fee (Investment)

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for NIT Srinagar BTech?
faqs.answer: Aspirants should have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised board to apply for BTech. The qualifying exam should have been passed with a minimum of 75% aggregate. Only the students who meet this criteria can take admission with a valid JEE Main rank in a NIT Srinagar BTech programme. The official documents also have to be submitted for verification.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for BTech programme at NIT Srinagar?
faqs.answer: NIT Srinagar BTech admission process is done based on candidates' JEE Main rank. The admission is completely entrance-based and there is no other provision for selection. Eligible students can visit the NTA official website to apply. After the entrance exam, a cutoff list is released. Students who meet the cutoff criteria can participate in JoSAA counselling for seat allotment. In case seats are left vacant in JoSAA counselling, then those are filled through CSAB counselling process.

placement_data.title: NIT Srinagar Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NIT Srinagar placement brochure is released of the academic year 2025-26. The highest package offered stood at INR 35.5 LPA . The average and median package offered were INR 8.9 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA , respectively. The season 2025 achieved a placement rate of 76.94% and placed a total of 504 students. Moreover, the highest and average packages offered to the CSE branch stood at INR 19.2 LPA and INR 11 LPA , respectively. Additonally, 80 companies participated during the NIT Srinagar placement drive and Google, Microsoft and Deloitte , etc. were among the top recruiters.

description: NIT Srinagar cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Srinagar JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Srinagar JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Srinagar JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Srinagar CSE cutoff 2025 was 31866 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 45167 and 61539, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cuto

For the General AI category students, the NIT Srinagar B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 31866 and 93661 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 31866 and 38429, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Srinagar. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Srinagar to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Srinagar. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering and M.Tech. in Communication and Information Technology with last round cutoff scores of 425 and 406, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 425. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 315 and 384 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Srinagar - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Srinagar CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Srinagar MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 1682 and 3036. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 1682 was M.Sc. in Chemistry in the General AI category. This indicates that this specialisa

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 3036 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Chemistry and M.Sc. in Physics, with last round closing ranks of and , respectively, in the G

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Srinagar admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

NIT Srinagar also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech admission. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Srinagar can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs trends for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Srinagar CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science & Engineering and Communication and Information Technology, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Structural Engineering and Transportation Engineering and Planning had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

reviews.review_heading: Come to NIT Srinagar if this is your last and best option.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fine. Classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is also available. Labs need some maintenance. The library is well maintained but very small and congested. Mess food is just edible, canteen food is far better. For common health issues, medical facilities can help you, but for bigger issues, the college will prefer you go to a government hospital. Most of the sports courts are here. If you are a sportsperson, you will be happy.

reviews.review_heading: Improving gradually in 2025.
reviews.review_text: As per the needs of the modern world, I don't think that we have the required facilities and infrastructure available in NIT Srinagar, classrooms are not well maintained, and many tools for doing experiments are outdated, yet we have Wi-Fi facilities and all kinds of labs. Hostels are built according to old standards, but the new mega hostel will be ready this year. Food is good with all sorts of requirements for a balanced diet. There are 2-3 canteens for each station, fast food, daily use item...

reviews.review_heading: I am in my first year of college. It is very good and one of the most beautiful campuses in India.
reviews.review_text: It has very good infrastructure. Every hostel has a nice garden in front of it. There is a badminton court in my hostel where we enjoy playing every day. We have a big ground and good sports equipment, so we enjoy ourselves a lot while playing. We also have a nice view of the mountains.

reviews.review_heading: An almost good institute with average placements and a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and some courses are NBA-accredited. There are all facilities for our course. It includes good Wi-Fi, classrooms with both smartboards and whiteboards, and good-quality labs. The food is good, and they prepare all Indian foods, both South and North. Sports facilities are also good, with a cricket ground, badminton courts, basketball courts, volleyball courts, etc. There are many canteens, but one problem is that there is no night canteen.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for students in higher branches like CSE and ECE, with a nice campus and location.
reviews.review_text: Mechanical and ECE departments are accredited. Wi-Fi is slow in hostels but good in academic areas. Mess food is manageable but not very good. A new hostel is being built for more convenience. Geysers, 24/7 water, and electricity are available. Cupboards are provided in the rooms, and single rooms are available for 4th-year students. Labs are good, with equipment and support staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Placement is good, and the facility is also good.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and all facilities. Wi-Fi is everywhere. Classrooms are good. Library is good and canteen is available. The food is not very good. There are a lot of facilities in sports like badminton, volleyball, cricket, etc. Medical facilities are also good, we get good treatment.

reviews.review_heading: Average colleges don't take your expectations very high while getting into NIT Srinagar.
reviews.review_text: As a National institute, you expect a good infrastructure but it's not a good campus infrastructure. You may feel a lack of privacy and find it difficult to adjust at first in hostels. The canteen's facilities are not good, and you also get restrictions for visiting outside of campus and the hostel in terms of timing. You have to share a room with 5 students, and the room is not in very good condition. You will get Wi-Fi facilities. Department buildings are decent. Hostel food is not good. As yo...

reviews.review_heading: NIT Srinagar - National Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful. Dal Lake is right beside the college. The campus is a little small though. In sports, there are basketball, volleyball, cricket, football, tennis, table tennis, chess, and carrom. There is a canteen, a cafeteria, and some stationery shops.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion for NIT Srinagar.
reviews.review_text: Due to the low temperature here, heaters are available in the library and classroom, and Wi-Fi facility is also available. There are all labs available for all branches, like for civil – geotechnical, highway, transportation, structural, concrete lab available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Srinagar - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very nice due to the cold environment here. Heaters are available in the classrooms. Smart boards are installed in each class, and medical facilities are very good, with a medical unit on campus. There is a big library that is open till 12 at night. Open-air campus Wi-Fi is also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: My review of NIT(National Institute of Technology) Srinagar.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities and infrastructure are relatively nice. There are pretty good Wi-Fi lab facilities, well-maintained classrooms, a library, and nice medical facilities for sports and games. There is scope for improvement that needs to be addressed. Overall, it is a good college.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Srinagar: Pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi often doesn't work. Although classrooms are spacious. Labs have the required equipment most of the time. The library needs more space. The quality of food is above average. The rooms have 5 occupants each. However, this could change soon since a new hostel is being built.

reviews.review_heading: Some teachers are good, and some are not.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure, beautiful campus life, and sufficient labs and workshops for the mechanical department. In the hostel, there are 5-seater rooms, which are not good, and the mess food is average. Sometimes the hostel Wi-Fi is not working properly. In NIT Srinagar, the best branch is the mechanical department.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Srinagar - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, especially in the winter. The campus has all the necessary facilities required for students. Labs are sufficient and equipped with modern tools. The whole campus is Wi-Fi covered. Classrooms are digitalised, and the library is open from 6 AM to 12 AM. The hostel is okay. 5 students are accommodated in a room for the first year. The mess is okay, with differentiated timings for veg and non-veg, providing 4 meals a day.

reviews.review_heading: Everything needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Labs are decent, but first-year classrooms are not good. The library has a very limited seating capacity. Wi-Fi is available but limited, with unnecessary website restrictions. The mess and canteen are poor. Sports and games are below average. There is not enough infrastructure for sports, with very few events and tournaments.

data.description: NIT Srinagar has separate accommodation for boys and girls. The institute has hostel with all the amenities offered to the students. It includes a computer room, reading room, separate warden quarter and guard rooms at the hostel. The hostel has all the facilities offered to the students with a variety of food options available at the mess.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NIT Srinagar - National Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Vedanta, Capgemini, Wipro, Maruti Suzuki, etc., visited our campus for placements.
In some courses like CS, IT and E&C the college provides very good placements.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: COEP Technological University review.

content.Placements: The majority of the students get placed, the average for the Computer Science and Engineering department is 17 LPA, and the highest is 50+, which is offered to 3-4 students only. The training and placement cell helps students and guides them to better placement opportunities. Top recruiters are De Shaw, Nvidia, Wells Fargo, etc. Around 150 students out of 220 students get internships in their 3-4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: COEP is the regional underdog.

content.Placements: Offers are comparable to the top 10 NITs in CSE. The average package was 17 LPA, median was 15 LPA for 2025. This year, De Shaw hired someone at 60 LPA CTC. Other branches also have decent placement, but due to doubling the intake, the placement might be affected later. Some companies that visit are De Shaw, Nutanix, Texas Instruments, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love the college and its life here.

content.Placements: 85% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 52 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package is 17.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our course are Nutanics, 52.57 Lacs per annum, and DE Shaw, 52 LPA. 92% of students got internships in companies like DE Shaw, Hilti, UBS, Texas Instruments, Mastercard, Nvidia, TCS, Deutsche, Goldman Sachs, and Algoquant. Top roles offered are SDE roles, SWE roles, Data Analyst roles, DevOps Manager.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is a bit weak. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-equipped. The hostel infrastructure really needs to be improved, and the mess food is fine. The sports facilities are good, and our college has its own teams that frequently participate in tournaments. College Sport events also take place.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college for opportunities with a good crowd.

content.Placements: More than 80 percent of students have been placed consistently in recent years. In the previous year, the highest package was 52 LPA, and the average package for the CSE branch is around 17.2 LPA. There is no clear data available on the lowest package. Mastercard, Nutanix, and Oracle are among the top recruiting companies, along with several startups. Around 60–70 percent of students get internships, while the rest are directly hired during the placement season.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are not fully up to date, but classrooms are good. For the CSE course, a new building is constructed and is still under development. But it is well-designed and maintained. Sports facilities are good. The college grounds are located just outside the hostel, so students do not face any difficulty. There are also indoor sports facilities, like a badminton court, within the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning environment with friendly campus vibe .

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our course. around 70% of students get placements. The highest is about 10 to 12 LPA, the lowest is 3-4 LPA, and the average is around 5 to 6 LPA. Companies like TCS and Infosys visit for internships. They also come for roles like design intern. Around 50 to 60% of students also get internships, mostly in companies like TCS, KPIT, or some local industries. The main roles offered are trainee engineer or basic technical support roles, depending on skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is quite good. Classrooms are clean, labs have the basic equipment we need, and the Wi-Fi works fine most of the time. The department has a decent library space, and faculty are supportive and knowledgeable. Hostel facilities are okay. Rooms are simple but livable. The average quality is fine, but it changes daily. Canteen food is better, and we also have basic medical help available on campus.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to MTech at COEP without GATE?
faqs.answer: There is no such provision to get admission to MTech at the College of Engineering Pune (COEP) without having a valid rank/ score in GATE. COEP Technological University (formerly known as COEP) admissions to all courses are strictly based on merit only. Hence, those candidates who do not have a valid score or rank in GATE or MHT-MTech are not eligible for admission to MTech courses of the College of Engineering Pune (COEP).

faqs.answer: For candidates willing to take admission in the College of Engineering Pune (COEP) they have to follow these steps which are given below: -Interested candidates have to take the GATE (Gratitude Aptitude Test in Engineering) exam which is conducted by any one of IITs. faqs.question: What is the COEP Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: COEP Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories belonging to the All India quota. The JEE Main cutoff 2025 ranged from3867to28286for the students belonging to the General AI category in the first and the last round closing ranks. faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at COEP Pune?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme at COEP Technological University (formerly COEP) must fulfil the following requirements:The candidate should have a bachelor’s degree irrespective of the discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories).Candidates who belong from Maharashtra must take the MAH-CET exam conducted by the Maharashtra Government and candidates who are from outside of Maharashtra can take any of the exams, i.e. MAH-CET/ CAT/ ATMA/ CMAT/ XAT/ GMA

faqs.question: Does COEP Pune offer an MBA course to students?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is available in the College of Engineering Pune (COEP). The College of Engineering, Pune (COEP) offers a two year full-time MBA course. The MBA course is designed in a way so that students can gain the required skills and knowledge which is necessary for a great career in Management.The curriculum of the course consists of specialisations like Marketing, Finance, Operations, Human Resources, and Strategic Management. faqs.question: What is the hostel fees at COEP for MBA students?
faqs.answer: COEP MBA students are required to pay somewhere around INR 1.4 Lacs as hostel fees. Hostel fees can vary for each student depending on several factors such as candidate's gender, facilities availed, and the location of the hostel. Candidates can check how each of these factors affect hostel fees by visiting the official website of COEP.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA in COEP?
faqs.answer: COEP Technological University (Formerly COEP), Pune acceptsadmissionin its MBA programme on the scorecard/ rank of many national-level and state-level entrance exams such asMAT,XAT,CAT,CMAT,ATMA, and others. Candidates willing to take admission in the College of Engineering, Pune MBA course must take any of the examinations described above and prepare well to secure a good scorecard/ rank.Applicants who have secured rank above the closing rank specified in the merit list released by COEP because

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by COEP?
faqs.answer: The College of Engineering Pune enroll candidates in its BTech course mainly through MHT-CET and JEE-Main. Registration for MHT-CET usually starts in the month of March and it concludes in April.The second most popular course of VJTI is M.Tech and the candidates willing to take admission in MCA should register GATE exam. Students should prepare well for the said entrance exams to secure good scores/ rank.There are many other UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral courses provided by the COEP under various specialisations. For further queries regarding eligibility for other courses, candidates can refer to coep official website.

faqs.question: Does COEP Pune offer direct admissions?
faqs.answer: No, there is no such provision to get direct admission in any of the UG, PG, or doctoral courses. COEP Technological University (formerly known as COEP) admissions are strictly based on merit only. Therefore, only those candidates who have valid scores/ rank of MHT-CET, GATE, JEE-Main, among others can apply for any of the courses provided by the College of Engineering, Pune (COEP). Hence, the interested candidates need to take these entrance exams according to their choice of course in which they want to enroll.

placement_data.title: COEP  Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: College of Engineering, Pune placement Cell offers students an opportunity to acquire valuable industry experience, serving as a bridge between companies looking for skilled graduates and postgraduates across different fields. College of Engineering, Pune has published its comprehensive placement report for 2025 . Out of 630 eligible students , 528 BTech students successfully obtained placements. Over 560 job offers were extended to students. The highest and average salary packages recorded during the College of Engineering, Pune placements 2025 was INR 52.57 LPA and INR 11.62 LPA , respectively. A total of 245 companies participated in the placement season.
