description: COEP cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the COEP JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

COEP Pune offers admission to UG and PG courses based on various national and state-level exams. The institute offers admission to BTech specialisations based on JEE Main and MHT CET exams. For MBA admission, the institute accepts MAH MBA CET exam scores. Further, for MTech specialisations, MHTCET MTech is the accepted exam. Given below is the cutoff range for COEP Pune based on various exams and the courses offered. The cutoff range given below is as per the General category:

COEP cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 9029 and 28286 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 9029, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 3867.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 9029.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

COEP MHT CET cutoff 2025 will be available on this page soon. In the meatime, students can refer to the COEP MHT CET cutoff 2023 which was published for several BTech specialisations, among which B.Tech. in Computer Engineering emerged as the most competitive one, according to its closing score. COEP Pune cutoff for the BTech courses is based on MHT CET scores for the Home State Quota.
As per the last three years' MHT CET cutoff, COEP Pune cutoff 2023 for B.Tech. in Computer Engineering closed at 99.85 percentile, while in 2022 it closed at 99.77 and 99.75 in 2021.

For B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, the cutoff for 2023 closed at 99.71, and at 99.5 in 2022 and 99.53 in 2021. On analysing the past years’ trends, it is easier to conclude that the these courses are the most popular ones at COEP Pune.

MHT CET cutoff for COEP BTech is released round-wise. It is mandatory for candidates to meet the set deadlines for the entire admission process. Some of the important dates related to MHT CET are given below for College of Engineering Pune BTech cutoff :

The COEP MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 99.73. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 99.78 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at COEP was 99.73. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 99.91 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 99.8.
Analysing the past three years' cutoff, it is evident that the cutoff ranks saw a fluctuation over the years for MBA admission.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test conducted for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff was concluded for all rounds and categories. Students can now view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

COEP MHT CET MTech Cutoff 2025 will be seen on this page soon. Until then, students can refer to the cutoff for 2022. The COEP Pune MTech admissions are based on MHT CET MTech scores followed by counselling.

Going as per the cutoff trends of 2022, the closing percentile for M.Tech. in Construction Management was 382, for M.Tech. in Geotechnical Engineering stood at 14.98 Percentile, for M.Tech. in Environment and Water Resources Engineering again at , for

highlights.description: COEP has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #90 in the Engineering category, and #43 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around COEP rankings:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025
Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025

nirf.description:
COEP has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for COEP indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, COEP fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, COEP fell 13 ranks to #90 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, COEP fell 10 ranks to #43 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.review_heading: COEP Technological University review.
reviews.review_text: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

reviews.review_heading: COEP is the regional underdog.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

reviews.review_heading: I love the college and its life here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a bit weak. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-equipped. The hostel infrastructure really needs to be improved, and the mess food is fine. The sports facilities are good, and our college has its own teams that frequently participate in tournaments. College Sport events also take place.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for opportunities with a good crowd.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not fully up to date, but classrooms are good. For the CSE course, a new building is constructed and is still under development. But it is well-designed and maintained. Sports facilities are good. The college grounds are located just outside the hostel, so students do not face any difficulty. There are also indoor sports facilities, like a badminton court, within the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with friendly campus vibe .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is quite good. Classrooms are clean, labs have the basic equipment we need, and the Wi-Fi works fine most of the time. The department has a decent library space, and faculty are supportive and knowledgeable. Hostel facilities are okay. Rooms are simple but livable. The average quality is fine, but it changes daily. Canteen food is better, and we also have basic medical help available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in college.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities it has some decent food quality issues but the rest is all good. The locality of the hostel is in a good area of the city with great infrastructure. I am a local so I do not know much about this but all I have heard is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is living up to its reputation with great faculty and an amazing student crowd.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is based on the old architecture of the college, but the labs and classrooms are newly developed and are well-equipped. Wi-Fi speed fluctuates, but is decent. The library may seem a bit old. The mess is average, and sometimes, on special occasions, a different menu is opted for. Overall, extracurricular activities are taken care of.

reviews.review_heading: Decent and nice campus life, enjoy life in college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the department are good, like the labs are well-maintained, the classrooms are decent, and the Wi-Fi quality is good in specific areas only. The hostel is not that good, and the capacity is not for everyone. Mess is decent, and the cafeteria is a good option.

reviews.review_heading: COEP: The dream college of every student.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a bit of an issue here. Often, there are connectivity problems. The infrastructure is good in the college. There are well-equipped libraries in the college with thousands of quality, useful books, which is good. Mess food is also okay, but in comparison with other colleges, it is very good. Sports facilities are also very good as the college is represented in every sports competition.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied overall because of good college infrastructure, placements, understanding seniors, etc.
reviews.review_text: Recently new meta building is built. So its more spacious now. Library, classrooms, and labs are of course on top notch. The labs and lab assistant teachers are also good. Real issue is with Wi-Fi. In most of campus area, there are a lot of network as well as Wi-Fi issues. About hostel, its not less than home. Mess food is a little messed up. But its better than other colleges' mess. There are two canteens in the college. The meta canteen is good. But both canteens are a bit suffocating.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty, updated syllabus, and easy-to-clear exams make COEP a great engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi network is good on the hostel campus but poor in college campus, especially in labs. There is no Wi-Fi and also no network. Food quality is very good in mess and the canteen of the hostel is poor. Sports facilities are very good. Big ground is there for COEP. Students and doctors are available in hostel. Gym facilities are also for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: College is really good. No worries about passing the exams.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7. Labs are fully equipped. Classrooms and library are excellent. Cafeterias and canteens are there on both college and hostel campus. Many fests are organized throughout the year. Students here are very exceptional. If you end up here, you will make a really good friend circle.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and placement is 100%.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are top-notch. The classrooms are too good and a very good environment to study. We also have a sports club near the academic complex where classes happen. There is a well-furnished library with Wi-Fi all over in college with range. There are many facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Pune.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are large. Classrooms have all digital services. It has 24-hour Wi-Fi, libraries, computer labs, etc. The quality of facilities is average. There are so many games in COE. Zest Fest is the largest sports event conducted in Maharashtra after IIT Bombay, so sports facilities are above average in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good placements in 2024 and infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, classrooms, and library have good structure. The seating arrangement is also very good. We have good internet access Wi-Fi is available 24 hours. College hostels are out of campus but hostel facilities are very nice. Their mess has good quality food.

likes.text: IT companies like Wipro, Infosys, and Accenture, etc., and core companies like Tata Motors, Mahindra, Maruti, and Mercedes, etc., visited the campus for placements.
There is a special team or staff committee for COEP placement cell and it is efficient for the students to find good job and internship programme as well.

paragraphs: College of Engineering Pune (COEP Pune) offers various Non-government, Government, and Industry/ Alumni-aided scholarships to its students. Some scholarships are specifically offered to female students. Students can also avail of the bank loan facility available at the SBI COEP branch. A few of the COEP scholarships are listed below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: IIT Bhilai is a third-generation IIT and is ranked 72th among all educational institutions in India.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of the college is increasing. The average package and the lowest packages offered are almost the same. Most companies come for placements from the tech field. The highest package offered is approximately 30 LPA, and the lowest package offered is around 10 LPA. The average package ranges from around 8.5-9 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom facilities are adequate, and the course facilities are also good. We have dedicated labs for the data science course, and data science facilities are also available. Hostels are provided with ACs. It has a free Wi-Fi campus. Room cleaning services are also good. Mess offers a wide range of breakfast, lunch, and dinner options. The cost of the mess is around Rs. 155 per day for all three meals. We are given an additional sweet at dinner, included in the same.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and an environment. Placements are average.

review_content.Placements: Overall, the placement percentage for B.Tech is around 75 percent. The average package offered for B.Tech is 15 LPA, and the highest package offered for the 2025-26 batch is 60 LPA. For the M.Tech course, placements are not good. 80 percent of service-based companies come for placements. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Nvidia, Intel, TCS, Infosys, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs are good, but need to increase the lab size. Classrooms and libraries are also good. The hostel room has AC, but the room size is small. Sports facilities are still in the developing phase. Being a third-generation IIT, its infrastructure and college environment are very good.

review_summary.college_name: IIT Bhilai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: IIT Bhilai offers a serene and modern environment that blends innovation with tranquillity.

content.Placements: They are nice. Students are working calmly and have easily got nice placements, which is not easy in general. The highest package for last year was 49 LPA. Many good companies come here for placements. Students of CSE are on top of that; also, students involved in different clubs and societies have a good probability of getting selected.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very, very nice. It fails many such colleges and gets its position at the very top. It is a completely new campus. It is being built and is very much incomplete, but it is quite nice. It feels like a five-star hotel with very creative and amazing infrastructure. I can enjoy it very much.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good but not outstanding.

content.Placements: Placements are going on till now. But I can definitely say that for this year, placements are good as compared to the previous year. The placement percentage and packages are increasing year on year. Good companies like Google, Accenture, etc., visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good with air-conditioning (AC) in each room since the college is not too old. Bathrooms have hot, cold, and normal water. Very hygienic and clean hostels are provided. Mess food is also good most of the time. Sometimes we may not like the food, but most of the time the food is good. Wi-Fi is also provided everywhere, 24 hours a day.

individual_reviews.title: IIT Bhilai is a third-generation IIT and is ranked 72th among all educational institutions in India.

The highest package offered is approximately 30 LPA, and the lowest package offered is around 10 LPA. The average package ranges from around 8.5-9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom facilities are adequate, and the course facilities are also good. We have dedicated labs for the data science course, and data science facilities are also available. Hostels are provided with ACs. It has a free Wi-Fi campus. Room cleaning services are also good. Mess offers a wide range of breakfast, lunch, and dinner options. The cost of the mess is around Rs. 155 per day for all three meals. We are given an additional sweet at dinner, included in the same.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and an environment. Placements are average.

content.Placements: Overall, the placement percentage for B.Tech is around 75 percent. For the M.Tech course, placements are not good. 80 percent of service-based companies come for placements. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Nvidia, Intel, TCS, Infosys, etc.

The hostel room has AC, but the room size is small. Sports facilities are still in the developing phase. Being a third-generation IIT, its infrastructure and college environment are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The most aesthetic IIT. Campus feels different.

content.Placements: Placements are decent. The highest package was around 68 LPA, no idea about the lowest, but I guess it was 10. Many companies come, including Google, Nvidia, Accenture, HCL, FNZ, Myntra, Piepay, and others. Internship opportunities are good; many students get internships from the 2nd year onwards.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an aesthetic campus, fully air-conditioned hostels. However, Wi-Fi in the freshers' hostel is not so great. Restrooms feel sleek and modern. Mess food is okayish (better than many colleges). Clubs are active, and they have functioning equipment which can be accessed by club members.

paragraphs: IIT Bhilai admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling process. The step-wise admission process for all IIT Bhilai UG & PG courses is given below:
Step 1: IIT Bhilai Application Process

The IIT Bhilai application process for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is based on exam-specific registration. For example, for BTech, candidates are required to apply for JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced application. Similarly, for the MSc, IIT JAM application form is required to be completed. However, for MTech admission, candidates have to register for GATE first. After that, the qualifying candidates have to further apply for COAP and then apply on the official website of IIT Bhilai to proceed to confirm their admission. All the PhD aspirants have to register on the official website of IIT Bhilai.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

IIT Bhilai admissions are entirely entrance-based. All the BTech aspirants are selected based on valid scores from JEE Main and JEE Advanced entrance exams. Whereas for MSc and MTech, students have to qualify for IIT JAM and GATE exams, respectively. Candidates can check with the admission office for the selection rounds of the rest of the courses.
Step 3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

IIT Bhilaicutoff for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. Candidates have to register for exam-specific counselling bodies for the final seat allotment. The shortlisted candidates and then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.
IIT Bhilai Fees 2025: Affordability & ROI

The fee for all IIT Bhilai courses varies depending on the duration and type of the course along with the course specialisations candidates choose. The tuition fee for all the UG & PG courses of IIT Bhilai ranges between INR 25,000 to INR 9 lakh. A one-time fee is INR 14,000 for all the courses.
Tabulated below are the IIT Bhilai fees and package for popular courses:

faqs.question: Is there any way to get admission to BTech at IIT Bhilai without an entrance exam?

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech at IIT Bhilai?
faqs.answer: To get admission to the IIT Bhilai BTech course, candidates have to fill out the JEE Main online application form must and check the eligibility criteria of each course before filling the form. Candidates who pass Class 12 with minimum 75% aggregate in the final examination are eligble to apply for the course. Candidates can apply by visiting the NTA website (nta.ac.in). The admission is based on JEE Advanced scores, followed by JoSAA Counselling.

courses_data.description: IIT Bhilai MTech admissions are entirely based on GATE scores. Candidates seeking admission to MTech (Bio-engineering) course can apply with a valid GPAT score. Moreover, the shortlisted candidates have to apply for COAP Counselling and register on the official website of IIT Bhilai.

faqs.question: How can I get admission for M.Tech at IIT Bhilai?
faqs.answer: For admission to IIT Bhilai MTech course, students are admitted through a valid GATE score. As per the selection process, candidates must pass graduation with BTech from a recognised board. Further, candidates need to appear for GATE entrance exams and get a qualifying score to get shortlisted for the course. Later on, the final seat allotment is done through COAP Counselling session. Students who are graduated from IIT are exempted from the GATE entrance score requirement.Note:For MTech, the qu

faqs.question: Can I get admission to M.Tech at IIT Bhilai without appearing for GATE?
faqs.answer: No, admission to MTech at IIT Bhilai is not possible without GATE. Based on their ranks, candidates will be allocated seats and branch accordingly. Those who get a good rank in GATE can register for COAP Counselling.However, for admission to MTech (Bio-Engineering) branch, candidates can apply via GPAT scores. These candidates will be exempted from appearing for GATE.

faqs.question: Which M.Tech specialisations does IIT Bhilai offer?
faqs.answer: IIT Bhilai offers a two-year M.Tech course across six specialisations. These are Computer Science & Engineering, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Vehicle Technology, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Mechatronics. Admission to all the M.Tech courses is through GATE followed by COAP counselling.

faqs.question: Can I get IIT Bhilai with 500 rank?
faqs.answer: IIT Bhilai offers admission to MSc specialisations on the basis of IIT JAM scores. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India quota. Among the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks were between 523 and 613. Therefore, if you belong to the General AI category, then it is possible to get admission at 500 rank.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to IIT Bhilai?
faqs.answer: There is no such provision for getting direct admission to any of the IITs including IIT Bhilai. Candidates willing to be admitted must meet the eligibility and selection criteria established by the institute. Below are the courses offered at IIT Bhilai along with eligibility and selection criteria:ProgrammeEligibility CriteriaSelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 in Physics, Chemistry & Maths with a minimum of 75% aggregateJEE-Advanced + CounsellingMTechBTech in relevant discipline with a minimum of 60% aggregate (55% for reserved categories)ORMSc or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate (55% for reserved categories)ORBPharma with a minimum of 60% aggregate (55% for reserved categories)ORMBBS/ BDS with 60% aggregate (55% for reserved categories)GATE/ GPAT score + COAPORCGI/ CGPA of 8.0 from an IITMScBachelor’s degree in relevant streamIIT JAM

faqs.question: How many seats are there in IIT Bhilai?
faqs.answer: IIT Bhilai offers UG & PG courses in full-time mode. The offered courses are BTech, M.Tech and MSc. To secure a seat at IIT Bhilai, candidates have to go through a selection process, which includes qualifying entrance exam and appearing for the counselling process. faqs.question: Is IIT Bhilai hard to get?
faqs.answer: IIT Bhilai is considered a competitive institution, but generally less so than the older, more established IITs, making it a relatively good option for those who aim for a good Engineering education but may not have the highest JEE Advanced rank. The cutoff ranks for IIT Bhilai have varied over the years, but generally, the closing ranks for the general category in Computer Science Engineering (CSE) have been around the5,000-6,000 range.Therefore, once an applicant fulfillsIIT Bhilai admission requirementsi.e., competitive grades, standardised test scores, technical language requirements as well as relevant documents, they are most likely to secure an admission in the institute. However, students must not take this lightly and apply to the institute within the deadlines in order to get enrolled as a student.

placement_report.college_name: IIT Bhilai Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIT Bhilai Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The IIT Bhilai placement drive for the 2024-25 season started last september. As per the official placement report 2024-25 , more than 500 offers have been recorded. The detailed placement report for 2025 however is yet to be updated.

Earlier, the overall highest package offered during the IIT Bhilai placements 2024 stood at INR 48.92 LPA . The overall average package offered stood at INR 12.51 LPA . In total 105 students got placed out of the total 150 registered students . The overall placement rate recorded during 2024 season was 70% . Further, the season saw 115 offers being made by 109 participating companies . Additionally, a 100% placement record was observed in the MTech CSE and DSAI branch at IIT Bhilai during 2024. Top companies that took part in the IIT Bhilai placement drive consist of- Mahindra, Tata consultancy services, Fiitjee, HCLTECH, Accenture, Deloitte, Infosys , etc. More than 80 summer internship offers were received by the students from leading companies.

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of IIT Bhilai JEE Advanced cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 738

On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, followed by B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 7934 and 9668, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Bhilai. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bhilai offers a serene and modern environment that blends innovation with tranquillity.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very, very nice. It fails many such colleges and gets its position at the very top. It is a completely new campus. It is being built and is very much incomplete, but it is quite nice. It feels like a five-star hotel with very creative and amazing infrastructure. I can enjoy it very much.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good but not outstanding.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good with air-conditioning (AC) in each room since the college is not too old. Bathrooms have hot, cold, and normal water. Very hygienic and clean hostels are provided. Mess food is also good most of the time. Sometimes we may not like the food, but most of the time the food is good. Wi-Fi is also provided everywhere, 24 hours a day.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bhilai is a third-generation IIT and is ranked 72th among all educational institutions in India.
reviews.review_text: Classroom facilities are adequate, and the course facilities are also good. We have dedicated labs for the data science course, and data science facilities are also available. Hostels are provided with ACs. It has a free Wi-Fi campus. Room cleaning services are also good. Mess offers a wide range of breakfast, lunch, and dinner options. The cost of the mess is around Rs. 155 per day for all three meals. We are given an additional sweet at dinner, included in the same.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and an environment. Placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs are good, but need to increase the lab size. Classrooms and libraries are also good. The hostel room has AC, but the room size is small. Sports facilities are still in the developing phase. Being a third-generation IIT, its infrastructure and college environment are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The most aesthetic IIT. Campus feels different.
reviews.review_text: The college has an aesthetic campus, fully air-conditioned hostels. However, Wi-Fi in the freshers' hostel is not so great. Restrooms feel sleek and modern. Mess food is okayish (better than many colleges). Clubs are active, and they have functioning equipment which can be accessed by club members.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: In this course, we study higher Chemistry and its applications in the fields of industries, research, material synthesis, medical sciences, etc. Every aspect of this course should not be linked to the grades. Course load is more in the first year. Hostel rooms are very neat and clean. Each student has a separate room. There are 6 rooms in a unit. Each unit has a common drawing room and a kitchen. There is a mini refrigerator in the kitchen of each unit. There is a common balcony in each unit. Ev...

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. It has unlimited internet access, a well-furnished library, spacious classrooms, etc. It also has well-equipped and high-tech laboratories. The hostel quality is good. Medical facilities are available. Multiple sports complexes are present here.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: This two-year postgraduate program offers a deeper knowledge of advanced mathematics through subjects like geometry, calculus, algebra, number theory, differential equations, etc. The students become more skilled and specialized in a particular subject and are encouraged to carry out research in various fields of mathematics. The hostels are not that good as it is a temporary campus, but we have coolers two badminton courts, and good nature around us. But it is not cement construction it is stee...

reviews.review_heading: Very resourceful facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for our department are nice. The classrooms and labs are clean and comfortable. A well-stocked library is also present. The hostel rooms are good. The food available in the mess is not so tasty, but the quality of food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is gorgeous and well-maintained. We have classrooms with good space, projectors, and smart boards. Labs have high-speed Wi-Fi connections. The library is well-stocked with books and journals. The hostel is very clean and we have attached washroom facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The institute is fine at its infrastructure with good academics.
reviews.review_text: The buildings were constructed with perfection, and they looked great. Wi-Fi was available everywhere on campus, and the classrooms were fully air-conditioned. The library was quiet and a good place to study. The academic block was really beautiful. Laundry facilities were available at the hostel, along with Wi-Fi. The food quality was above average. For medical facilities, there was a health center on campus. For sports, there was a cricket ground, a basketball court, a football ground, badmint...

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college I can say but it is just in its initial phase of achieving excellence.
reviews.review_text: Our institute is in a growing phase, so some facilities are not available here, like Olympic playgrounds and student activity centers, etc. But those facilities that are built till now are up to the mark, like all hostel rooms having air conditioners installed, washing machine facilities inside the hostel, and good Wi-Fi connection with unlimited internet. So I can say those facilities that are built are very the latest and cutting edge.

reviews.review_heading: A growing college with lots of developments in the future.
reviews.review_text: We have a state-of-the-art campus with beautiful buildings, lakes, and greenery all around. The campus has centralized Wi-Fi with good speed. Hostels are good, with AC in each room. Currently, there are 3 hostels. Labs, classrooms, and the library are all well-equipped with the latest technologies. Mess food is good here. There is a common health center. Sports and games are in the development phase, as the campus is new. It will improve over time.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, amazing infrastructure, best 3rd gen IIT, good for startups.
reviews.review_text: Our annual festival is called MERAZ, which is central India's biggest techno-cultural festival. It's held in November. In addition, we have over 100 events throughout the year, not counting festivals and celebrations. We're always tinkering with the labs and finding new things. The sports complex isn't ready yet, but we have a decent temporary sports facility and a partnership with nearby sports clubs for professional training. We have 19 clubs on campus, which is a lot, and it's really fun to t...

reviews.review_heading: Emerging Technical Institute in India with a lot of scope in professional development.
reviews.review_text:
Full campus coverage of Wi-Fi has been established with 5G services also available. Separate and systematic labs are present for all departments. We have multiple capacity classrooms with AC. The library is also available.
Sports facilities are still under development.
Medical facilities are good and open 24x7.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college with balanced academics and campus life.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 75 percent of students got placed, and the rest opted for higher studies outside India. The highest package offered is around 30 LPA, and the average is around 7 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, Microsoft, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. Top 5 percent of students got internships with a stipend, and in very good companies, the rest had to struggle for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern. Our department has well-equipped labs with Macs and high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are decent, the mess food is manageable, not amazing, but edible. One girls' hostel is on the campus itself, but the only boys' hostel is around 8-9km away from the campus; however, the college provides bus facilities. Sports grounds, indoor games, and medical facilities are available in the new sports complex.

review_content.Infrastructure: The entire academic building and labs are covered with campus-wide Wi-Fi. In speak hours, it may slow a bit, but overall connectivity is reliable. Most CSE classes are conducted in newer academic blocks, so classrooms feel modern. The biggest library you'll find in Pune has various books from different streams available. Hostel rooms are not luxurious, but comfortable and functional. Mess Food is average to good, completely veg. MIT has 2 different canteens, one of the premium ones called Encave and the other, a budget-friendly one called Shreeraj.

individual_reviews.course: BBA(Hons.) in Global Marketing and Event Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great College, possibly have a lot of money, but it has a very strict attendant policy.

content.Placements: As per what I have listened, around 40 percent of students got placements. The highest package is around 11 LPA. Companies from all over the world. Only 30 percent of the people got internships; the other 60 percent are doing their own business. Senior event manager to handle the companies’ events.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the syllabus and the course is very interesting, and we get to go to the rural areas for some days and a national study trip. I can’t tell you much about the hostel as I am not in MIT hostel, but as per what I have listened, the rooms are really good. Hostel food and its quality is not very promising. They have lots and lots of sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: BBA(Hons.) in International Business - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for anyone genuinely interested.

content.Placements: In my batch, around 55-60 percent of students are placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA-15 LPA. Common roles offered are business executive, relationship manager, and operations executive. Overall, opportunities exist, but the outcome depends heavily on internships and how we carry ourselves.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is neat and clean. There are clear rules mentioned, and actions are also taken against violators. I can't say anything about the food as I haven't tried it, but the vibe of the campus is top class, especially when it rains. The crowd is amazing too, and we will feel like coming to college every day.

paragraphs: MIT WPU admissionto all the programmes is conducted online. The application process for all UG, PG and PhD courses. Check below the steps forMIT-WPU admission processfor all courses:
Step 1: MIT-WPU Application Process 2026
Aspirants need to fill an online application form on the official website of MIT-WPU with all the information. Candidates need to pay INR 2,000 as application fees for a course.
Step 2: Entrance Exam, Result & Counselling

Candidates must appearMIT entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds after filling out the MIT-WPU registration form. Based on the entrance exam scores results will be declared on the official website of MIT-WPU and a merit list will be prepared through a counselling process. Candidates with a score in any of the accepted national-level entrance exams can also get admission.
Step 3: Fee Payment
The university sends a provisional offer letter to selected candidates. Applicants who receive the offer letter must make the first fee instalment.
Step 4: Declaration of Final Offer Letter

The university releases the final offer letter after the completion of document verification. The University sends the offer letter to the student's registered email address. Candidates have to submit the original documents for verification. Aspirants need to payMIT WPU feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at MIT-WPU Pune?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BTech course, MIT-WPU, Pune accepts scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/ MHT CET/ PERA CET/ MHT CET B/ NEET UG. Hence, candidates willing to get admission to the course must appear and qualify in any one of the accepted entrance exams. For some specialisations, students may have to write a Statement of Purpose (SOP).

faqs.question: How can we get direct admission at MIT-WPU?
faqs.answer: MIT-WPU Pune does not offer direct admission to its UG and PG courses. MIT-WPU course admissions for all courses are either done via MIT-WPU CET, which is conducted by the university itself. The university also accepts various state and national-level entrance exams such as PERA CET, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, NEET UG, etc. Those who want to get admission to any of the UG and PG courses at MIT-WPU, must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place and then appear for the respective entrance exams. For some PG courses such as MBA and MCA, the university also accepts valid scores in personal interview rounds as part of their selection process. The final seat allotment is done based on the counselling rounds.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at MIT-WPU, Pune?
faqs.answer: MIT-WPU, Pune provides various programmes and specialisations to students. These courses are available in different streams. For obtaining MIT-WPU, Pune admission, candidates are selected on the basis of entrance tests. For further details, candidates may visit the official website and learn more regarding the eligibility details for their preferred course choice. Accepted exams include PERA CET, MHT CET, JEE Main, NEET, LSAT, CLAT, etc.

faqs.question: Do I need to give an entrance exam for admission to MBA at MIT School of Management?
faqs.answer: MIT WPU Pune accepts multiple entrance exams for admission to the MBA course. Candidates can apply for any one of the entrance exams for admission. The final selection is based on the performance of candidates in Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds, followed by other selection rounds. Few of the entrance exams are as follows:CAT Common Admission TestMAT Management Aptitude TestXAT  Xavier Aptitude TestMaharashtra Common Entrance Exam MAH CET

placement_report.college_name: MIT-WPU, Pune Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: MIT-WPU, Pune Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: MIT-WPU, Pune has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. More than 730 recruiters visited the campus for 2025 placements and selected 2455 students of the batch 2025. The overall highest package offered to the batch 2025 stood at INR 51.36 LPA , whereas the average salary offered was INR 6.23 LPA. The median salary offered to the batch 2025 was INR 5.50 LPA . The top recruiters of MIT-WPU, Pune in 2025 include Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Intel, Goldman Sachs, etc. Apart from securing the annual package, the students also received internship opportunities from the recuiters in 2025. The highest stipend offered was INR 80,000.

Earlier, the highest package offered during MIT-WPU, Pune placement 2024 stood at INR 51.36 LPA. A total 2,544 students registered, of which 1,903 were placed in leading companies. More than 600 companies visited the campus.
The students of the BDes batch 2023 secured the highest package of INR 20 LPA.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, MIT WPU has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
One can observe that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, MIT WPU's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, MIT WPU climbed 2 ranks to #70 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel.description:
MIT-WPU provides students with modern and comfortable hostel facilities, catering to diverse needs and interests. Equipped with amenities such as dance studios, gyms, basketball courts, and inviting common areas, the hostels offer a vibrant and engaging living environment. Students have the flexibility to choose between twin-sharing and triple-sharing rooms, each furnished with unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi and regular housekeeping services. 

The safety of students is a top priority, with full-time wardens, CCTV monitoring, and biometric-enabled entrances ensuring a secure living space. MIT-WPU's commitment to providing well-equipped and secure hostels reflects its dedication to creating a conducive and enriching residential experience for its students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court

cafeteria.description: MIT-WPU has thoughtfully placed multiple cafeterias and vending machines across its sprawling 65-acre campus. With a wide array of menus available, these facilities ensure that students can enjoy a variety of delicious and nutritious meals. This intentional placement not only fosters a sense of community but also offers convenience, allowing students the flexibility to dine at different locations throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great College, possibly have a lot of money, but it has a very strict attendant policy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the syllabus and the course is very interesting, and we get to go to the rural areas for some days and a national study trip. I can’t tell you much about the hostel as I am not in MIT hostel, but as per what I have listened, the rooms are really good. Hostel food and its quality is not very promising. They have lots and lots of sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for anyone genuinely interested.
reviews.review_text: The campus is neat and clean. There are clear rules mentioned, and actions are also taken against violators. I can't say anything about the food as I haven't tried it, but the vibe of the campus is top class, especially when it rains. The crowd is amazing too, and we will feel like coming to college every day.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with balanced academics and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is modern. Our department has well-equipped labs with Macs and high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are decent, the mess food is manageable, not amazing, but edible. One girls' hostel is on the campus itself, but the only boys' hostel is around 8-9km away from the campus; however, the college provides bus facilities. Sports grounds, indoor games, and medical facilities are available in the new sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Strong cybersecurity programme with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The entire academic building and labs are covered with campus-wide Wi-Fi. In speak hours, it may slow a bit, but overall connectivity is reliable. Most CSE classes are conducted in newer academic blocks, so classrooms feel modern. The biggest library you'll find in Pune has various books from different streams available. Hostel rooms are not luxurious, but comfortable and functional. Mess Food is average to good, completely veg. MIT has 2 different canteens, one of the premium ones called Encave...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best college.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent infrastructure and it has availability of Wi-Fi labs classrooms and library. Library is to good for this college. I did not see any college that has this kind of library.  Hostel canteen food is not that good. Sports and game facilities are good. It has a dark side also some students are addicted to drugs and do wrong things. 1 or 2 months ago there a child ordered something from Blinkit and some things happened that the Blinkit boy beat our campus student he was full of blood.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has great on-campus hostels with Wi-Fi and all amenities. The library is just mesmerising, its ambience is on another level. Classrooms have a great ambience, as in our department. Mess food is average, but the sports facilities are just amazing. Overall, it's excellent.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum was different from the rest of the colleges. There was a brew of finance, operations, marketing, and HR for the elective options. They imparted both theoretical and practical knowledge. It was a very flexible system that favors students for their betterment. The hostel was completely air conditioned and was equipped with free Wi-Fi. There was ample space provided for the balcony and terrace. The rooms were dual sharing with separate washroom facilities for each room. The me...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good and friendly faculty with a fresh environment and campus.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good facilities of Wi-Fi, smart Google classrooms, and well-stocked libraries. Hostel facilities are designed with hygienic food. Even with the good medical facilities and well-trained doctors. The college also supports sports and various national and international competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: We have a specially designed Vyasa building for CSE branch students. It's definitely amazing, the labs are brand new, and each system actually works. The only thing is that the network connectivity is terrible. The mess is good, but the En Encave Cafe is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with top-notch infrastructure, but the fees are a little bit on the higher side.
reviews.review_text: Cannot comment on hostel as I am a day scholar. Infrastructure available is of top-notch quality. Many canteens are available on the campus. Library has some limited books and is not up to date.

reviews.review_heading: MIT WPU  This is the reality.
reviews.review_text: There are well-developed and invested labs for different subjects. Campus has Wi-Fi. Library is also very useful and very accessible. Campus has a medical room for emergencies, and the hostels are decent. Hostels are okay, but they are extremely far away from the college. Although the college offers transport, it gets tiring to travel that much every single day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT-WPU.
reviews.review_text: For CSE, we have a new building, and it has top-notch infrastructure. 4 labs on each floor, and each lab has 70 iMac setups. Canteens are really good, and the on-campus café too. We also have a sports complex where the ground floor has a huge swimming pool, which is very clean, and above that is the indoor games floor, like table tennis, and on top, we have a badminton hall.

reviews.review_heading: MIT WPU CSE  Industry oriented curriculum with lively campus culture.
reviews.review_text: College offers smart classrooms, MAC labs, library, and research space. Hostels are not that good but have clean rooms, study areas, and Wi-Fi. Mess food is the worst. Sports and recreation are average, with a decent basketball court, table tennis, and a gym. Overall, the infrastructure supports both academics and student life effectively.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by School of Business, MIT WPUReviewed on 10 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Most of the students are getting job offers.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is top-notch. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, labs are properly equipped, and a central library is located with a variety of books. The hostel is great. Hostel rooms are properly cleaned, and all types of facilities are available here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by School of Business, MIT WPUReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An excellent college for an MBA with a majority of pros.
reviews.review_text: My college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. The campus is spread over huge acres and surrounded by greenery everywhere, fostering vibrant campus life. Classes are present with smart interactive board and Wi-Fi access, a huge library with spacious seating for students, and a lot of books. There are 3 canteens in college which offer great food.

paragraphs: MIT-WPU is awarding 2000+ scholarships to its meritorious students for the academic year 2025-26. A total of 6 types of scholarships are offered to eligible students. These scholarships are mentioned below:
Below are the details regarding the MIT-WPU scholarships:

1. Dr. Vishwanath Karad Scholarship: In this scholarship, students get a 100% fee waiver for the entire duration of the programme, and is applicable for 5% of the total students’ intake. (Subject to the fulfillment of conditions mentioned under the respective policy

2. MIT-WPU Merit Scholarship-I: These scholarships are provided at the rate of a 50% fee waiver in total academic fee for the entire duration of the programme up to 10% of the total students’ intake. (Subject to the fulfillment of conditions mentioned under the respective policy).

3. MIT-WPU Merit Scholarship-II: Students can avail of the scholarships at the rate of a 25% fee waiver in total academic fee for the entire duration of the programme up to 12% of the total students’ intake. (Subject to the fulfillment of conditions mentioned under the respective policy.

4. Scholarships to Elite Sportsperson: This scholarship is awarded to the sports persons based on their participation/winning the prizes at Nationally/ Internationally recognised sports competitions/ events.

5. Hon’ble Shri. T N Seshan Scholarship: This scholarship is offered to the students at the School of Government who are the wards of in-service public servants with a minimum of 5 years of experience in government service shall receive the “Hon’ble Sri. T N Seshan Scholarship” which amounts to 15% of the programme fee.
6. Criteria for Continued Scholarships every year:

college_info.intro:
Andhra University courses include both UG and PG level courses. These courses are offered across several specialisations in the fields of Arts, Commerce, Engineering, Law and Pharmaceutical Science. BTech, BBA, and MBA are the popular programmes of the Andhra University. By doing the courses like BTech in Civil Engineering, students will be able to work in multidisciplinary fields with team spirit by understanding the implications of the engineering applications or solutions on environment and society. The Civil Engineering programme includes subjects like Physics, Engineering Graphics, Engineering Mechanics etc.
The BFA, BArch, BTech, BA LLB, and BPharma comprise the UG level courses of AU Vizag while the MA, MBA, MSc, MTech, MPharma, and LLM courses are offered at the PG level. The university also gives distance education and has various online courses for the students. Below are the popular programmes of AU Visakhapatnam:
For more information about Andhra University check out the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AU Visakhapatnam offers over 310 courses at UG, PG and doctorate levels in Science, Engineering, Arts, Commerce, Pharmacy, Law and Education. The duration of all these programmes ranges between one year and four years. AU Vizag offers integrated programmes under most of the departments. Andhra University College of Engineering attracts the most amount of applicants under the College of Engineering.

faqs.answer: A:    Andhra University doesn't release cutoff for B.Tech courses such as B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, Naval Architecture and Ship Building and B.Tech in Biotechnology. Candidates must qualify for Andhra Pradesh EAMCET/ Andhra Pradesh ECET for admission to the B.Tech course. To get a seat in Andhra University's other UG courses, candidates must get an overall state-wise rank of below 300 INI CET closing ranks. Some of the affiliated colleges of Andhra University accept JEE Main score for admission to Engineering programmes.
faqs.question: Can I get a free seat in B.Tech at Andhra University?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no provision for free admission at Andhra University but eligible candidates can avail of scholarships in certain categories through which they can get tuition fee waivers based on which they can pursue their programme without or less amount of tuition fee. To avail of those scholarships candidates must qualify for the specified entrance exams conducted by Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education. reviews_list.review_title: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: In Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering, nearly 50-60 percent of students are placed in our college, and the highest package in our course is 12 LPA, the average package is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Everyone in our college gets opportunities for internships; every student must complete at least two internships in our course. Mostly core companies give the opportunities, and the top roles offered by our course are product engineer and design engineer, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.

review_content.Placements: Coming to academic development in my course, several students are getting selected in good companies like Cognizant, Infosys. But the package they got selected for is not that much, it's like 3 LPA, 6 LPA. There is a club named SRKR Coding Club, and it helps many students to get out of fear and to understand from the basics. Internships: not many, but only 3rd and 4th-year students are getting internships, not 1st and 2nd-year students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga sessions. They even conduct many events related to sports and games. There are two faculty members regarding the sports department.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.

content.Placements: In GVPCE, nearly 60-70% of students are placed in our course, and the higher package in mechanical engineering is around 12 LPA, the average is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. The top roles offered are product manager, design engineer, and nearly 80% of students get internship offers from companies likes Renolt, Hyundai, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed in our course. 10 LPA is the highest, 1 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package offered in our course. TCS, Wipro, and Cognizant are the top recruiting companies for our course. 30% of students got internships from our course in Renault, Hyundai, TCS, and Wipro companies. System engineering, AutoCAD designer, and technology analyst are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

admission_overview.description: Andhra University offers various UG, PG, Diploma, and Doctoral level courses in the fields of Engineering, Science, Humanities, etc. Andhra University admission to different courses is based on merit and several national and state-level entrance exams. The mode of application at Andhra University is online. For PG courses such as MA, MSc, MCom, MJMC, M.Lib.Sc, etc., candidates must appear for the AP PGCET entrance exam. Other than this, Andhra University conducts exams such as AP EdCET, AP LAWCET, AP ICET, and AP PGLCET. Further, for courses such as BA, BCom, MCom, etc., students are selected based on their performances in the previous qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is Andhra University Andhra Pradesh EAMCET cutoff?

faqs.answer: The admission to Andhra University has been conducted via Andhra Pradesh EAMCET exam. courses_data.description: Andhra University provides a two-year MBA programme in both Regular and Self-Financing streams. Additionally, the university offers specialized MBA courses in Banking and Financial Services, Retail Management, and MHRM. These programmes are administered by the Department of Commerce and Management Studies and affiliated colleges of Andhra University. Admission to these courses is through various national or state-level entrance exams. For the MBA programme, candidates must take AP ICET, AU CET, MAT, XAT, CAT, or ATMA exams. For the specialized MBA and MHRM courses, admission requires clearing the AP ICET exam, followed by centralised counselling conducted by the AP Council for Higher Education. Read the infographic below to learn more about MBA admission:

faqs.question: Does Andhra University accept admission through CAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, Andhra University welcomes admissions based on CAT for MBA courses. Apart from CAT, tests such as Andhra Pradesh ICET, MAT, XAT, and ATMA are also given consideration. Candidates need to qualify in any of these tests for being shortlisted. Final selection consists of group discussion and personal interview phases.

faqs.question: Is there BTech at Andhra University?

faqs.question: Can I get a free seat in Andhra University?
faqs.answer: There is no provision for free admission at Andhra University but eligible candidates can avail of scholarships in certain categories through which they can get tuition fee waivers based on which they can pursue their programme without or less amount of tuition fee. To avail of those scholarships candidates must qualify for the specified entrance exams conducted by Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education. Given below are some of the scholarships provided to students at Andhra University: Tribal Welfare Scholarships & Merit Social Welfare Scholarships Scholarships offered by AICTE/ UGC to GATE-qualified candidates BTH Scholarships Jnanabhumi Post Metric and Andhra Pradesh Social Welfare Department scholarships.

faqs.question: What is the total fees for BSc at Andhra University, Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the BSc programme at Andhra University ranges between INR 15,900 - INR 81,000. There is a range in the fee, might be because the fee for each specialisation can be different from each other. The application and registration fees of the BSc courses ranges from instuition to institution. The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. The eligibility criteria to get admission to BSc course at Andhra University, Visakhapatnam is candidates must completed their Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology subjects.

highlights.description: Andhra University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #41 in the Overall category, #23 under University, #88 under Engineering, and #4 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Andhra University rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
Andhra University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Andhra University's rank is #41, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Andhra University climbed 2 ranks to #23 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Andhra University climbed 2 ranks to #88 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is noticeable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Andhra University climbed 3 ranks to #4 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

qs_world.description:
Andhra University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Andhra University fell 120 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Andhra University fell 42 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering are one of the best things. The labs in our college are well maintained with the best machines and equipment. The college has Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are well maintained, and each class has a separate projector. The infrastructure of GVPCE is quite better compared with other colleges. They provide quality food in the college canteen and hostel mess. We can get unlimited food at the college hostel for only 50 rupees per plate....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Anil Neerukonda Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty in our college, it has a good placement record too.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good and neat. The facilities in the hostel are also good, with proper food in the mess and canteen too. The medical facilities are also good as the hospital is nearby. The sports and games are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good, based on trending market companies, are selected.
reviews.review_text: In labs, computers are old models but recently they might be focused on labs because it was not an issue because the labs are good. Coming to the network issue, there are no network issues at all and coming to the lab infrastructure, it is also good, and labs consist of AC also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. It will maintain classrooms and labs very neatly. They also update the new mechanism in labs. There are the latest computers to use and learn for a better experience. We can use Wi-Fi. There is also a gym facility, so we can enjoy it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I got a satisfying experience at Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The campus of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering is spacious and green, which creates a peaceful study atmosphere. As a CSE student, I spend most of my time in labs and classrooms. Both facilities are well-maintained. Some classrooms even have projectors. The library is big and quiet, one of my favorite places. We also have seminar halls, sports areas, a medical room, and transport. The infrastructure supports academics very well, and it definitely adds to the college experience. Faci...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The vibes of GVPCE are at their peak.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are really good. The mechanical department has all the required equipment and machines, and they are maintained very well. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. I am not a hostel student. Many of my friends are hostelers, and they share their experiences with me. The canteen food is also good enough, so we can eat unlimited food at Rs. 50 for a single late.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Anil Neerukonda Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: ANITS- Where the talent belongs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was pretty good, where the various departments are located on their particular block, which helps the outside people to easily locate or navigate. State-of-the-art labs, modern classrooms, and a vast library with digital resources, sports facilities, and hostels create an ideal environment for academic excellence and personal growth.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has supportive faculty, average placements, and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my course/department regarding labs and classrooms are fine and cool. There is much greenery. A good infrastructure for labs or systems is provided. Whenever needed, we can do system work in our college labs. There is also an Ideal lab in which we can share our ideas and thoughts to implement innovation projects. We can work there with efficient facilities. There will be no efficient Wi-Fi facility. There are good-quality facilities in our hostel. Games and spor...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of facilities provided by my college.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is good. My college has a good auditorium. It offers good computer labs and a good ground. The food in the canteen is also good. We have a good badminton court, a good volleyball court, and a good cricket ground. My college has a three-storey library which contains all the required books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by MLA's Degree CollegeReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Perfect college for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are too good. In my college, many students are happy due to the infrastructure. The construction is too good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Anil Neerukonda Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Okay overall in all aspects like study, facilities.
reviews.review_text: Decent but not great infrastructure. No Wi-Fi. Good environment but less area than other engineering colleges. Overall, it's a good engineering college in Visakhapatnam. Consider joining ANITS, it has good facilities but not too great, totally based on your interest.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sanketika Vidya Parishad Engineering CollegeReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: In our college, it is disappointing, but a few facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very average. For example, Wi-Fi is not available in my branch, and there is no proper infrastructure in my labs. The classrooms and library are good in our college. There are no hostels in my college. The sports facilities are good, and the medical facilities are average in our college.

college_info.intro:
Chitkara University popular programmes are MBA, BTech, BSc & MSc. Chitkara University students MBA students apply marketing principles to real-life situations through case studies and projects. Chitkara University Rajpura MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, Brand Manager, Customer Relationship Manager, and others. Chitkara University Punjab provides accelerated career growth in Marketing careers. MSc students are given internship opportunities and also provided campus recruitment opportunities.
Chitkara University Rajpura follows a module-based teaching structure in which each and every module includes 2 subjects, with credits ranging from 2 to 3. The curriculum of the provided courses are well-designed. The university believes in providing good learning opportunities to students. One of the popular BTech specialisations include B.E.
