review_summary.college_name: Chitkara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering with Specialisations - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.

content.Placements: Placements at Chitkara University are excellent and well-structured. For my batch/course, around 80-90% of eligible students were placed, with many receiving multiple offers. Top companies like Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., come.
content.Infrastructure: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent in every field, do check it out.

content.Placements: So, talking about the placements, about 1/3rd of the students are placed in the placement session. The companies that came for this include Uno Mind, HCL, and Infosys. Some private limited companies are also included in it. The average package that is offered is 5 LPA for different roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with ACCA - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Overall, students were placed who have skills and industry-based knowledge. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 6 LPA. Top companies like KPMG, EY, and PwC offered top roles such as senior manager and accounts manager. Almost all students got internships through college referrals.
content.Infrastructure: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.

content.Placements: ? 90%? The highest was of 18 Lacs the lowest of 4-5 Lacs? Tcs, hcl microsoft? 95%? Analyst, manager Chitkara? S BBA programme is known for strong industry connections so students get opportunities across business, finance, marketing, operations, HR and analytics.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Software Engineering with Deakin University - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed in my course, and the average package is around 8-9 Lacs. Top roles like data scientist and software engineer are offered. Companies like Service now, appreciate, uno mind, etc. Visit our campus every year, and many students get internships and jobs in these companies.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

paragraphs: Chitkara University, Chandigarh'sadmission process is open for all courses. The university contains various steps, including filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Chitkara University, Chandigarh, admission 2025:
1- Application Process 2025

Candidates must apply and appear for entrance exams accepted by the university for admission. Further, candidates must fill out the application form online and offline by visiting the campus physically.
2- Selection Round

Chitkara University, Chandigarhselects candidates for all courses based on various entrance exams such as JEE Main, SLAT, PTE and others. The college also conducts PI and GD rounds for admission to some UG and PG courses including MBA, BCA, BBA and others.
3- Allocation of Seats

The seats in the various programmes will be allotted based on merit- ranking of the student in the specified entrance test subject to fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria for the programme and the preferences indicated in the counselling form at the time of counselling (as per availability of seats).
4- Payment and confirmation of seats

Those who are offered admission are required to pay the fees. Any kind of cheque shall NOT be accepted. All enrolled students have to pay their fees twice a year in the months notified by the university. Delayed payment of fees will attract a fine as per the rules and regulations of the University.
For more information about Chitkara University, Chandigarh Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission at Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers 11 full-time BTech programmes in the stream of Business and Management Studies, Engineering and IT & Software. It is a UG-level course and the selection criteria is the JEE Main entrance score. The eligibility criteria for the course is Class 12 with 60% aggregate. The duration ofChitkara University BTechis four years and the lateral entry duration is three years. A total of ten BTech courses are offered by CIET and four BTech Lateral Entry courses are offered by CCAE.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Chitkara University for BTech?
faqs.answer: To get BTech admission at Chitkara University, the candidate need to meet the minimum educational qualification as per course requirement. The candidate should pass Class 12 with 60% aggregate or secure 60% in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics. The selection criteria for the course isJEE Mains score. Overall, BTech is a four-year programme at Chitkara University.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University does not provide any additional entrance examination for admission. There are two main criterias for B.Tech. First of all, the candidates must pass their 10+2 with a minimum of 60% marks of the total marks (mandatory subjects are Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics) in any stream. And secondly, candidates are required to appear in national-lavel entrance examination, for example JEE Main (mandatory for 2023 batch).

faqs.question: What is the reality of Chitkara University placements?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Chitkara University placements 2023, over 1,150 BTech students were placed during Chitkara University placements. The institute attracted more than 670 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the Engineering students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. Further, the highest and average package offered during Chitkara University MBA placements in 2023 was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of Chitkara University placements for the BTech and MBA Class of 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars BTech Placement Statistics (2023) MBA Placement Statistics (2023) Highest package INR 111 LPA INR 44 LPA Average Package NA INR 9 LPA Median package NA INR 10.5 LPA Total students 1,800 NA Total students placed 1,150+ NA Total recruiters 670+ 275+ Dream offers 570+ 140+ Super Dream offers 310+ NA PPOs NA 175+ International offers NA 35+

faqs.question: Does Chitkara University offer placements abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chitkara University offers placements both internationally and nationally. The top companies who visit the campus are Amazon, Adobe, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, etc. Students get an opportunity to work in areas of IT, Education, Consulting, E-Commerce, etc. In 2023 placement drive, the highest package given among BTech students was INR 1.11 Crore per annum. For the MBA students, the highest package was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA was the average package.

faqs.question: Is Chitkara University, Chandigarh hard to get?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG and PhD level. To get admission here, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university as per respective courses. The selection criteria also differ as per respective courses. Students can check the selection criteria for some of the top courses of the university below: Course Name Selection Criteria BE JEE Main BA LLB (Hons) Merit-Based BBA Merit-Based + PI BCA Merit-Based + PI MCA MAT, XAT, CAT, NMAT, CMAT, JEE Main, SAT India or Chitkara University Test + GD + PI* * The candidate who does not have CAT/MAT/NMAT/XAT/CMAT exam score needs to sit for the Chitkara University Test + GD + PI.

faqs.question: What is the fee of B.Com course at Chitkara Business School?
faqs.answer: The overall fees of an BCom in Chitkara Business School irange from INR 3.6 lakh to INR 3.8 lakh , tuition fees for three years. The BCom fees might includes other include components other than tuition fees, such as one-time fee of INR 20,000 , which candidates must pay only at the time admission. faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA/PGDM at Chitkara Business School Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA course at Chitkara Business School ranges from INR 6.60 Lacs to INR 10.20 lakh . The 2 year full-time MBA course is offered in 9 specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance, Logistics & Supply Chain, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, HealthCare, Retail Management, Pharmaceutical Management, and Banking, Financial Services and Insurance. Candidates need to take a national level entrance exam, such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT or NMAT to take admission.

faqs: What is the cutoff of Chitkara University?
description: Chitkara University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the B.Sc in Hospitality Administration course. The universi accepts the NCHMCT JEE entrance exam for selecting students. Candidates seeking admission can scroll down to check the year and round-wise cutoff trends. A few more updates are below:

Chitkara University NCHMCT JEE cutoff 2025 for admission to the BSc in Hospitality Management course was 4062 in the last round, for the students belonging to the General AI quota. The first round closing rank for the same course was 6366. Check out the table below:

Chitkara University cutoff 2025 has been released for NCHMCT JEE across different rounds and categories. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff rank for the B.Sc. in Hospitality Administration course was 4062. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 987, while in 2023, it was 9338. So, comparing the cutoff data for admission to the BSc course, Chitkara University saw a fluctuating trend over three years.

Candidates planning to appear for next year's exam must go through the NCHMCT JEE cutoff marks of the latest and previous years to get an idea of admission chances at Chitkara University. Students can view or download the round and year-wise cutoff PDF lists to understand the past years' cutoff trends for B.Sc in Hospitality Administration admission.

highlights.description:
Chitkara University is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #78 in the University category, #89 under Engineering, #78 under Management, #16 under Pharmacy, and #38 under Architecture & Planning. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #1201-1400 to Chitkara University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Chitkara University rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Chitkara University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Chitkara University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 12 ranks to #78 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 5 ranks to #89 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 24 ranks to #78 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Chitkara University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. In the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
Chitkara University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University's rank is #1201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 74 ranks to #325 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 30 ranks to #75 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.
reviews.review_text: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent in every field, do check it out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.
reviews.review_text: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University has a good environment overall.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. The buildings and the park are well maintained. Hygiene is maintained overall on the campus. Regular maintenance and cleaning happen. Even the hostels are looked after if students face any issues regarding light or electronics.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my college option.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is of very good quality. All the stuff is in very good condition, and the staff is also very cooperative. The labs are properly furnished and kept neat and clean. The food quality is nice, and it is regularly checked for safety measures for the future.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Offers practical, industry-focused learning with good faculty and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Both CSE buildings are well maintained, with air-conditioned lecture halls and good seating. Wi-Fi works well. There is also a decent-sized library. Almost every sport is available, with proper equipment and gear. The gym is good overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great exposure and opportunities, but be ready for the discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall campus is really good and provides you with the best services that you pay for. The mess food is still better than a lot, and mostly good. The water is clean, and the hostel has vending machines for your service, even the academic buildings are well built and maintained. They are a bit strict in matters of applying for a gate pass to even step outside the campus, and the hostel rules are made a bit stricter.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about my Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Labs are well-maintained, and all facilities are available. From Wi-Fi to food quality is good. Mess is in a good location inside the campus. The library is separate for every building. In the hostel, good furniture and other requirements are provided as needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Discover your potential at Chitkara University. Opportunities await you.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, brilliant classrooms, big libraries with every book on each and every topic taught available. No idea about the hostel, though, as I'm a day scholar, but the sports facilities are to the students' benefit. Overall, the institute offers you the best facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: MBA mean Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: They have very well-maintained infrastructure with separate classrooms and a separate library for every department. They have world 5G Wi-Fi on every floor. They have indoor games on campus along with a big swimming pool available on a rental basis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University MBA marketing.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are in a good location and have all the facilities required by the students. They have their own rule, like they close the gate at 9:30 and open it at 5:00, for the better performance of students and to maintain the integrity of the college. They have a full hygienic canteen mess and have medical facilities for every student.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college has an MBA in marketing course.
reviews.review_text: Good library and good area. It has its own mass canteen cafeteria and many more inside the boundary and on the main campus. Getting all the facilities, from drinking water to washrooms. The hostel's infrastructure is very luxurious, with both AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life is amazing, but the cost is too high for the boys' hostel. They provide every facility, from Wi-Fi to cleaning. They also provide a variety of menus in the large dinner and breakfast menus. They also provide quality of life, and the food is of high quality.

likes.text: The companies like Amazon, Wipro, Microsoft, Infosys, HCL, TCS, and many other MNCs visit our campus for the recruitment.

college_info.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

college_info.intro:
JNTUH College of Engineering comprises several departments, including the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Metallurgical Engineering and others. Through its departments, JNTUH College of Engineering offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the JNTUH College of Engineering are very popular among the students. The institute offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of engineering and technology. The industry-institute relations established by JNTUH College of Engineering provide students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTUH College of Engineering also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable JNTUH College of Engineering recruiters include Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, among others. Check the popular programmes offered at JNTUH College of Engineering, along with their fee structure and eligibility criteria in the following table:

review_content.Placements: In Electronics and Communication Engineering, almost 40% students are placed. The highest package is 19LPA. The top recruitment company is Qualcomm. Internships are mostly outsourced. Best placements, nice environment, and the best educational institution.

review_content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students get placed in our senior batch. The highest salary package offered is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The college has good placements, and most of the students with a good CGPA will be placed. Many MNC companies will visit the college since it is a university and a government institution. However, the internship facility is a little bit low as we have to seek it from outside on our own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My JNTUH University facts.

content.Placements: A maximum of 70 percent of students are placed in the academic year 2024 to 2025. The highest package is approximately 52 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Most companies that recruit us are like Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and AMD. These companies offer a sufficient package.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.
content.Faculty: Here, all the faculty members are professors, they are well-experienced in their teaching subjects, and they clarify students' doubts. For every semester, we have a semester exam. Exams are a little bit tough because we will study all the chapters from the start. I am joining the electronic and communication engineering branch. The faculty of this branch teaches very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with getting into this college.

content.Placements: The main thing I want to share about the JNTUH college is that it will provide us with the best placements compared to other private colleges. Many MNCs will visit the college since it is a government college, and most of the students will be getting placed.
content.Infrastructure: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

description: JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Admission to various UG and PG courses at JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, is based on several exams such as TS EAMCET and MBA exams. The institute offers BTech courses based on valid TS EAMCET ranks. JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, accepts exams along with the courses as follows:

JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 1228 and 27732 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 1228, 1614 and 2719, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad MCA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 616. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 432, and the 2023 cutoff was 314 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MCA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My JNTUH University facts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for study and enjoyment, with the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The library is provided with all the books required for the course. Pleasant environment at the department, Hostels are provided only for students staying far and students with low incomes. Most sports students are encouraged by our college irrespective of categories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite normal. We have a projector in every class. We have departmental Wi-Fi, which is working quite well. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good one for a government college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our course are above average. Every classroom has projectors for teaching. Every department has seminar halls and laboratories. Every floor has Wi-Fi access. The college has a central university library and another smaller library with proper facilities. The quality of hostel facilities is below average. The food is worst. The college has an indoor stadium, a ground, and other sports courts.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every department, and every lab has its own Wi-Fi. Everything is good in this college. Good campus-wide coverage, well-equipped with projectors and computers, large modern libraries accessed digitally, and affordable basic facilities in the hostel! Grounds and equipment for major sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placements and with faculty up to a certain level.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. We have an excellent university library with a lot of good books, and we even have a small library for general purposes. Our labs are a bit old, but nonetheless, they work very well and satisfy the requirements in most cases. Our department overall looks nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review by the First Batch of Cybersecurity at JNTUH.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is departmental Wi-Fi. There are many libraries, the main one being the university library, which has 3 floors. The hostel is of moderate quality. The food quality is better than that of other hostels. There is a university healthcare centre.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and peaceful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for my course and hostel are quite good. I really like the infrastructure of my college. But it's not modern as it is an old university. The facilities in the hostel are not that great. Classrooms, library, and labs are good enough. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Not a great college, but decent.
reviews.review_text: The campus was widely spread along 45 acres of land with many great facilities like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, auditorium, project labs, lawn, waiting room, indoor complex, etc. The hostel was also excellent in providing quality facilities like good food, clean rooms, and a hygienic environment. The medical team was doing an excellent job. They were available to the students the entire day. The...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and nice infrastructure and above average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available. In our college in my civil department the nicest facilities are there and good information is given. WI-FI is available in department labs classrooms and two libraries.  Nice food in hostel mess. Canteen and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Inside JNTUH  Education Campus Life and Growth.
reviews.review_text: Moderate infrastructure Wi-Fi labs are good library is extraordinary, classrooms are mid related to the hostel everything is good. Sports and games are super nice and tournaments happen. I really like our university library it has so many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Love this college. The best college that teaches you life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, but the food may be a bit questionable. The infrastructure is good, especially the equipment provided in the laboratories, which is phenomenal. Food is sometimes good, whereas sometimes it is very odd-tasting and of low quality. The canteen needs to be improved a little bit.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: In JNTUH, infrastructure is excellent and it looks like an IT company. Classrooms are very good and clean with wooden benches which are comfortable for students, and every room contains a stage allocated to faculty members.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are Oracle, Mathworks, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, ACS Solutions, L&T, TCS Digital, TCS Ninja, Merilytics, and Deloitte visit our campus to hire students.
All the students do their internships at Reddylabs, Vishakasteel plant, ITC, and many other companies.

likes.text: Our college has very good infrastructure and facilities available to the students, including labs, systems, canteen, library, mess, transport, hostels, classrooms, and playground.
We have good-quality facilities and food available in the canteen, mess, and hostels.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Semester exams in this college are not much difficult if students follow the subject properly from the beginning.
All the teachers at my department are well qualified, knowledgeable and ready to help students with all kinds of projects, research works, career guidance etc.

likes.text: I like computer science very much, and I have much interest in software systems, So, I chose this course.

TS EAMCET Counselling fee for OBC category candidates is INR 1200 and for Scheduled Caste (SC)/ Scheduled Tribe (ST) Category is INR 600. CMR College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges. Candidates eligible to appear for the counselling process can refer to the table given below to check out the categories-wise TS EAMCET counselling fees:
